Accordion

components-data-containers-accordion · ./stories/Accordion/Accordion.stories.tsx
折りたたみ可能なコンテンツのセット。 type="single" の場合は一度に一つ、"multiple" の場合は複数開くことができます。
Prop types (react-docgen) 8 prop types 
Component: src/components/data-display/Accordion/Accordion.tsx::Accordion
Props:
children: React.ReactNode

className?: string

collapsible?: boolean = true

defaultValue?: string | string[]

id?: string

onChange?: (value: string | string[]) => void

type?: "single" | "multiple" = "single"

value?: string | string[]
Imports 
import { Accordion } from "wimui";
Single story ok 
const Single = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Accordion type="single" collapsible defaultValue="item-1">
            <Accordion.Item value="item-1">
                <Accordion.Trigger>{t("story.accordion_trigger_1")}</Accordion.Trigger>
                <Accordion.Content>
                    {t("story.accordion_content_1")}
                </Accordion.Content>
            </Accordion.Item>
            <Accordion.Item value="item-2">
                <Accordion.Trigger>{t("story.accordion_trigger_2")}</Accordion.Trigger>
                <Accordion.Content>
                    {t("story.accordion_content_2")}
                </Accordion.Content>
            </Accordion.Item>
            <Accordion.Item value="item-3">
                <Accordion.Trigger>{t("story.accordion_trigger_3")}</Accordion.Trigger>
                <Accordion.Content>
                    {t("story.accordion_content_3")}
                </Accordion.Content>
            </Accordion.Item>
        </Accordion>
    );
};
Multiple story ok 
const Multiple = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Accordion type="multiple">
            <Accordion.Item value="item-1">
                <Accordion.Trigger>{t("story.accordion_trigger_1")}</Accordion.Trigger>
                <Accordion.Content>
                    {t("story.accordion_content_multiple_1")}
                </Accordion.Content>
            </Accordion.Item>
            <Accordion.Item value="item-2">
                <Accordion.Trigger>{t("story.accordion_trigger_2")}</Accordion.Trigger>
                <Accordion.Content>{t("story.accordion_content_multiple_2")}</Accordion.Content>
            </Accordion.Item>
            <Accordion.Item value="item-3">
                <Accordion.Trigger>{t("story.accordion_trigger_3")}</Accordion.Trigger>
                <Accordion.Content>{t("story.accordion_content_multiple_3")}</Accordion.Content>
            </Accordion.Item>
        </Accordion>
    );
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Accordion>
            <Accordion.Item value="item-1">
                <Accordion.Trigger>{t("story.accordion_trigger_enabled")}</Accordion.Trigger>
                <Accordion.Content>{t("story.accordion_content_enabled")}</Accordion.Content>
            </Accordion.Item>
            <Accordion.Item value="item-2" disabled>
                <Accordion.Trigger>{t("story.accordion_trigger_disabled")}</Accordion.Trigger>
                <Accordion.Content>{t("story.accordion_content_disabled")}</Accordion.Content>
            </Accordion.Item>
        </Accordion>
    );
};

## <T k="doc.basic_usage" />

```tsx
import { Accordion } from "@/components/data-display/Accordion/Accordion";

<Accordion type="single" collapsible>
  <Accordion.Item value="item-1">
    <Accordion.Trigger>Title</Accordion.Trigger>
    <Accordion.Content>Collapsible content</Accordion.Content>
  </Accordion.Item>
</Accordion>
```

components-navigation-utilities-affix · ./stories/Affix/Affix.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 7 prop types 
Component: src/components/navigation/Affix/Affix.tsx::Affix
Props:
/**
 * Children to be rendered inside the affix
 */
children: React.ReactNode

/**
 * Additional class names
 */
className?: string

/**
 * Office distance from the bottom of the window (in pixels)
 */
offsetBottom?: number

/**
 * Office distance from the top of the window (in pixels)
 */
offsetTop?: number

/**
 * Callback when the affix state changes
 */
onChange?: (lastAffixed: boolean) => void

/**
 * Style attribute
 */
style?: React.CSSProperties

/**
 * Target container that will be scrolled
 */
target?: () => HTMLElement | Window | null = () => window
Imports 
import { Affix, Button } from "wimui";
Basic story ok 
const Basic = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ height: "200vh", padding: "20px" }}>
            <p>{t("story.affix_scroll_top")}</p>
            <div style={{ marginTop: "100px" }}>
                <Affix offsetTop={20}>
                    <Button label={t("story.affix_top")} size="md" />
                </Affix>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
Offset Bottom story ok 
const OffsetBottom = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ height: "200vh", padding: "20px" }}>
            <p>{t("story.affix_scroll_bottom")}</p>
            <div style={{ marginTop: "120vh" }}>
                <p>{t("story.affix_scroll_bottom_2", "Scroll down here...")}</p>
                <Affix offsetBottom={20}>
                    <Button label={t("story.affix_bottom")} size="md" />
                </Affix>
                <p>{t("story.affix_more")}</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

Alert

components-alerts-notifications-alert · ./stories/Alert/Alert.stories.tsx
ユーザーに重要な情報を伝えるためのアラートコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 7 prop types 
Component: src/components/feedback/Alert/Alert.tsx::Alert
Props:
/**
 * 子要素（説明文として扱われます）
 */
children?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * 追加のクラス名
 */
className?: string

/**
 * アラートの説明文
 */
description?: string

/**
 * カスタムアイコン。指定しない場合はバリアントに応じたデフォルトアイコンが表示されます。
 */
icon?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * 閉じるボタンをクリックした時のコールバック。指定すると閉じるボタンが表示されます。
 */
onClose?: () => void

/**
 * アラートのステータス
 */
status?: "info" | "success" | "warning" | "error" = "info"

/**
 * アラートのタイトル
 */
title?: string
Imports 
import { Alert } from "wimui";
Info story ok 
const Info = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Alert
            status="info"
            title={args.title || t("story.alert_info_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.alert_info_desc")} />
    );
};
Success story ok 
const Success = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Alert
            status="success"
            title={args.title || t("story.alert_success_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.alert_success_desc")} />
    );
};
Warning story ok 
const Warning = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Alert
            status="warning"
            title={args.title || t("story.alert_warning_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.alert_warning_desc")} />
    );
};
Error Status story ok 
const ErrorStatus = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Alert
            status="error"
            title={args.title || t("story.alert_error_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.alert_error_desc")} />
    );
};
Without Title story ok 
const WithoutTitle = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Alert
            status="info"
            description={args.description || t("story.alert_no_title_desc")} />
    );
};
With Close Button story ok 
const WithCloseButton = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Alert
            status="success"
            title={args.title || t("story.alert_dismiss_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.alert_dismiss_desc")}
            onClose={args.onClose ?? (() => console.log("Alert closed"))} />
    );
};
Long Content story ok 
const LongContent = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Alert
            status="info"
            title={args.title || t("story.alert_update_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.alert_update_desc")}
            onClose={args.onClose ?? (() => {})} />
    );
};

Component: src/components/navigation/Anchor/Anchor.tsx::Anchor
Props:
/**
 * Bounding distance (in pixels) for triggering active state
 */
bounds?: number = 5

/**
 * Additional class names
 */
className?: string

/**
 * Orientation of the anchor links
 */
direction?: "vertical" | "horizontal" = "vertical"

/**
 * Array of anchor link configurations
 */
items?: AnchorLinkItem[] = []

/**
 * Offset (in pixels) from top when clicking to scroll
 */
offset?: number = 0

/**
 * Style attribute
 */
style?: React.CSSProperties
Imports 
import { Anchor } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = React.useState(false);

    const items = [
      {
        key: "part-1",
        href: "#part-1",
        title: t("story.anchor_part1"),
      },
      {
        key: "part-2",
        href: "#part-2",
        title: t("story.anchor_part2"),
        children: [
          {
            key: "part-2-1",
            href: "#part-2-1",
            title: t("story.anchor_part2_1"),
          },
          {
            key: "part-2-2",
            href: "#part-2-2",
            title: t("story.anchor_part2_2"),
          },
        ],
      },
      {
        key: "part-3",
        href: "#part-3",
        title: t("story.anchor_part3"),
      },
    ];

    React.useEffect(() => {
      const checkMobile = () => setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < 768);
      checkMobile();
      window.addEventListener("resize", checkMobile);
      return () => window.removeEventListener("resize", checkMobile);
    }, []);

    return (
        <div
            style={{
              display: "flex",
              flexDirection: isMobile ? "column" : "row-reverse",
              padding: isMobile ? "0" : "20px",
              gap: isMobile ? "0" : "40px",
              minHeight: "150vh",
            }}>
            <div
                style={{
                  position: "sticky",
                  top: 0,
                  zIndex: 100,
                  width: isMobile ? "100%" : "200px",
                  flexShrink: 0,
                  background: "var(--wim-color-surface)",
                  backdropFilter: "blur(8px)",
                  alignSelf: "flex-start",
                  padding: isMobile ? "0" : "20px 0",
                  borderBottom: isMobile ? "1px solid var(--wim-color-border)" : "none",
                }}>
                <Anchor
                    items={items}
                    direction={isMobile ? "horizontal" : "vertical"}
                    offset={isMobile ? 60 : args.offset} />
            </div>
            <div style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 0, padding: isMobile ? "20px" : 0 }}>
                <section
                    id="part-1"
                    style={{
                      height: "600px",
                      background: "var(--wim-color-surface-variant)",
                      padding: "20px",
                      marginBottom: "20px",
                    }}>
                    <h2>{t("story.anchor_part1")}</h2>
                    <p>{t("story.anchor_scroll_msg")}</p>
                </section>
                <section
                    id="part-2"
                    style={{
                      height: "1000px",
                      background: "var(--wim-color-surface-variant)",
                      padding: "20px",
                      marginBottom: "20px",
                    }}>
                    <h2>{t("story.anchor_part2")}</h2>
                    <div
                        id="part-2-1"
                        style={{
                          height: "400px",
                          border: "1px dashed var(--wim-color-border)",
                          margin: "20px 0",
                          padding: "10px",
                        }}>
                        <h3>{t("story.anchor_part2_1")}</h3>
                    </div>
                    <div
                        id="part-2-2"
                        style={{
                          height: "400px",
                          border: "1px dashed var(--wim-color-border)",
                          margin: "20px 0",
                          padding: "10px",
                        }}>
                        <h3>{t("story.anchor_part2_2")}</h3>
                    </div>
                </section>
                <section
                    id="part-3"
                    style={{ height: "600px", background: "var(--wim-color-surface-variant)", padding: "20px" }}>
                    <h2>{t("story.anchor_part3")}</h2>
                </section>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
Docs doc ok

<Stories />

AppShell

components-application-shell-appshell · ./stories/AppShell/AppShell.stories.tsx
アプリケーション全体のレイアウトを構成するルートコンポーネント。 ## 使い方 ### 1. Composition API（推奨） サブコンポーネント（`AppShell.Header`, `AppShell.Sidebar` など）を `children` として渡す方法。柔軟なカスタマイズが可能。 ```tsx <AppShell> <AppShell.Header>...</AppShell.Header> <AppShell.Sidebar>...</AppShell.Sidebar> <AppShell.Main>...</AppShell.Main> </AppShell> ``` ### 2. Props API（シンプルなケース向け） `header`, `sidebar`, `footer`, `navbar` を props として渡す方法。 ただし、サイドバーを使う場合は Composition API を推奨。 ```tsx <AppShell header={<Header />} sidebar={<Sidebar />}> <main>...</main> </AppShell> ```
note: Props API で `sidebar` を渡した場合、`--with-sidebar` クラスが自動付与されます。 Composition API で `AppShell.Sidebar` を使う場合は、 親 `AppShell` に `sidebar` prop として何かを渡すか、 `AppShell.Body` を使って手動でレイアウトを構成してください。
Prop types (react-docgen) 7 prop types 
Component: src/components/layout/AppShell/AppShell.tsx::AppShellRoot
Props:
/**
 * Center main content horizontally
 */
centered?: boolean

/**
 * Footer component
 */
footer?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * Header component
 */
header?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * Maximum width for centered content
 */
maxWidth?: number | string

/**
 * Navbar component (mobile bottom navigation)
 */
navbar?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * Add padding to main content
 */
padding?: boolean = true

/**
 * Sidebar component
 */
sidebar?: React.ReactNode
Imports 
import { AppShell, Button, Footer, Header, Icon, Input, Sidebar, TabBar } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <AppShell
            header={
              <Header bordered>
                <Header.Section align="start">
                  <div style={{ fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: "1.2rem" }}>
                    WIM UI
                  </div>
                </Header.Section>
                <Header.Section align="end" style={{ gap: "8px" }}>
                  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">
                    {t("story.appshell_docs")}
                  </Button>
                  <Button variant="filled" size="sm">
                    {t("story.appshell_signin")}
                  </Button>
                </Header.Section>
              </Header>
            }>
            <div>
                <h2>{t("story.appshell_welcome")}</h2>
                <p>{t("story.appshell_main_content")}</p>
                <p>{t("story.appshell_flexible_layout")}</p>
            </div>
        </AppShell>
    );
};
Modern App story ok 
const ModernApp = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <AppShell
            header={
              <Header bordered>
                <Header.Section align="start">
                  <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "8px" }}>
                    <div
                      style={{
                        width: 32,
                        height: 32,
                        background: "var(--wim-color-primary)",
                        borderRadius: 4,
                      }}
                    />
                    <div style={{ fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: "1.2rem" }}>
                      WimStore
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </Header.Section>
                <Header.Section align="center">
                  <div style={{ width: "100%", maxWidth: 400 }}>
                    <Input
                      placeholder={t("story.appshell_search_placeholder")}
                      leftIcon="SearchIcon"
                      fullWidth
                    />
                  </div>
                </Header.Section>
                <Header.Section align="end" style={{ gap: "12px" }}>
                  <Icon name="BellIcon" style={{ cursor: "pointer" }} />
                  <Icon name="StarIcon" style={{ cursor: "pointer" }} />
                  <Button variant="filled" size="sm">
                    {t("story.appshell_checkout")}
                  </Button>
                </Header.Section>
              </Header>
            }>
            <div
                style={{
                  display: "grid",
                  gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr))",
                  gap: "20px",
                }}>
                {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6].map((i) => (
                  <div
                    key={i}
                    style={{ border: "1px solid var(--wim-color-border)", borderRadius: 8, padding: 16 }}
                  >
                    <div
                      style={{
                        width: "100%",
                        aspectRatio: "1",
                        background: "var(--wim-color-surface-variant)",
                        borderRadius: 4,
                        marginBottom: 8,
                      }}
                    />
                    <div style={{ fontWeight: "bold" }}>
                      {t("story.appshell_product")} {i}
                    </div>
                    <div style={{ color: "var(--wim-color-text-secondary)", fontSize: "0.9rem" }}>$99.00</div>
                  </div>
                ))}
            </div>
        </AppShell>
    );
};
With Sidebar story ok 
const WithSidebar = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = React.useState(false);

    return (
        <AppShell
            header={
              <Header bordered>
                <Header.Section
                  align="start"
                  style={{ gap: "10px", alignItems: "center", display: "flex" }}
                >
                  <style>{`
                                    .appshell-mobile-trigger {
                                        display: none;
                                        background: none;
                                        border: 1px solid var(--wim-color-border);
                                        border-radius: 4px;
                                        cursor: pointer;
                                        padding: 4px 8px;
                                    }
                                    @media (max-width: 768px) {
                                        .appshell-mobile-trigger {
                                            display: block;
                                        }
                                    }
                                `}</style>
                  <button
                    className="appshell-mobile-trigger"
                    onClick={() => setMobileOpen(true)}
                  >
                    {t("story.common_menu", "Menu")}
                  </button>
                  <div style={{ fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: "1.2rem" }}>
                    {t("story.appshell_dashboard")}
                  </div>
                </Header.Section>
                <Header.Section align="end">
                  <Icon name="BellIcon" style={{ width: 24, height: 24 }} />
                  <Icon name="UserIcon" style={{ width: 24, height: 24 }} />
                </Header.Section>
              </Header>
            }
            sidebar={
              <Sidebar
                bordered
                width={260}
                mobileOpen={mobileOpen}
                onOverlayClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}
              >
                <Sidebar.Header>
                  <div style={{ padding: "16px", fontWeight: "bold" }}>
                    {t("story.appshell_navigation")}
                  </div>
                </Sidebar.Header>
                <Sidebar.Content>
                  <Sidebar.Item icon={<Icon name="HomeIcon" />} active>
                    {t("story.appshell_dashboard")}
                  </Sidebar.Item>
                  <Sidebar.Item icon={<Icon name="UserIcon" />}>
                    {t("story.appshell_users")}
                  </Sidebar.Item>
                  <Sidebar.Item icon={<Icon name="SettingsIcon" />}>
                    {t("story.appshell_settings")}
                  </Sidebar.Item>
                  <Sidebar.Item icon={<Icon name="FilterIcon" />}>
                    {t("story.appshell_documents")}
                  </Sidebar.Item>
                </Sidebar.Content>
              </Sidebar>
            }>
            <div>
                <h2>{t("story.appshell_dashboard")}</h2>
                <p>{t("story.appshell_dashboard_desc")}</p>
            </div>
        </AppShell>
    );
};
With Footer story ok

Props:
data: Record<string, unknown>[]

height?: number = 300

keys: string[]

smooth?: boolean = true

stacked?: boolean = false

title?: string

width?: string | number = "100%"

xAxisKey: string
Imports 
import { AreaChart } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <AreaChart
    title="Performance Trends"
    data={data}
    xAxisKey="name"
    keys={["value", "secondary"]} />;
Stacked story ok 
const Stacked = () => <AreaChart
    title="Stacked Performance"
    data={data}
    xAxisKey="name"
    keys={["value", "secondary"]}
    stacked />;

AspectRatio

components-layout-aspectratio · ./stories/AspectRatio/AspectRatio.stories.tsx
`AspectRatio` は、指定したアスペクト比を維持しながらコンテンツを表示するためのコンテナです。
Prop types (react-docgen) 2 prop types 
Component: src/components/layout/AspectRatio/AspectRatio.tsx::AspectRatio
Props:
/**
 * 子要素
 */
children: React.ReactNode

/**
 * アスペクト比 (例: 16 / 9, 1, 4 / 3)
 */
ratio?: number = 1
Imports 
import { AspectRatio } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <AspectRatio
            ratio={16 / 9}
            style={{ width: "100%", maxWidth: "400px", margin: "0 auto" }}>
            <img
                src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535025183041-0991a977e25b?w=300&dpr=2&q=80"
                alt={t("story.aspectratio_alt", "Landscape")} />
        </AspectRatio>
    );
};
Square story ok 
const Square = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <AspectRatio ratio={1} style={{ width: "100%", maxWidth: "200px", margin: "0 auto" }}>
            <img
                src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535025183041-0991a977e25b?w=300&dpr=2&q=80"
                alt={t("story.aspectratio_alt", "Landscape")} />
        </AspectRatio>
    );
};
Embed story ok 
const Embed = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <AspectRatio
            ratio={16 / 9}
            style={{ width: "100%", maxWidth: "500px", margin: "0 auto" }}>
            <iframe
                title={t("story.aspectratio_map_title", "Map")}
                src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d3240.8280303808788!2d139.7502393!3d35.685175!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x60188c0d02d803c1%3A0x6a1e64115e581404!2z55qH5bGF!5e0!3m2!1sja!2sjp!4v1707641212345!5m2!1sja!2sjp"
                style={{ border: 0 }}
                allowFullScreen />
        </AspectRatio>
    );
};

Audio

components-media-audio · ./stories/Audio/Audio.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 22 prop types 
Component: src/components/media/Audio/Audio.tsx::Audio
Props:
autoPlay?: boolean = false

border?: boolean = false

caption?: string

controls?: boolean = true

crossfade?: boolean | number = false

customControls?: boolean = false

/**
 * デモ用：読み込み完了を意図的に遅らせるミリ秒
 */
demoDelay?: number

fadeIn?: boolean | number = false

fadeOut?: boolean | number = false

hotkeys?: boolean = false

/**
 * 読み込み設定。"lazy" の場合に Intersection Observer が有効化されます
 */
loading?: "eager" | "lazy" = "lazy"

loop?: boolean = false

muted?: boolean = false

playbackRate?: boolean = false

preload?: "auto" | "metadata" | "none"

presets?: boolean = false

radius?: "none" | "small" | "medium" | "large" | "full" = "none"

shadow?: boolean = false

showMetadata?: boolean = false

sleepTimer?: boolean = false

src?: string | string[] | AudioTrack | AudioTrack[]

visualizer?: boolean = false
Imports 
import { Audio, Button } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <Audio src={audioSample} controls radius="none" />;
With Caption story ok 
const WithCaption = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Audio
            src={audioSample}
            controls
            radius="none"
            caption={t("story.audio_caption")} />
    );
};
Auto Play story ok 
const AutoPlay = () => <Audio src={audioSample} controls autoPlay muted />;
Rounded story ok 
const Rounded = () => <Audio
    src={audioSample}
    customControls
    controls={false}
    radius="full"
    shadow
    border />;
Custom Design story ok 
const CustomControls = () => <Audio
    src={{
      src: audioSample,
      title: "Custom Player",
      artist: "Wim UI",
    }}
    customControls
    showMetadata
    radius="medium"
    shadow
    border />;
Full Featured story ok 
const FullFeatured = () => <Audio
    src={[
      {
        src: audioSample,
        title: "Sample Web Audio API",
        artist: "Wim UI",
      },
      {
        src: audioSample,
        title: "Track 2",
        artist: "Wim UI",
      },
    ]}
    customControls
    radius="medium"
    shadow
    border
    visualizer
    showMetadata
    fadeIn={1500}
    fadeOut={1500}
    crossfade={2000}
    playbackRate
    hotkeys
    presets
    sleepTimer />;
Premium Features story ok 
const PremiumFeatures = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [audioKey, setAudioKey] = React.useState(0);

    return (
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "2rem" }}>
            <div>
                <p style={{ marginBottom: "1rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>{t("story.audio_premium_features_lazy_load")}</p>
                <div style={{ marginBottom: "1rem" }}>
                    <Button
                        variant="filled"
                        onClick={() => setAudioKey((prev) => prev + 1)}
                        label={t("story.audio_premium_features_reload")}
                        icon="RefreshIcon" />
                </div>
                <Audio
                    key={audioKey}
                    src={audioSample}
                    customControls
                    showMetadata
                    demoDelay={2000}
                    radius="medium"
                    shadow
                    caption={t("story.audio_premium_features_caption")} />
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
Docs doc ok

Avatar

components-data-indicators-avatar · ./stories/Avatar/Avatar.stories.tsx
ユーザーのアイコンやイニシャルを表示するためのアバターコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 7 prop types 
Component: src/components/data-display/Avatar/Avatar.tsx::Avatar
Props:
alt?: string = ""

icon?: React.ReactNode

initials?: string

shape?: "circle" | "rounded" = "circle"

size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg" = "md"

src?: string

/**
 * ステータス
 */
status?: "primary" | "secondary" | "neutral" | "error" | "success"
Imports 
import { Avatar } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Avatar
            src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535713875002-d1d0cf377fde?auto=format&fit=crop&w=120&h=120"
            alt={t("story.avatar_alt")} />
    );
};
Initials story ok 
const Initials = () => <Avatar initials="JD" status="primary" />;
Sizes story ok 
const Sizes = () => <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "16px", alignItems: "center" }}>
    <Avatar size="sm" initials="SM" status="neutral" />
    <Avatar size="md" initials="MD" status="neutral" />
    <Avatar size="lg" initials="LG" status="neutral" />
</div>;
Shapes story ok 
const Shapes = () => <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "16px" }}>
    <Avatar shape="circle" initials="C" status="secondary" />
    <Avatar shape="rounded" initials="R" status="secondary" />
</div>;
Fallback story ok 
const Fallback = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Avatar
            src="https://invalid-image-url.com"
            initials="FB"
            alt={t("story.avatar_alt")} />
    );
};
Colors story ok 
const Colors = () => <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "16px" }}>
    <Avatar initials="P" status="primary" />
    <Avatar initials="S" status="secondary" />
    <Avatar initials="N" status="neutral" />
    <Avatar initials="E" status="error" />
    <Avatar initials="SU" status="success" />
</div>;
Docs doc ok

AvatarGroup

components-data-indicators-avatargroup · ./stories/AvatarGroup/AvatarGroup.stories.tsx
複数のアバターを束ねて表示するためのコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 5 prop types 
Component: src/components/data-display/AvatarGroup/AvatarGroup.tsx::AvatarGroup
Props:
children: React.ReactNode

className?: string

max?: number

size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg"

total?: number
Imports 
import { Avatar, AvatarGroup } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <AvatarGroup>
    {users.map((u, i) => (
      <Avatar key={i} src={u.src} initials={u.initials} />
    ))}
</AvatarGroup>;
Max Displayed story ok 
const MaxDisplayed = () => <AvatarGroup max={3}>
    {users.map((u, i) => (
      <Avatar key={i} src={u.src} initials={u.initials} />
    ))}
</AvatarGroup>;
Sizes story ok 
const Sizes = () => <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "24px" }}>
    <AvatarGroup size="sm">
        {users.map((u, i) => (
          <Avatar key={i} initials={u.initials} status="primary" />
        ))}
    </AvatarGroup>
    <AvatarGroup size="md">
        {users.map((u, i) => (
          <Avatar key={i} initials={u.initials} status="secondary" />
        ))}
    </AvatarGroup>
    <AvatarGroup size="lg">
        {users.map((u, i) => (
          <Avatar key={i} initials={u.initials} status="neutral" />
        ))}
    </AvatarGroup>
</div>;
Total Count story ok 
const TotalCount = () => <AvatarGroup max={2} total={10}>
    {users.slice(0, 2).map((u, i) => (
      <Avatar key={i} src={u.src} initials={u.initials} />
    ))}
</AvatarGroup>;
Docs doc ok

BackTop

components-navigation-utilities-backtop · ./stories/BackTop/BackTop.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 6 prop types 
Component: src/components/navigation/BackTop/BackTop.tsx::BackTop
Props:
/**
 * Children to be rendered inside the button
 */
children?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * Additional class names
 */
className?: string

/**
 * Callback when clicked
 */
onClick?: (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => void

/**
 * Style attribute
 */
style?: React.CSSProperties

/**
 * Target container that will be scrolled
 */
target?: () => HTMLElement | Window | Document | null = () => window

/**
 * Scroll height after which the button becomes visible
 */
visibilityHeight?: number = 400
Imports 
import { BackTop } from "wimui";
Basic story ok 
const Basic = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ height: "200vh", padding: "20px" }}>
            <p>{t("story.backtop_scroll")}</p>
            <p>{t("story.backtop_visible_400")}</p>
            <BackTop visibilityHeight={400} />
        </div>
    );
};
Custom Element story ok 
const CustomElement = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ height: "200vh", padding: "20px" }}>
            <p>{t("story.backtop_custom_scroll")}</p>
            <p>{t("story.backtop_visible_200")}</p>
            <BackTop visibilityHeight={200}>
                <div
                    style={{
                      height: 40,
                      width: 40,
                      display: "flex",
                      alignItems: "center",
                      justifyContent: "center",
                      borderRadius: 4,
                      backgroundColor: "#108ee9",
                      color: "#fff",
                      fontSize: 14,
                    }}>
                    {t("story.backtop_up")}
                </div>
            </BackTop>
        </div>
    );
};
Specific Target story ok 
const SpecificTarget = () => <SpecificTargetStory />;
Docs doc ok

Badge

components-data-indicators-badge · ./stories/Badge/Badge.stories.tsx
状態やカウントなどを表示するためのバッジコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 5 prop types 
Component: src/components/data-display/Badge/Badge.tsx::Badge
Props:
/**
 * 表示するコンテンツ
 */
children?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * アイコン
 */
icon?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * サイズ
 */
size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg"

/**
 * ステータス
 */
status?: | "primary"
| "secondary"
| "success"
| "warning"
| "error"
| "info"
| "neutral"

/**
 * バリアント
 */
variant?: "solid" | "outline" | "subtle"
Imports 
import { Badge, Icon } from "wimui";
Primary story ok 
const Primary = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Badge status="primary" content={t("story.badge_content")} />;
};
Secondary story ok 
const Secondary = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Badge status="secondary" content={t("story.badge_secondary")} />;
};
Destructive story ok 
const Destructive = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Badge status="error" content={t("story.badge_error")} />;
};
Neutral story ok 
const Neutral = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Badge status="neutral" content={t("story.badge_neutral")} />;
};
Outline story ok 
const Outline = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Badge variant="outline" status="primary" content={t("story.badge_outline")} />;
};
Small story ok 
const Small = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Badge size="sm" content={t("story.badge_small")} />;
};
Required story ok 
const Required = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Badge status="error" size="sm" content={t("required")} />;
};
Optional story ok 
const Optional = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Badge status="neutral" size="sm" content={t("optional")} />;
};
With Icon story ok 
const WithIcon = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Badge
            status="primary"
            content={t("story.badge_verified")}
            icon={<Icon name="CheckIcon" />} />
    );
};
Icon Only story ok 
const IconOnly = () => <Badge icon={(<Icon name="CheckIcon" />)} status="primary" />;
Docs doc ok
./stories/Badge/Badge.mdx
import { Meta, Canvas, Controls, Title, Primary, Stories } from "@storybook/addon-docs/blocks";

Banner

components-alerts-notifications-banner · ./stories/Banner/Banner.stories.tsx
重要なメッセージやアクションをユーザーに提示するためのバナーコンポーネント。 通常、ページの上部に表示されます。
Prop types (react-docgen) 8 prop types 
Component: src/components/feedback/Banner/Banner.tsx::Banner
Props:
/**
 * 子要素
 */
children?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * 追加のクラス名
 */
className?: string

/**
 * バナーの説明文
 */
description?: string

/**
 * アクションボタン要素（例：Buttonコンポーネント）
 */
extra?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * アイコンを表示するかどうか、またはカスタムアイコン
 */
icon?: boolean | React.ReactNode = true

/**
 * 閉じるボタンをクリックした時のコールバック。指定すると閉じるボタンが表示されます。
 */
onClose?: () => void

/**
 * バナーのステータス
 */
status?: "info" | "success" | "warning" | "error" = "info"

/**
 * バナーのタイトル
 */
title?: string
Imports 
import { Banner, Button } from "wimui";
Info story ok 
const Info = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Banner
            status="info"
            title={args.title || t("story.banner_update_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.banner_update_desc")} />
    );
};
Success story ok 
const Success = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Banner
            status="success"
            title={args.title || t("story.alert_success_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.banner_update_desc")} />
    );
};
Warning story ok 
const Warning = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Banner
            status="warning"
            title={args.title || t("story.banner_maint_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.banner_maint_desc")} />
    );
};
Error Status story ok 
const ErrorStatus = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Banner
            status="error"
            title={args.title || t("story.banner_conn_error_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.banner_conn_error_desc")}
            onClose={args.onClose ?? (() => {})} />
    );
};
With Action story ok 
const WithAction = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Banner
            status="info"
            title={args.title || t("story.banner_cookie_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.banner_cookie_desc")}
            extra={
              <Button
                size="sm"
                variant="outlined"
                label={t("story.banner_btn_accept")}
              />
            } />
    );
};
With Close And Action story ok 
const WithCloseAndAction = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Banner
            status="warning"
            title={args.title || t("story.banner_trial_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.banner_trial_desc")}
            extra={
              <Button
                size="sm"
                variant="filled"
                label={t("story.banner_btn_upgrade")}
              />
            }
            onClose={args.onClose ?? (() => {})} />
    );
};
Description Only story ok 
const DescriptionOnly = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Banner
            status="info"
            description={args.description || t("story.banner_no_title_desc")} />
    );
};
No Icon story ok 
const NoIcon = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Banner
            status="info"
            title={args.title || t("story.banner_simple_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.banner_simple_desc")}
            icon={false} />
    );
};

xAxisKey: string
Imports 
import { BarChart } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <BarChart
    title="Monthly Sales"
    data={data}
    xAxisKey="name"
    keys={["sales", "profit"]} />;
Stacked story ok 
const Stacked = () => <BarChart
    title="Monthly Sales (Stacked)"
    data={data}
    xAxisKey="name"
    keys={["sales", "profit"]}
    stacked />;

BaseListItem

components-internal-baselistitem · ./stories/Internal/BaseListItem/BaseListItem.stories.tsx
Internal component for consistent list items across Select, Menu, Dropdown, etc. Not intended for direct public use.
Prop types (react-docgen) 7 prop types 
Component: src/components/_internal/BaseListItem/BaseListItem.tsx::BaseListItem
Props:
/**
 * Whether the item is currently highlighted or active
 */
active?: boolean

/**
 * The component used for the root node.
 */
as?: C

/**
 * Custom class name
 */
className?: string

/**
 * Whether the item represents a dangerous action
 */
danger?: boolean

/**
 * Whether the item is disabled
 */
disabled?: boolean

/**
 * Left icon or element
 */
icon?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * Right section (shortcuts, arrows, etc.)
 */
rightSection?: React.ReactNode
Imports 
import { BaseListItem, Chip, Icon } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <BaseListItem style={{ width: "240px" }}>{args.children || t("standard_list_item")}</BaseListItem>;
};
With Icon story ok 
const WithIcon = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <BaseListItem icon={<Icon name="EditIcon" />}>{t("home")}</BaseListItem>;
};
With Right Section story ok 
const WithRightSection = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <BaseListItem
            icon={<Icon name="SettingsIcon" />}
            rightSection={<Icon name="ChevronRightIcon" size="sm" />}>
            {t("a11y.settings")}
        </BaseListItem>
    );
};
With Badge story ok 
const WithBadge = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <BaseListItem
            icon={<Icon name="BellIcon" />}
            rightSection={<Chip size="sm">{t("new")}</Chip>}>
            {t("notifications")}
        </BaseListItem>
    );
};
States story ok 
const States = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div
            style={{ width: "240px", display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "4px" }}>
            <BaseListItem>{t("home")}</BaseListItem>
            <BaseListItem active>{t("profile")}</BaseListItem>
            <BaseListItem disabled>{t("a11y.settings")}</BaseListItem>
            <BaseListItem danger icon={<Icon name="TrashIcon" />}>{t("a11y.delete")}</BaseListItem>
        </div>
    );
};
Docs doc ok

BentoGrid

components-layout-bentogrid · ./stories/BentoGrid/BentoGrid.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 1 prop type 
Component: src/components/layout/BentoGrid/BentoGrid.tsx::BentoGrid
Props:
children?: React.ReactNode
Imports 
import { BentoGrid, BentoGridItem, Icon } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const items = [
      {
        title: t("story.bento_ai_title", "AI Integration"),
        description: t("story.bento_ai_desc", "Seamlessly integrate AI into your workflow."),
        header: <Skeleton />,
        className: "wim-bento-grid-item--col-span-2",
        icon: <Icon name="CircleIcon" />,
      },
      {
        title: t("story.bento_collab_title", "Real-time Collaboration"),
        description: t("story.bento_collab_desc", "Work together with your team in real-time."),
        header: <Skeleton />,
        className: "wim-bento-grid-item--col-span-1",
        icon: <Icon name="SquareIcon" />,
      },
      {
        title: t("story.bento_analytics_title", "Advanced Analytics"),
        description: t("story.bento_analytics_desc", "Discover insights with our powerful analytics tools."),
        header: <Skeleton />,
        className: "wim-bento-grid-item--col-span-1",
        icon: <Icon name="ChevronDownIcon" />,
      },
      {
        title: t("story.bento_cloud_title", "Cloud Infrastructure"),
        description: t("story.bento_cloud_desc", "Scalable and secure cloud hosting for your apps."),
        header: <Skeleton />,
        className: "wim-bento-grid-item--col-span-2",
        icon: <Icon name="ExternalLinkIcon" />,
      },
    ];

    return (
        <BentoGrid>
            {items.map((item, i) => (
              <BentoGridItem
                key={i}
                title={item.title}
                description={item.description}
                header={item.header}
                className={item.className}
                icon={item.icon}
              />
            ))}
        </BentoGrid>
    );
};
Docs doc ok

components-overlays-bottomsheet · ./stories/BottomSheet/BottomSheet.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 4 prop types 
Component: src/components/overlay/BottomSheet/BottomSheet.tsx::BottomSheet
Props:
children: React.ReactNode

defaultOpen?: boolean = false

onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void

open?: boolean
Imports 
import {
    BottomSheet,
    BottomSheetBody,
    BottomSheetClose,
    BottomSheetContent,
    BottomSheetDescription,
    BottomSheetFooter,
    BottomSheetHeader,
    BottomSheetTitle,
    BottomSheetTrigger,
    Button,
} from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <BottomSheet>
            <BottomSheetTrigger asChild>
                <Button variant="filled" label={t("story.bottomsheet_open")} />
            </BottomSheetTrigger>
            <BottomSheetContent>
                <BottomSheetHeader>
                    <BottomSheetTitle>{t("story.bottomsheet_title")}</BottomSheetTitle>
                    <BottomSheetDescription>
                        {t("story.bottomsheet_desc")}
                    </BottomSheetDescription>
                </BottomSheetHeader>
                <BottomSheetBody>
                    <div
                        className="space-y-4"
                        style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "1rem" }}>
                        <p>{t("story.bottomsheet_body")}</p>
                        <div
                            style={{
                              padding: "1rem",
                              backgroundColor: "var(--wim-color-surface-variant)",
                              borderRadius: "0.5rem",
                            }}>
                            <p style={{ fontSize: "0.875rem" }}>
                                {t("story.bottomsheet_hint")}
                            </p>
                        </div>
                        {Array.from({ length: 10 }).map((_, i) => (
                          <p key={i}>
                            {t("story.bottomsheet_scroll_item")} {i + 1}
                          </p>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </BottomSheetBody>
                <BottomSheetFooter>
                    <BottomSheetClose asChild>
                        <Button variant="outlined" label={t("story.bottomsheet_cancel")} />
                    </BottomSheetClose>
                    <Button variant="filled" label={t("story.bottomsheet_action")} />
                </BottomSheetFooter>
            </BottomSheetContent>
        </BottomSheet>
    );
};
Single Action story ok 
const SingleAction = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <BottomSheet>
            <BottomSheetTrigger asChild>
                <Button variant="outlined" label={t("story.bottomsheet_quick_actions")} />
            </BottomSheetTrigger>
            <BottomSheetContent>
                <BottomSheetHeader>
                    <BottomSheetTitle>{t("story.bottomsheet_select_option")}</BottomSheetTitle>
                </BottomSheetHeader>
                <BottomSheetBody>
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "0.5rem" }}>
                        <button
                            style={{
                              width: "100%",
                              textAlign: "left",
                              padding: "0.75rem",
                              border: "none",
                              background: "none",
                              cursor: "pointer",
                              borderRadius: "0.375rem",
                            }}>
                            <span>{t("story.bottomsheet_share")}</span>
                        </button>
                        <button
                            style={{
                              width: "100%",
                              textAlign: "left",
                              padding: "0.75rem",
                              border: "none",
                              background: "none",
                              cursor: "pointer",
                              borderRadius: "0.375rem",
                            }}>
                            <span>{t("story.bottomsheet_favorite")}</span>
                        </button>
                        <button
                            style={{
                              width: "100%",
                              textAlign: "left",
                              padding: "0.75rem",
                              border: "none",
                              background: "none",
                              cursor: "pointer",
                              borderRadius: "0.375rem",
                              color: "var(--wim-color-destructive)",
                            }}>
                            <span>{t("story.bottomsheet_delete")}</span>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </BottomSheetBody>
            </BottomSheetContent>
        </BottomSheet>
    );
};

Box

components-layout-box · ./stories/Box/Box.stories.tsx
Box is the most basic layout component. It provides a way to style a div (or any other element) with common CSS properties as props.
Prop types (react-docgen) 22 prop types 
Component: src/components/layout/Box/Box.tsx::Box
Props:
/**
 * The component used for the root node. Either a string to use a HTML element or a component.
 */
as?: C

/**
 * Background color
 */
bg?: T | (string & {})

/**
 * Display
 */
display?: React.CSSProperties["display"]

/**
 * Height
 */
h?: | T
| {
    base?: T;
    sm?: T;
    md?: T;
    lg?: T;
    xl?: T;
  }

/**
 * Margin
 */
m?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin bottom
 */
mb?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin left
 */
ml?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin right
 */
mr?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin top
 */
mt?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin horizontal
 */
mx?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin vertical
 */
my?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding
 */
p?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding bottom
 */
pb?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding left
 */
pl?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Position
 */
position?: React.CSSProperties["position"]

/**
 * Padding right
 */
pr?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding top
 */
pt?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding horizontal
 */
px?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding vertical
 */
py?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Border radius
 */
radius?: number | WimRadius

/**
 * Box shadow
 */
shadow?: T | (string & {})

/**
 * Width
 */
w?: | T
| {
    base?: T;
    sm?: T;
    md?: T;
    lg?: T;
    xl?: T;
  }
Imports 
import { Box } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Box bg="#f0f0f0" p={20} radius={8}>{t("story.box_default")}</Box>;
};
With Custom Shadow story ok 
const WithCustomShadow = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Box
            bg="white"
            p={40}
            radius={12}
            shadow="0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 4px 6px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)">{t("story.box_shadow")}</Box>
    );
};
As Button story ok 
const AsButton = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Box
            as="button"
            bg="#eff6ff"
            color="#1d4ed8"
            p="10px 20px"
            radius={6}
            style={{ border: "1px solid #bfdbfe", cursor: "pointer", fontWeight: 600 }}>{t("story.box_button")}</Box>
    );
};
Spacing story ok 
const Spacing = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <Box bg="#f8fafc" p={20} radius={8} style={{ border: "1px solid #e2e8f0" }}>
      <Box
        bg="#eff6ff"
        p={15}
        mb={15}
        color="#1d4ed8"
        radius={4}
        style={{ border: "1px solid #bfdbfe" }}
      >
        {t("story.box_margin")}
      </Box>
      <Box
        bg="#f0fdf4"
        p={15}
        color="#15803d"
        radius={4}
        style={{ border: "1px solid #bbf7d0" }}
      >
        {t("story.box_2")}
      </Box>
    </Box>
  );
};
Padding Props story ok 
const PaddingProps = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Box
            bg="#fdf2f8"
            color="#be185d"
            px={40}
            py={10}
            radius={8}
            style={{ border: "1px solid #fbcfe8", display: "inline-block" }}>{t("story.box_padding")}</Box>
    );
};

Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.

className?: string

items: BreadcrumbItem[]

separator?: React.ReactNode

Imports 
import { Breadcrumb } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Breadcrumb
            items={[
              { label: t("story.breadcrumb_home"), href: "/" },
              { label: t("story.breadcrumb_category"), href: "/category" },
              { label: t("story.breadcrumb_current") },
            ]} />
    );
};
With Icons story ok 
const WithIcons = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Breadcrumb
            items={[
              {
                label: t("story.breadcrumb_home"),
                href: "/",
                iconName: "CircleIcon",
              },
              {
                label: t("story.breadcrumb_category"),
                href: "/category",
                iconName: "SquareIcon",
              },
              { label: t("story.breadcrumb_current"), iconName: "EyeIcon" },
            ]} />
    );
};
Small story ok 
const Small = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Breadcrumb
            size="sm"
            items={[
              { label: t("story.breadcrumb_home"), href: "/" },
              { label: t("story.breadcrumb_category"), href: "/category" },
              { label: t("story.breadcrumb_current") },
            ]} />
    );
};
Large story ok 
const Large = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Breadcrumb
            size="lg"
            items={[
              { label: t("story.breadcrumb_home"), href: "/" },
              { label: t("story.breadcrumb_category"), href: "/category" },
              { label: t("story.breadcrumb_current") },
            ]} />
    );
};
Custom Separator story ok 
const CustomSeparator = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Breadcrumb
            separator=">"
            items={[
              { label: t("story.breadcrumb_home"), href: "/" },
              { label: t("story.breadcrumb_category"), href: "/category" },
              { label: t("story.breadcrumb_current") },
            ]} />
    );
};

Prop types (react-docgen) 12 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/Button/Button.tsx::Button
Props:
/**
 * Whether to animate the width change when label changes
 */
animateWidth?: boolean = false

/**
 * ボタンの背景色をデザイントークンで上書きする。通常は `variant` prop で対応できるため、このpropは最終手段として使用してください。
 */
backgroundColor?: T | (string & {})

className?: string

/**
 * Whether the button should take up the full width of its container
 */
fullWidth?: boolean = false

/**
 * Icon name or custom icon element
 */
icon?: React.ComponentProps<typeof Icon>["name"] | React.ReactNode

iconPosition?: "left" | "right" = "left"

/**
 * ボタンのデザイン上の意味（視覚・意味的状態）。ARIAの role 属性とは無関係。
 */
intent?: "default" | "destructive" | "positive" = "default"

justify?: "start" | "center" | "end" | "between" = "center"

label?: string

loading?: boolean = false

size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg" = "md"

variant?: "filled" | "outlined" | "ghost" = "outlined"
Imports 
import { Button } from "wimui";
Large Primary Button story ok 
const LargePrimaryButton = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Button onClick={fn()} size="lg" variant="filled" label={t("button.label")} />;
};
Medium Secondary Button story ok 
const MediumSecondaryButton = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Button onClick={fn()} size="md" variant="outlined" label={t("button.label")} />;
};
Small Tertiary Button story ok 
const SmallTertiaryButton = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Button onClick={fn()} size="sm" variant="ghost" label={t("button.label")} />;
};
Small Tertiary Destructive With Circle Icon Button story ok 
const SmallTertiaryDestructiveWithCircleIconButton = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Button
            onClick={fn()}
            size="sm"
            variant="ghost"
            intent="destructive"
            icon="CircleIcon"
            iconPosition="left"
            disabled
            label={t("button.label")} />
    );
};
Disabled Button story ok 
const DisabledButton = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Button
            onClick={fn()}
            size="md"
            variant="filled"
            disabled
            label={t("button.label")} />
    );
};
Medium Primary Loading Processing Button story ok 
const MediumPrimaryLoadingProcessingButton = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Button onClick={fn()} size="md" variant="filled" loading label={t("processing")} />;
};
Medium Secondary Loading Saving Button story ok 
const MediumSecondaryLoadingSavingButton = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Button onClick={fn()} size="md" variant="outlined" loading label={t("saving")} />;
};
Medium Primary Interactive Loading Button story ok 
const MediumPrimaryInteractiveLoadingButton = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

    const handleClick = (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement>) => {
      if (args.onClick) args.onClick(e);
      setLoading(true);
      setTimeout(() => {
        setLoading(false);
      }, 2000);
    };

    return (
        <Button
            size="md"
            variant="filled"
            label={t("button.label")}
            loading={loading}
            onClick={handleClick} />
    );
};
Medium Secondary Interactive Loading With Icon Button story ok 
const MediumSecondaryInteractiveLoadingWithIconButton = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

    const handleClick = (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement>) => {
      if (args.onClick) args.onClick(e);
      setLoading(true);
      setTimeout(() => {
        setLoading(false);
      }, 2000);
    };

    return (
        <Button
            size="md"
            variant="outlined"
            label={t("button.label")}
            loading={loading}
            onClick={handleClick}
            icon="CircleIcon"
            iconPosition="left" />
    );
};
With Children story ok
children を使ったボタン（label prop の代替）
const WithChildren = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <Button variant="filled" size="md">
      {t("story.button_click_me")}
    </Button>
  );
};

Priority Override story ok 
const PriorityOverride = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <ButtonGroup variant="ghost" gap="10px">
            <Button size="md" label={t("story.buttongroup_primary")} variant="filled" />
            <Button size="md" label={t("story.buttongroup_secondary")} variant="outlined" />
            <Button size="md" label={t("story.buttongroup_tertiary")} variant="ghost" />
        </ButtonGroup>
    );
};

components-data-indicators-calendar · ./stories/Calendar/Calendar.stories.tsx
ユーザーが日付を閲覧し、選択するためのカレンダーコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 14 prop types 
Component: src/components/data-display/Calendar/Calendar.tsx::Calendar
Props:
/**
 * 追加のクラス名。
 */
className?: string

/**
 * 初期選択範囲（範囲選択モード時）。
 */
defaultRange?: { start: Date | null; end: Date | null }

/**
 * 初期値。
 */
defaultValue?: Date

/**
 * 無効化。
 */
disabled?: boolean = false

/**
 * 無効化する日付の配列。
 */
disabledDates?: Date[]

/**
 * 特定の日付を無効化する関数。
 */
isDateDisabled?: (date: Date) => boolean

/**
 * 選択可能な最大日付。
 */
maxDate?: Date

/**
 * 選択可能な最小日付。
 */
minDate?: Date

/**
 * 日付が変更された時のコールバック。
 */
onChange?: (date: Date) => void

/**
 * 範囲が変更された時のコールバック（範囲選択モード時）。
 */
onRangeChange?: (range: { start: Date | null; end: Date | null }) => void

/**
 * 選択された範囲（範囲選択モード時）。
 */
range?: { start: Date | null; end: Date | null }

/**
 * 範囲選択モード。
 */
rangeMode?: boolean = false

/**
 * 現在選択されている日付。
 */
value?: Date

/**
 * 週の開始曜日。0 = 日曜始まり、1 = 月曜始まり。デフォルトは 0。
 */
weekStartsOn?: 0 | 1 = 0
Imports 
import { Calendar } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <Calendar defaultValue={new Date()} />;
Selected Date story ok 
const SelectedDate = () => <Calendar defaultValue={new Date(2023, 0, 1)} />;
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => <Calendar defaultValue={new Date()} disabled />;
Controlled story ok 
const Controlled = () => {
    const [date, setDate] = useState(new Date());
    return <Calendar value={date} onChange={setDate} />;
};
Docs doc ok

import { Calendar } from "@/components/data-display/Calendar/Calendar";

## <T k="doc.calendar_advanced_features" />

### <T k="doc.calendar_range_mode" />

<p><T k="doc.calendar_range_mode_desc" /></p>

```jsx
const [range, setRange] = useState({ start: null, end: null });

<Calendar rangeMode range={range} onRangeChange={setRange} />;
```

<p><T k="doc.behavior_colon" /></p>

<p><T k="doc.calendar_behavior_1" /></p>
<p><T k="doc.calendar_behavior_2" /></p>
<p><T k="doc.calendar_behavior_3" /></p>

<p><T k="doc.calendar_behavior_4" /></p>

### <T k="doc.calendar_disabled_dates" />

<p><T k="doc.calendar_disabled_dates_desc" /></p>

#### <T k="doc.calendar_disabled_by_array" />

```jsx
const disabledDates = [
  new Date(2024, 11, 25), // Christmas
  new Date(2025, 0, 1), // New Year's Day
];

<Calendar
  disabledDates={disabledDates}
  onChange={(date) => console.log(date)}
/>;
```

#### <T k="doc.calendar_disabled_by_function" />

<p><T k="doc.calendar_disabled_by_function_desc" /></p>

```jsx
// Disable weekends
<Calendar
  isDateDisabled={(date) => {
    const day = date.getDay();
    return day === 0 || day === 6; // Sunday or Saturday
  }}
  onChange={(date) => console.log(date)}
/>
```

```jsx
// Disable past dates
<Calendar
  isDateDisabled={(date) => {
    const today = new Date();
    today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    return date < today;
  }}
  onChange={(date) => console.log(date)}
/>
```

### <T k="doc.calendar_min_max_dates" />

<p><T k="doc.calendar_min_max_dates_desc" /></p>

```jsx
const today = new Date();
const nextMonth = new Date();
nextMonth.setMonth(today.getMonth() + 1);

<Calendar
  minDate={today}
  maxDate={nextMonth}
  onChange={(date) => console.log(date)}
/>;
```

### <T k="doc.calendar_week_start" />

<p><T k="doc.calendar_week_start_desc" /></p>

```jsx
{/* 日曜始まり（デフォルト） */}
<Calendar weekStartsOn={0} onChange={(date) => console.log(date)} />

{/* 月曜始まり */}
<Calendar weekStartsOn={1} onChange={(date) => console.log(date)} />
```

### <T k="doc.calendar_combine_features" />

```jsx
const [range, setRange] = useState({ start: null, end: null });

<Calendar
  rangeMode
  range={range}
  onRangeChange={setRange}
  minDate={new Date()}
  isDateDisabled={(date) => date.getDay() === 0} // Disable Sundays
/>;
```

## <T k="doc.calendar_controlled_uncontrolled" />

<p><T k="doc.calendar_controlled_uncontrolled_desc" /></p>

<p><T k="doc.uncontrolled" /></p>

```jsx
<Calendar defaultValue={new Date()} onChange={(date) => console.log(date)} />
```

<p><T k="doc.controlled_colon" /></p>

```jsx
const [date, setDate] = useState(new Date());

<Calendar value={date} onChange={setDate} />;
```

## <T k="doc.typescript_support" />

<p><T k="doc.typescript_support_desc" /></p>

```tsx
import { Calendar } from "./Calendar";
import { T } from "../T";

<>
  {/* Single date selection */}
  <Calendar value={new Date()} onChange={(date: Date) => console.log(date)} />

  {/* Range selection */}
  <Calendar
    rangeMode
    range={{ start: new Date(), end: null }}
    onRangeChange={(range: { start: Date | null; end: Date | null }) => {
      console.log(range);
    }}
  />
</>;
```

components-data-containers-card · ./stories/Card/Card.stories.tsx
`Card` はコンテンツをグループ化して表示するためのコンテナコンポーネントです。
Prop types (react-docgen) 4 prop types 
Component: src/components/data-display/Card/Card.tsx::Card
Props:
/**
 * レンダリングするHTML要素
 */
as?: C

/**
 * パディングのサイズ
 */
padding?: "none" | "sm" | "md" | "lg" = "md"

/**
 * 角丸のサイズ
 */
radius?: "none" | "sm" | "md" | "lg" = "md"

/**
 * カードのバリアント
 */
variant?: "elevated" | "outline" | "flat" = "elevated"
Imports 
import { Button, Card } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Card variant="elevated" style={{ width: "300px" }}>
            <Card.Body>
                <h3>{t("story.card_default_title")}</h3>
                <p>{t("story.card_default_desc")}</p>
            </Card.Body>
        </Card>
    );
};
Outline story ok 
const Outline = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Card variant="outline" style={{ width: "300px" }}>
            <Card.Body>
                <h3>{t("story.card_outline_title")}</h3>
                <p>{t("story.card_outline_desc")}</p>
            </Card.Body>
        </Card>
    );
};
Flat story ok 
const Flat = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Card variant="flat" style={{ width: "300px" }}>
            <Card.Body>
                <h3>{t("story.card_flat_title")}</h3>
                <p>{t("story.card_flat_desc")}</p>
            </Card.Body>
        </Card>
    );
};
With Header And Footer story ok 
const WithHeaderAndFooter = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Card variant="elevated" style={{ width: "400px" }}>
            <Card.Header>
                <h4 style={{ margin: 0 }}>{t("story.card_header_title")}</h4>
            </Card.Header>
            <Card.Body>
                <p>{t("story.card_body_text")}</p>
            </Card.Body>
            <Card.Footer>
                <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "flex-end", gap: "8px" }}>
                    <Button variant="outlined" size="sm" label={t("story.card_cancel")} />
                    <Button variant="filled" size="sm" label={t("story.card_save")} />
                </div>
            </Card.Footer>
        </Card>
    );
};

Carousel

components-media-carousel · ./stories/Carousel/Carousel.stories.tsx
`Carousel` は複数のコンテンツをスライドさせて表示するコンポーネントです。
Prop types (react-docgen) 10 prop types 
Component: src/components/data-display/Carousel/Carousel.tsx::Carousel
Props:
/**
 * アスペクト比（例: '16/9', '4/3', '1/1'）を指定します。
 */
aspectRatio?: string

/**
 * 自動再生するかどうか
 */
autoPlay?: boolean = false

/**
 * カルーセル内のコンテンツ
 */
children?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * 追加のクラス名
 */
className?: string

/**
 * 自動再生の間隔（ミリ秒）
 */
interval?: number = 5000

/**
 * 無限ループするかどうか（シームレスな切り替え）
 */
loop?: boolean = true

/**
 * 画像のフィット方法を指定します。aspectRatioが指定されている場合に有効です。（デフォルト: 'cover'）
 */
objectFit?: "fill" | "contain" | "cover" | "none" | "scale-down" = "cover"

/**
 * 前後ボタンを表示するかどうか
 */
showControls?: boolean = true

/**
 * インジケーターを表示するかどうか
 */
showIndicators?: boolean = true

/**
 * 一度に表示するスライド数。数値またはブレークポイントごとのオブジェクトを指定可能。
 */
slidesToShow?: number | Breakpoints = 1
Imports 
import { Carousel } from "wimui";
Basic story ok 
const Basic = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const slides = Array.from({ length: 4 }).map((_, i) => (
      <ImagePlaceholder key={i} index={i} label={t("story.carousel_slide")} />
    ));
    return <Carousel loop>{slides}</Carousel>;
};
Multiple Items story ok 
const MultipleItems = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const slides = Array.from({ length: 6 }).map((_, i) => (
      <ImagePlaceholder key={i} index={i} label={t("story.carousel_slide")} />
    ));

    return (
        <Carousel loop slidesToShow={3}>
            {slides}
        </Carousel>
    );
};
Responsive story ok 
const Responsive = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const slides = Array.from({ length: 6 }).map((_, i) => (
      <ImagePlaceholder key={i} index={i} label={t("story.carousel_slide")} />
    ));

    return (
        <Carousel
            loop
            slidesToShow={{
              base: 1,
              sm: 2,
              md: 3,
              lg: 4,
            }}>
            {slides}
        </Carousel>
    );
};
Auto Play story ok 
const AutoPlay = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const slides = Array.from({ length: 4 }).map((_, i) => (
      <ImagePlaceholder key={i} index={i} label={t("story.carousel_slide")} />
    ));

    return (
        <Carousel loop autoPlay={true} interval={3000}>
            {slides}
        </Carousel>
    );
};
Custom Content story ok 
const CustomContent = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Carousel loop>
            <div style={{ padding: "0 10px", width: "100%" }}>
                <div
                    style={{
                      padding: "20px",
                      border: "1px solid var(--wim-color-border)",
                      borderRadius: "8px",
                      background: "var(--wim-color-surface-variant)",
                    }}>
                    <h3>
                        {t("story.carousel_card")}1
                                    </h3>
                    <p>{t("story.carousel_msg_loop")}</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div style={{ padding: "0 10px", width: "100%" }}>
                <div
                    style={{
                      padding: "20px",
                      border: "1px solid var(--wim-color-border)",
                      borderRadius: "8px",
                      background: "var(--wim-color-surface-variant)",
                    }}>
                    <h3>
                        {t("story.carousel_card")}2
                                    </h3>
                    <p>{t("story.carousel_msg_multiple")}</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div style={{ padding: "0 10px", width: "100%" }}>
                <div
                    style={{
                      padding: "20px",
                      border: "1px solid var(--wim-color-border)",
                      borderRadius: "8px",
                      background: "var(--wim-color-surface-variant)",
                    }}>
                    <h3>
                        {t("story.carousel_card")}3
                                    </h3>
                    <p>{t("story.carousel_msg_smooth")}</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </Carousel>
    );
};
No Loop story ok 
const NoLoop = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const slides = Array.from({ length: 3 }).map((_, i) => (
      <ImagePlaceholder key={i} index={i} label={t("story.carousel_slide")} />
    ));

    return (
        <Carousel loop={false}>
            {slides}
        </Carousel>
    );
};
With Image story ok 
const WithImage = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Carousel loop>
            {Array.from({ length: 4 }).map((_, i) => (
              <div key={`img-${i}`} style={{ width: "100%", height: "300px" }}>
                <img
                  src={SampleImage}
                  alt={`${t("story.carousel_sample_alt")} ${i + 1}`}
                  style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%", objectFit: "cover" }}
                />
              </div>
            ))}
        </Carousel>
    );
};
Aspect Ratio Check story ok 
const AspectRatioCheck = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Carousel loop aspectRatio="16/9" objectFit="cover">
            {Array.from({ length: 4 }).map((_, i) => (
              <img key={`img-${i}`} src={SampleImage} alt={`${t("story.carousel_sample_alt")} ${i + 1}`} />
            ))}
        </Carousel>
    );
};

Cascader

components-advanced-inputs-cascader · ./stories/Cascader/Cascader.stories.tsx
階層構造を持つデータから選択肢を辿って1つを選択するためのコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 16 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/Cascader/Cascader.tsx::Cascader
Props:
/**
 * Whether to show a clear button when a value is selected
 */
allowClear?: boolean = false

/**
 * Accessible label for the trigger when no visible label is provided
 */
aria-label?: string

className?: string

defaultValue?: string[]

disabled?: boolean = false

error?: string

/**
 * Expand trigger mode
 */
expandTrigger?: "click" | "hover" = "click"

id?: string

label?: string

layout?: "vertical" | "horizontal"

onChange?: (value: string[], selectedOptions: CascaderOption[]) => void

options?: CascaderOption[] = []

placeholder?: string

required?: boolean

/**
 * Custom separator for the display value
 */
separator?: string = " / "

value?: string[]
Imports 
import { Cascader } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const options: CascaderOption[] = [
      {
        label: t("story.cascader_tokyo"),
        value: "tokyo",
        children: [
          {
            label: t("story.cascader_shibuya"),
            value: "shibuya",
            children: [
              {
                label: t("story.cascader_dogenzaka"),
                value: "dogenzaka",
              },
            ],
          },
        ],
      },
      {
        label: t("story.cascader_osaka"),
        value: "osaka",
        children: [
          {
            label: t("story.cascader_osaka_city"),
            value: "osaka_city",
            children: [
              {
                label: t("story.cascader_umeda"),
                value: "umeda",
              },
            ],
          },
        ],
      },
    ];

    return (
        <Cascader
            options={options}
            placeholder={t("story.cascader_placeholder")}
            aria-label={t("story.cascader_placeholder")} />
    );
};
With Label story ok 
const WithLabel = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const options: CascaderOption[] = [
      {
        label: t("story.cascader_tokyo"),
        value: "tokyo",
        children: [
          {
            label: t("story.cascader_shibuya"),
            value: "shibuya",
            children: [
              {
                label: t("story.cascader_dogenzaka"),
                value: "dogenzaka",
              },
            ],
          },
        ],
      },
      {
        label: t("story.cascader_osaka"),
        value: "osaka",
        children: [
          {
            label: t("story.cascader_osaka_city"),
            value: "osaka_city",
            children: [
              {
                label: t("story.cascader_umeda"),
                value: "umeda",
              },
            ],
          },
        ],
      },
    ];

    return (
        <Cascader
            options={options}
            label={t("story.cascader_placeholder")}
            placeholder={t("story.cascader_placeholder")} />
    );
};
Hover Expand story ok 
const HoverExpand = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const options: CascaderOption[] = [
      {
        label: t("story.cascader_tokyo"),
        value: "tokyo",
        children: [
          {
            label: t("story.cascader_shibuya"),
            value: "shibuya",
            children: [
              {
                label: t("story.cascader_dogenzaka"),
                value: "dogenzaka",
              },
            ],
          },
        ],
      },
    ];

    return (
        <Cascader
            options={options}
            expandTrigger="hover"
            placeholder={t("story.cascader_placeholder")}
            aria-label={t("story.cascader_placeholder")} />
    );
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Cascader
            disabled
            placeholder={t("story.cascader_placeholder")}
            aria-label={t("story.cascader_placeholder")} />
    );
};
Custom Separator story ok 
const CustomSeparator = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const options: CascaderOption[] = [
      {
        label: t("story.cascader_tokyo"),
        value: "tokyo",
        children: [
          {
            label: t("story.cascader_shibuya"),
            value: "shibuya",
            children: [
              {
                label: t("story.cascader_dogenzaka"),
                value: "dogenzaka",
              },
            ],
          },
        ],
      },
    ];

    return (
        <Cascader
            options={options}
            separator=" > "
            defaultValue={["tokyo", "shibuya", "dogenzaka"]}
            aria-label="Location" />
    );
};
