Center

components-layout-center · ./stories/Center/Center.stories.tsx
Center component is used to center its children vertically and horizontally.
Prop types (react-docgen) 23 prop types 
Component: src/components/layout/Center/Center.tsx::Center
Props:
/**
 * The component used for the root node. Either a string to use a HTML element or a component.
 */
as?: C

/**
 * Background color
 */
bg?: T | (string & {})

/**
 * Display
 */
display?: React.CSSProperties["display"]

/**
 * Height
 */
h?: | T
| {
    base?: T;
    sm?: T;
    md?: T;
    lg?: T;
    xl?: T;
  }

/**
 * Whether to use inline-flex
 */
inline?: boolean = false

/**
 * Margin
 */
m?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin bottom
 */
mb?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin left
 */
ml?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin right
 */
mr?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin top
 */
mt?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin horizontal
 */
mx?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin vertical
 */
my?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding
 */
p?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding bottom
 */
pb?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding left
 */
pl?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Position
 */
position?: React.CSSProperties["position"]

/**
 * Padding right
 */
pr?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding top
 */
pt?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding horizontal
 */
px?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding vertical
 */
py?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Border radius
 */
radius?: number | WimRadius

/**
 * Box shadow
 */
shadow?: T | (string & {})

/**
 * Width
 */
w?: | T
| {
    base?: T;
    sm?: T;
    md?: T;
    lg?: T;
    xl?: T;
  }
Imports 
import { Box, Center, Icon } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Center h={200} bg="#f8fafc">
            <Box bg="#eff6ff" p={40} radius={8} style={{ border: "1px solid #3b82f6" }}>
                {t("story.center_content")}
            </Box>
        </Center>
    );
};
Inline story ok 
const Inline = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div style={{ border: "1px solid #ccc", padding: "10px" }}>
      Text before
      <Center inline bg="#fecaca" px={10} mx={5} radius={4}>
        {t("story.center_inline")}
      </Center>
      Text after
    </div>
  );
};
Icons story ok 
const Icons = () => (
  <Center w={40} h={40} bg="#3b82f6" color="white" radius="full">
    <Icon name="PlusIcon" />
  </Center>
);
Docs doc ok
./stories/Center/Center.mdx

./stories/charts/Charts.stories.tsx:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from "@storybook/react-vite";
import React from "react";
import { BarChart } from "@/components/charts/BarChart/BarChart";
import { LineChart } from "@/components/charts/LineChart/LineChart";
import { PieChart } from "@/components/charts/PieChart/PieChart";
import { Stack } from "@/components/layout/Stack/Stack";
import { Heading } from "@/components/typography/Heading/Heading";

const meta: Meta = {
  title: "Components/Visualization/Charts",
};

export default meta;

const data = [
  { name: "Jan", sales: 4000, profit: 2400 },
  { name: "Feb", sales: 3000, profit: 1398 },
  { name: "Mar", sales: 2000, profit: 9800 },
];

export const Dashboard: StoryObj = {
  render: () => (
    <Stack spacing="large">
      <Heading tag="h3" size="lg">Visualization Suite Overview</Heading>
      <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr))', gap: '20px' }}>
        <BarChart title="Sales by Month" data={data} xAxisKey="name" keys={["sales"]} />
        <LineChart title="Profit Trend" data={data} xAxisKey="name" keys={["profit"]} />
        <PieChart title="Market Share" data={data.map(d => ({ name: d.name, value: d.sales }))} />
      </div>
    </Stack>
  )
};

Docs doc ok
./stories/charts/Charts.mdx
import { Meta, Canvas } from "@storybook/addon-docs/blocks";
import * as ChartsStories from "./Charts.stories";
import { T } from "../T";

<Meta title="Components/Visualization/Charts" of={ChartsStories} />

# <T k="cat.visualization" />

<p><T k="doc.charts_desc" /></p>

<Canvas of={ChartsStories.Dashboard} />

## Chart Components

This collection includes various charting components for data visualization:

- **BarChart**: Best for comparing quantities across categories.
- **LineChart**: Ideal for showing trends over time.
- **AreaChart**: Similar to LineChart but emphasizes the magnitude of change.
- **PieChart**: Shows parts of a whole proportionally.
- **ScatterChart**: Visualizes relationships between two numerical variables.
- **RadarChart**: Compares multiple quantitative variables across three or more dimensions.
- **Heatmap**: Represents data density or values through color variations.
- **FunnelChart**: Shows the progression of data through a process.
- **Treemap**: Displays hierarchical data using nested rectangles.
- **Gauge**: Visualizes a single value within a range (e.g., progress toward goal).

Each chart is built using Recharts for high performance and accessibility.

import { ChatAvatar, ChatContainer, ChatInput, ChatMessage, ChatMessageList, Icon } from "wimui";
Basic story ok 
const Basic = () => {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div style={{ height: "100vh" }}>
      <ChatContainer>
        <ChatMessageList>
          <ChatMessage
            position="left"
            showAvatar
            avatar={<ChatAvatar fallback="A" color="s5" />}
            senderName={t("story.chat_alice")}
            timestamp="10:30 AM"
          >
            {t("story.chat_msg_1")}
          </ChatMessage>
          <ChatMessage
            position="right"
            showAvatar
            avatar={<ChatAvatar fallback="Y" />}
            senderName={t("story.chat_you")}
            timestamp="10:31 AM"
          >
            {t("story.chat_msg_2")}
          </ChatMessage>
          <ChatMessage
            position="left"
            showAvatar
            avatar={<ChatAvatar fallback="A" color="s5" />}
            senderName={t("story.chat_alice")}
            timestamp="10:32 AM"
          >
            {t("story.chat_msg_3")}
          </ChatMessage>
        </ChatMessageList>
        <ChatInput placeholder={t("chat.placeholder")} />
      </ChatContainer>
    </div>
  );
};

Interactive story ok 
const Interactive = () => {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  interface Message {
    id: number;
    text: string;
    position: "left" | "right";
    sender: string;
    timestamp: string;
  }

  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([
    {
      id: 1,
      text: t("story.chat_msg_10"),
      position: "left",
      sender: t("story.chat_support"),
      timestamp: new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], {
        hour: "2-digit",
        minute: "2-digit",
      }),
    },
  ]);
  const messageListRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  const handleSend = (message: string) => {
    const newMessage: Message = {
      id: messages.length + 1,
      text: message,
      position: "right",
      sender: t("story.chat_you"),
      timestamp: new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], {
        hour: "2-digit",
        minute: "2-digit",
      }),
    };
    setMessages([...messages, newMessage]);

    // Simulate response
    setTimeout(() => {
      const response: Message = {
        id: messages.length + 2,
        text: t("story.chat_msg_11"),
        position: "left",
        sender: t("story.chat_support"),
        timestamp: new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], {
          hour: "2-digit",
          minute: "2-digit",
        }),
      };
      setMessages((prev) => [...prev, response]);
    }, 1000);
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    if (messageListRef.current) {
      messageListRef.current.scrollTop = messageListRef.current.scrollHeight;
    }
  }, [messages]);

  return (
    <div style={{ height: "100vh" }}>
      <ChatContainer>
        <ChatMessageList ref={messageListRef}>
          {messages.map((msg) => (
            <ChatMessage
              key={msg.id}
              position={msg.position}
              showAvatar
              avatar={<ChatAvatar fallback={msg.sender.charAt(0)} color={msg.position === "left" ? "s5" : "s18"} />}
              senderName={msg.sender}
              timestamp={msg.timestamp}
            >
              {msg.text}
            </ChatMessage>
          ))}
        </ChatMessageList>
        <ChatInput placeholder={t("chat.placeholder_interactive")} onSend={handleSend} />
      </ChatContainer>
    </div>
  );
};

};

const AvatarSizes = () => {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

      style={{
        display: "flex",

    >

      </div>

          {t("story.chat_size_medium")}
        </p>
        <ChatAvatar size="md" fallback="M" />
      </div>
      <div>
        <p style={{ marginBottom: "8px", fontSize: "14px", color: "var(--wim-color-text-secondary)" }}>
          {t("story.chat_size_large")}
        </p>
        <ChatAvatar size="lg" fallback="L" />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
Ai Assistant Integration story ok 
const AiAssistantIntegration = () => {
  const { t, i18n } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  interface Message {
    id: number;
    text: string;
    position: "left" | "right";
    sender: string;
    timestamp: string;
    isTyping?: boolean;
  }

  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([
    {
      id: 1,
      text: t("story.chat_ai_greeting"),
      position: "left",
      sender: t("story.chat_ai_assistant"),
      timestamp: new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], {
        hour: "2-digit",
        minute: "2-digit",
      }),
    },
  ]);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const messageListRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    setMessages((prev) =>
      prev.map((msg) =>
        msg.id === 1
          ? { ...msg, text: t("story.chat_ai_greeting"), sender: t("story.chat_ai_assistant") }
          : msg
      )
    );
  }, [i18n.language, t]);

  const handleSend = async (message: string) => {
    const newMessage: Message = {
      id: Date.now(),
      text: message,
      position: "right",
      sender: t("story.chat_you"),
      timestamp: new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], {
        hour: "2-digit",
        minute: "2-digit",
      }),
    };
    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, newMessage]);
    setIsLoading(true);

    // Add a temporary typing message
    const typingMessageId = Date.now() + 1;
    setMessages((prev) => [
      ...prev,
      {
        id: typingMessageId,
        text: "...",
        position: "left",
        sender: t("story.chat_ai_assistant"),
        timestamp: "",
        isTyping: true,
      },
    ]);

    try {
      // [Example] How to use the Gemini API:
      // ------------------------------------------------------------------
      // const API_KEY = "YOUR_API_KEY"; // Replace with your actual key
      // const genAI = new GoogleGenerativeAI(API_KEY);
      // const model = genAI.getGenerativeModel({ model: "gemini-2.0-flash" });
      // const result = await model.generateContent(message);
      // const responseText = await result.response.text();
      // ------------------------------------------------------------------

      // Mocking the AI response for demonstration purposes
      await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 1500));
      const responseText = t("story.chat_ai_response", { message });

      setMessages((prev) =>
        prev
          .filter((msg) => msg.id !== typingMessageId)
          .concat({
            id: Date.now() + 2,
            text: responseText,
            position: "left",
            sender: t("story.chat_ai_assistant"),
            timestamp: new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], {
              hour: "2-digit",
              minute: "2-digit",
            }),
          })
      );
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to generate AI response:", error);
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    if (messageListRef.current) {
      messageListRef.current.scrollTop = messageListRef.current.scrollHeight;
    }
  }, [messages]);

  return (
    <div style={{ height: "100vh" }}>
      <ChatContainer>
        <ChatMessageList ref={messageListRef}>
          {messages.map((msg) => (
            <ChatMessage
              key={msg.id}
              position={msg.position}
              showAvatar
              avatar={
                msg.position === "left" ? (
                  <div
                    style={{
                      display: "flex",
                      alignItems: "center",
                      justifyContent: "center",
                      width: 40,
                      height: 40,
                      borderRadius: "50%",
                      backgroundColor: "var(--wim-color-primary)",
                      color: "white",
                    }}
                  >
                    <Icon name="StarIcon" size="sm" />
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <ChatAvatar fallback="Y" color="s18" />
                )
              }
              senderName={msg.sender}
              timestamp={msg.timestamp}
            >
              {msg.isTyping ? (
                <div
                  style={{
                    display: "flex",
                    gap: "4px",
                    alignItems: "center",
                    height: "24px",
                  }}
                >
                  <span
                    className="typing-dot"
                    style={{
                      animation: "chat-typing 1.4s infinite ease-in-out both",
                      animationDelay: "-0.32s",
                    }}
                  >
                    ●
                  </span>
                  <span
                    className="typing-dot"
                    style={{
                      animation: "chat-typing 1.4s infinite ease-in-out both",
                      animationDelay: "-0.16s",
                    }}
                  >
                    ●
                  </span>
                  <span
                    className="typing-dot"
                    style={{
                      animation: "chat-typing 1.4s infinite ease-in-out both",
                    }}
                  >
                    ●
                  </span>
                  <style>{`
                    @keyframes chat-typing {
                      0%, 80%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
                      40% { opacity: 1; }
                    }
                  `}</style>
                </div>
              ) : (
                msg.text
              )}
            </ChatMessage>
          ))}
        </ChatMessageList>
        <ChatInput
          placeholder={t("story.chat_placeholder_ai")}
          onSend={handleSend}
          disabled={isLoading}
        />
      </ChatContainer>
    </div>
  );
};
Docs doc ok
./stories/ChatUI/ChatUI.mdx
import { Canvas, Meta } from "@storybook/addon-docs/blocks";
import * as ChatUIStories from "./ChatUI.stories";
import { T } from "../T";

<Meta of={ChatUIStories} />

# ChatUI

<p
  style={{
    margin: "0 0 16px 0",
    fontSize: "18px",
    lineHeight: "28px",
    color: "#6c757d",
  }}
>
  <T k="doc.chatui_desc" />
</p>

## <T k="doc.subcomponents" />

<p><T k="doc.chatui_subcomponents" /></p>

<table>
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th><T k="doc.component" /></th>
      <th><T k="doc.description" /></th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>ChatContainer</strong></td>
      <td><T k="doc.chatui_c_container" /></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>ChatMessageList</strong></td>
      <td><T k="doc.chatui_c_list" /></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>ChatMessage</strong></td>
      <td><T k="doc.chatui_c_message" /></td>
    </tr>

Checkbox

components-selection-controls-checkbox · ./stories/Checkbox/Checkbox.stories.tsx
Checkbox component for boolean user input.
Prop types (react-docgen) 3 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/Checkbox/Checkbox.tsx::Checkbox
Props:
className?: string

indeterminate?: boolean = false

label?: string
Imports 
import { Checkbox } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Checkbox label={t("story.checkbox_accept")} />;
};
Checked story ok 
const Checked = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Checkbox
            checked
            label={t("story.checkbox_newsletter")}
            onChange={args.onChange ?? (() => {})} />
    );
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Checkbox disabled label={t("story.checkbox_disabled")} />;
};
Disabled Checked story ok 
const DisabledChecked = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Checkbox
            disabled
            checked
            label={t("story.checkbox_dis_checked")}
            onChange={args.onChange ?? (() => {})} />
    );
};
Indeterminate story ok 
const Indeterminate = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Checkbox
            indeterminate
            checked
            label={t("story.checkbox_indeterminate")}
            onChange={args.onChange ?? (() => {})} />
    );
};
Controlled story ok 
const Controlled = () => {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  const [checked, setChecked] = useState(false);
  return (
    <Checkbox
      label={`${t("story.checkbox_controlled")}: ${
        checked ? t("story.checkbox_on") : t("story.checkbox_off")
      }`}
      checked={checked}
      onChange={(e) => setChecked(e.target.checked)}
    />
  );
};
Long Label story ok 
const LongLabel = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Checkbox label={t("story.checkbox_long_label")} />;
};
Docs doc ok

CheckboxGroup

components-selection-controls-checkboxgroup · ./stories/CheckboxGroup/CheckboxGroup.stories.tsx
CheckboxGroup component to manage multiple checkboxes.
Prop types (react-docgen) 11 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/CheckboxGroup/CheckboxGroup.tsx::CheckboxGroup
Props:
className?: string

defaultValue?: string[] = []

direction?: "vertical" | "horizontal" = "vertical"

disabled?: boolean

error?: string

label?: string

name?: string

onChange?: (value: string[]) => void

options: Option[]

required?: boolean

value?: string[]
Imports 
import { CheckboxGroup } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const options = useOptions();
    return <CheckboxGroup options={options} defaultValue={["banana"]} />;
};
Horizontal story ok 
const Horizontal = () => {
    const options = useOptions();

    return (
        <CheckboxGroup
            options={options}
            direction="horizontal"
            defaultValue={["apple", "cherry"]} />
    );
};
Controlled story ok 
const Controlled = () => {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  const options = useOptions();
  const [value, setValue] = useState<string[]>(["apple"]);
  return (
    <div>
      <div style={{ marginBottom: "1rem" }}>
        {t("story.checkboxgroup_selected")}: {value.join(", ")}
      </div>
      <CheckboxGroup options={options} value={value} onChange={setValue} />
    </div>
  );
};
Long Label story ok 
const LongLabel = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <CheckboxGroup
            options={[
              {
                label: t("story.checkbox_long_label"),
                value: "long1",
              },
              {
                label: t("story.checkbox_long_label"), // Reusing similar text
                value: "long2",
              },
            ]}
            defaultValue={["long1"]} />
    );
};

Chip

components-selection-controls-chip · ./stories/Chip/Chip.stories.tsx
Data Display/Chip Component
Prop types (react-docgen) 11 prop types 
Component: src/components/data-display/Chip/Chip.tsx::Chip
Props:
/**
 * アバター（画像や頭文字など）
 */
avatar?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * 表示するコンテンツ
 */
children?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * 追加のクラス名
 */
className?: string

/**
 * 無効状態
 */
disabled?: boolean = false

/**
 * アイコン
 */
icon?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * クリック時のイベント。提供されるとボタンとして動作します。
 */
onClick?: (e: React.MouseEvent) => void

/**
 * 削除時のイベント。提供されると×ボタンが表示されます。
 */
onDelete?: (e: React.SyntheticEvent) => void

/**
 * 選択状態
 */
selected?: boolean = false

/**
 * サイズ
 */
size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg" = "md"

/**
 * ステータス
 */
status?: | "primary"
| "secondary"
| "success"
| "warning"
| "error"
| "info"
| "neutral" = "primary"

/**
 * バリアント
 */
variant?: "solid" | "outline" | "subtle" = "solid"
Imports 
import { Avatar, Chip, Icon } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Chip>{t("story.chip_default")}</Chip>;
};
Clickable story ok 
const Clickable = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Chip onClick={(e: React.MouseEvent) => console.log("Chip clicked", e)}>
            {t("story.chip_clickable")}
        </Chip>
    );
};
Deletable story ok 
const Deletable = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Chip onDelete={(e: React.SyntheticEvent) => console.log("Chip deleted", e)}>
            {t("story.chip_deletable")}
        </Chip>
    );
};
With Avatar story ok 
const WithAvatar = () => {
    return <Chip avatar={<Avatar initials="JD" size="sm" />}>Jane Doe</Chip>;
};
With Icon story ok 
const WithIcon = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Chip
            label={t("story.selectbox_opt4")}
            icon={<Icon name="CircleIcon" size="sm" />} />
    );
};
Selected story ok 
const Selected = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Chip selected={true} onClick={() => {}}>{t("story.chip_selected")}</Chip>;
};
Variants story ok 
const Variants = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "10px" }}>
            <Chip variant="solid" onClick={() => {}}>{t("story.chip_solid")}</Chip>
            <Chip variant="outline" onClick={() => {}}>{t("story.chip_outline")}</Chip>
            <Chip variant="outline" selected onClick={() => {}}>
                {t("story.chip_selected_label")}
            </Chip>
        </div>
    );
};
Docs doc ok

Code

components-typography-icons-code · ./stories/Code/Code.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 5 prop types 
Component: src/components/typography/Code/Code.tsx::Code
Props:
block?: boolean = false

children?: React.ReactNode

className?: string

code?: string

language?: string
Imports 
import { Code } from "wimui";
Inline story ok 
const Inline = () => <Code block={false}>const x = 10;</Code>;
Block story ok 
const Block = () => <Code block language="javascript">{`function helloWorld() {
  console.log("Hello, world!");
}`}</Code>;
Long Content story ok 
const LongContent = () => <Code block language="tsx">{`import React from "react";

// export を含む文字列が Indexing エラーの原因になる可能性があるため、コメントアウトなどで回避
// export const Example = () => {
const Example = () => {
    return (
        <div>
            <h1>Hello World</h1>
            <p>This is a long code block to test scrolling behavior.</p>
        </div>
    );
};`}</Code>;
Docs doc ok

## <T k="doc.usage" />

```tsx
import { Code } from "./Code";
import { T } from "../T";

const Example = () => (
  <>
    {/* Inline */}
    <Code>npm install wimui</Code>

    {/* Block */}
    <Code block language="bash">
      npm install wimui
    </Code>
  </>
);
```

ColorInput

components-pickers-sliders-colorinput · ./stories/ColorInput/ColorInput.stories.tsx
カラー選択に特化した入力コンポーネント。
Imports 
import { ColorInput, Label } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.colorinput_default")}>
            <ColorInput defaultValue="#0052cc" />
        </Label>
    );
};
With Icon story ok 
const WithIcon = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.colorinput_icon")}>
            <ColorInput defaultValue="#3b82f6" leftIcon="ImageIcon" />
        </Label>
    );
};
Custom States story ok 
const CustomStates = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.colorinput_states")}>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "1rem" }}>
                <ColorInput status="default" defaultValue="#10b981" leftIcon="CheckCircleIcon" />
                <ColorInput status="error" defaultValue="#ef4444" leftIcon="AlertCircleIcon" />
                <ColorInput disabled defaultValue="#6b7280" leftIcon="SettingsIcon" />
            </div>
        </Label>
    );
};
Docs doc ok

variant?: any = "outline"
Imports 
import { ColorPicker, Label } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.colorpicker_label")}>
            <ColorPicker defaultValue="#3b82f6" />
        </Label>
    );
};
Outline story ok 
const Outline = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.colorpicker_outline")}>
            <ColorPicker defaultValue="#10b981" variant="outline" />
        </Label>
    );
};
Ghost story ok 
const Ghost = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.colorpicker_ghost")}>
            <ColorPicker defaultValue="#f59e0b" variant="ghost" />
        </Label>
    );
};
Error Status story ok 
const ErrorStatus = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.colorpicker_error")}>
            <ColorPicker defaultValue="#ef4444" status="error" />
        </Label>
    );
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.colorpicker_disabled")}>
            <ColorPicker defaultValue="#6b7280" disabled />
        </Label>
    );
};
Full Width story ok 
const FullWidth = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.colorpicker_fullwidth")} style={{ width: "100%" }}>
            <ColorPicker defaultValue="#8b5cf6" fullWidth />
        </Label>
    );
};

Prop types (react-docgen) 13 prop types

Props:
allowClear?: boolean = true

className?: string

defaultValue?: string = ""

disabled?: boolean = false

error?: string

id?: string

label?: string

layout?: "vertical" | "horizontal"

onSelect?: (option: ComboboxOption) => void

required?: boolean

Imports 
import { Combobox } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const sampleOptions = useSampleOptions();

    return (
        <Combobox
            disabled={false}
            label={t("story.combobox_label")}
            options={sampleOptions}
            placeholder={t("story.combobox_placeholder")} />
    );
};
With Icon story ok 
const WithIcon = () => <Combobox disabled={false} showSearchIcon />;
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => <Combobox disabled />;

## <T k="doc.usage" />

### <T k="doc.commandpalette_usage_1" />

```tsx
<CommandPalette>
  <CommandPaletteTrigger>
    <span>Open Command</span>
    <kbd>K</kbd>
  </CommandPaletteTrigger>

  <CommandPaletteContent>
    <CommandPaletteInput />
    <CommandPaletteList>
      <CommandPaletteItem onSelect={() => {}}>Action 1</CommandPaletteItem>
    </CommandPaletteList>
  </CommandPaletteContent>
</CommandPalette>
```

### <T k="doc.commandpalette_usage_2" />

```tsx
const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);

return (
  <>
    <button onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>Open</button>
    <CommandPalette open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
      <CommandPaletteContent>{/* ... */}</CommandPaletteContent>
    </CommandPalette>
  </>
);
```

Container

components-layout-container · ./stories/Container/Container.stories.tsx
Container component is used to center content horizontally and limit its maximum width.
Prop types (react-docgen) 24 prop types 
Component: src/components/layout/Container/Container.tsx::Container
Props:
/**
 * The component used for the root node. Either a string to use a HTML element or a component.
 */
as?: C

/**
 * Background color
 */
bg?: T | (string & {})

/**
 * Display
 */
display?: React.CSSProperties["display"]

/**
 * Whether the container should be fluid (100% width)
 */
fluid?: boolean = false

/**
 * Height
 */
h?: | T
| {
    base?: T;
    sm?: T;
    md?: T;
    lg?: T;
    xl?: T;
  }

/**
 * Margin
 */
m?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin bottom
 */
mb?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin left
 */
ml?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin right
 */
mr?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin top
 */
mt?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin horizontal
 */
mx?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin vertical
 */
my?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding
 */
p?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding bottom
 */
pb?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding left
 */
pl?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Position
 */
position?: React.CSSProperties["position"]

/**
 * Padding right
 */
pr?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding top
 */
pt?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding horizontal
 */
px?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding vertical
 */
py?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Border radius
 */
radius?: number | WimRadius

/**
 * Box shadow
 */
shadow?: T | (string & {})

/**
 * Container max-width
 */
size?: "xs" | "sm" | "md" | "lg" | "xl" | number | string = "lg"

/**
 * Width
 */
w?: | T
| {
    base?: T;
    sm?: T;
    md?: T;
    lg?: T;
    xl?: T;
  }
Imports 
import { Box, Container } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Container bg="#f9f9f9">
            <Box bg="#f0f0f0" p={20} style={{ border: "1px solid #ccc" }}>
                {t("story.container_content")}
            </Box>
        </Container>
    );
};
Sizes story ok 
const Sizes = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "20px" }}>
      {(["xs", "sm", "md", "lg", "xl"] as const).map((size) => (
        <Container key={size} size={size} bg="#f8fafc" p={10}>
          <Box
            bg="#eff6ff"
            p={10}
            style={{ textAlign: "center", border: "1px dashed #3b82f6" }}
          >
            {t("story.container_size")}: {size}
          </Box>
        </Container>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
};
Fluid story ok 
const Fluid = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Container bg="#f8fafc" fluid>
            <Box
                bg="#eff6ff"
                p={20}
                style={{ textAlign: "center", border: "1px dashed #3b82f6" }}>
                {t("story.container_fluid")}
            </Box>
        </Container>
    );
};

ContextMenu

components-overlays-contextmenu · ./stories/ContextMenu/ContextMenu.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 4 prop types 
Component: src/components/overlay/ContextMenu/ContextMenu.tsx::ContextMenu
Props:
children: ReactNode

className?: string

/**
 * Disable the context menu
 */
disabled?: boolean = false

/**
 * Menu items to display in the context menu
 */
menu: ReactNode
Imports 
import { ContextMenu, ContextMenuDivider, ContextMenuGroup, ContextMenuItem, Icon } from "wimui";
Basic story ok 
const Basic = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <ContextMenu
            disabled={false}
            menu={
              <>
                <ContextMenuItem onClick={() => console.log("Edit clicked")}>
                  {t("story.contextmenu_edit")}
                </ContextMenuItem>
                <ContextMenuItem onClick={() => console.log("Copy clicked")}>
                  {t("story.contextmenu_copy")}
                </ContextMenuItem>
                <ContextMenuItem onClick={() => console.log("Paste clicked")}>
                  {t("story.contextmenu_paste")}
                </ContextMenuItem>
                <ContextMenuDivider />
                <ContextMenuItem
                  onClick={() => console.log("Delete clicked")}
                  danger
                >
                  {t("story.contextmenu_delete")}
                </ContextMenuItem>
              </>
            }>
            <div
                style={{
                  padding: "60px 100px",
                  backgroundColor: "#f0f0f0",
                  border: "2px dashed #ccc",
                  borderRadius: "8px",
                  textAlign: "center",
                  cursor: "pointer",
                }}>
                {t("story.contextmenu_right_click")}
            </div>
        </ContextMenu>
    );
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <ContextMenu
            disabled
            menu={
              <>
                <ContextMenuItem>{t("story.contextmenu_edit")}</ContextMenuItem>
                <ContextMenuItem>{t("story.contextmenu_copy")}</ContextMenuItem>
                <ContextMenuItem>{t("story.contextmenu_paste")}</ContextMenuItem>
              </>
            }>
            <div
                style={{
                  padding: "60px 100px",
                  backgroundColor: "#f0f0f0",
                  border: "2px dashed #ccc",
                  borderRadius: "8px",
                  textAlign: "center",
                  cursor: "pointer",
                }}>
                {t("story.contextmenu_disabled_menu")}
            </div>
        </ContextMenu>
    );
};
With Icons story ok 
const WithIcons = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <ContextMenu
            menu={
              <>
                <ContextMenuItem
                  icon={<Icon name="CheckIcon" size="sm" />}
                  onClick={() => console.log("Edit clicked")}
                >
                  {t("story.contextmenu_edit")}
                </ContextMenuItem>
                <ContextMenuItem
                  icon={<Icon name="CopyIcon" size="sm" />}
                  onClick={() => console.log("Copy clicked")}
                >
                  {t("story.contextmenu_copy")}
                </ContextMenuItem>
                <ContextMenuItem
                  icon={<Icon name="CheckIcon" size="sm" />}
                  onClick={() => console.log("Paste clicked")}
                >
                  {t("story.contextmenu_paste")}
                </ContextMenuItem>
                <ContextMenuDivider />
                <ContextMenuItem
                  icon={<Icon name="CloseIcon" size="sm" />}
                  onClick={() => console.log("Delete clicked")}
                  danger
                >
                  {t("story.contextmenu_delete")}
                </ContextMenuItem>
              </>
            }>
            <div
                style={{
                  padding: "60px 100px",
                  backgroundColor: "#e0f2fe",
                  border: "2px dashed #0ea5e9",
                  borderRadius: "8px",
                  textAlign: "center",
                  cursor: "pointer",
                }}>
                {t("story.contextmenu_with_icons")}
            </div>
        </ContextMenu>
    );
};
With Groups story ok 
const WithGroups = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <ContextMenu
            menu={
              <>
                <ContextMenuGroup title={t("story.contextmenu_edit_actions")}>
                  <ContextMenuItem>{t("story.contextmenu_cut")}</ContextMenuItem>
                  <ContextMenuItem>{t("story.contextmenu_copy")}</ContextMenuItem>
                  <ContextMenuItem>{t("story.contextmenu_paste")}</ContextMenuItem>
                </ContextMenuGroup>
                <ContextMenuDivider />
                <ContextMenuGroup title={t("story.contextmenu_file_actions")}>
                  <ContextMenuItem>{t("story.contextmenu_rename")}</ContextMenuItem>
                  <ContextMenuItem>{t("story.contextmenu_move")}</ContextMenuItem>
                  <ContextMenuItem danger>
                    {t("story.contextmenu_delete")}
                  </ContextMenuItem>
                </ContextMenuGroup>
              </>
            }>
            <div
                style={{
                  padding: "60px 100px",
                  backgroundColor: "#fef3c7",
                  border: "2px dashed #f59e0b",
                  borderRadius: "8px",
                  textAlign: "center",
                  cursor: "pointer",
                }}>
                {t("story.contextmenu_with_groups")}
            </div>
        </ContextMenu>
    );
};
With Disabled Items story ok 
const WithDisabledItems = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <ContextMenu
            menu={
              <>
                <ContextMenuItem>{t("story.contextmenu_cut")}</ContextMenuItem>
                <ContextMenuItem>{t("story.contextmenu_copy")}</ContextMenuItem>
                <ContextMenuItem disabled>
                  {t("story.contextmenu_paste")} (disabled)
                </ContextMenuItem>
                <ContextMenuDivider />
                <ContextMenuItem>{t("story.contextmenu_select_all")}</ContextMenuItem>
              </>
            }>
            <div
                style={{
                  padding: "60px 100px",
                  backgroundColor: "#dcfce7",
                  border: "2px dashed #22c55e",
                  borderRadius: "8px",
                  textAlign: "center",
                  cursor: "pointer",
                }}>
                {t("story.contextmenu_disabled")}
            </div>
        </ContextMenu>
    );
};
On Image story ok 
const OnImage = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <ContextMenu
            menu={
              <>
                <ContextMenuItem icon={<Icon name="CheckIcon" size="sm" />}>
                  {t("story.contextmenu_open_new_tab")}
                </ContextMenuItem>
                <ContextMenuItem icon={<Icon name="CopyIcon" size="sm" />}>
                  {t("story.contextmenu_copy_image")}
                </ContextMenuItem>
                <ContextMenuItem icon={<Icon name="CopyIcon" size="sm" />}>
                  {t("story.contextmenu_copy_image_address")}
                </ContextMenuItem>
                <ContextMenuDivider />
                <ContextMenuItem icon={<Icon name="CheckIcon" size="sm" />}>
                  {t("story.contextmenu_save_image_as")}
                </ContextMenuItem>
              </>
            }>
            <div
                style={{
                  width: "300px",
                  height: "200px",
                  background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%)",
                  borderRadius: "8px",
                  display: "flex",
                  alignItems: "center",
                  justifyContent: "center",
                  color: "white",
                  fontSize: "18px",
                  fontWeight: "bold",
                  cursor: "pointer",
                }}>
                {t("story.contextmenu_on_image")}
            </div>
        </ContextMenu>
    );
};

## <T k="doc.usage" />

```tsx
import { ContextMenu, ContextMenuItem, ContextMenuDivider } from "wimui";

<ContextMenu
  menu={
    <>
      <ContextMenuItem onClick={handleEdit}>Edit</ContextMenuItem>
      <ContextMenuItem onClick={handleCopy}>Copy</ContextMenuItem>
      <ContextMenuDivider />
      <ContextMenuItem danger onClick={handleDelete}>
        Delete
      </ContextMenuItem>
    </>
  }
>
  <div>Right-click this element</div>
</ContextMenu>;
```

<Primary />

DataGrid

components-data-structures-datagrid · ./stories/DataGrid/DataGrid.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 21 prop types 
Component: src/components/data-display/DataGrid/DataGrid.tsx::DataGrid
Props:
/**
 * Accessibility label for selecting all rows
 */
a11y_select_all_rows?: string

/**
 * Whether to show borders
 */
bordered?: boolean = false

/**
 * Additional class name
 */
className?: string

/**
 * Column definitions
 */
columns: DataGridColumn<T>[]

/**
 * Message to show when data is empty
 */
emptyMessage?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * Fixed height for the grid
 */
height?: string | number

/**
 * Whether to highlight rows on hover
 */
hoverable?: boolean = true

/**
 * Loading state
 */
loading?: boolean = false

/**
 * Infinite scroll / load more configuration
 */
loadMore?: {
  onLoadMore: () => void;
  hasMore: boolean;
  loading: boolean;
  threshold?: number;
}

/**
 * Maximum height for the grid
 */
maxHeight?: string | number

/**
 * Mobile view: Switch to card layout
 */
mobileCard?: boolean = false

/**
 * Callback when selection changes
 */
onSelectionChange?: (selectedRowKeys: React.Key[]) => void

/**
 * Callback when sorting changes
 */
onSort?: (key: string, direction: "asc" | "desc" | "none") => void

/**
 * Pagination configuration
 */
pagination?: {
  total: number;
  pageSize: number;
  current: number;
  onPageChange: (page: number) => void;
}

/**
 * Unique key for each row
 */
rowKey?: keyof T | ((row: T) => React.Key) = "id"

/**
 * Data rows
 */
rows: T[]

/**
 * Array of selected row keys
 */
selectedRowKeys?: React.Key[] = []

/**
 * Whether to show selection checkboxes
 */
selection?: boolean = false

/**
 * Current sort configuration
 */
sortConfig?: { key: string; direction: "asc" | "desc" | "none" }

/**
 * Whether the header is sticky
 */
stickyHeader?: boolean = false

/**
 * Whether to show striped rows
 */
striped?: boolean = false
Imports 
import { Badge, Button, DataGrid, Icon } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = (args: any) => {
  const { tColumns, tSampleData } = useDataGridTranslations();
  const rows = tSampleData;
  return <DataGrid {...(args as DataGridProps<Record<string, unknown>>)} columns={tColumns} rows={rows} />;
};
With Selection story ok 
const WithSelection = () => {
  const { t, tColumns, tSampleData } = useDataGridTranslations();
  const [selectedRowKeys, setSelectedRowKeys] = React.useState<React.Key[]>([]);
  return (
    <div>
      <p style={{ marginBottom: "16px" }}>
        {t('story.datagrid_selected')}{selectedRowKeys.join(", ")}
      </p>
      <DataGrid
        columns={tColumns}
        rows={tSampleData}
        selection
        selectedRowKeys={selectedRowKeys}
        onSelectionChange={setSelectedRowKeys}
        bordered
      />
    </div>
  );
};
With Sorting story ok 
const WithSorting = () => {
  const { tColumns } = useDataGridTranslations();
  const [sortConfig, setSortConfig] = React.useState<{
    key: string;
    direction: "asc" | "desc" | "none";
  }>({
    key: "id",
    direction: "none",
  });
  const [data, setData] = React.useState(sampleData);

  const handleSort = (key: string, direction: "asc" | "desc" | "none") => {
    setSortConfig({ key, direction });

    if (direction === "none") {
      setData(sampleData);
    } else {
      const sortedData = [...data].sort((a, b) => {
        const aValue = (a as unknown as Record<string, unknown>)[key];
        const bValue = (b as unknown as Record<string, unknown>)[key];
        if (String(aValue) < String(bValue)) return direction === "asc" ? -1 : 1;
        if (String(aValue) > String(bValue)) return direction === "asc" ? 1 : -1;
        return 0;
      });
      setData(sortedData);
    }
  };

  return (
    <DataGrid
      columns={tColumns}
      rows={data as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[]}
      sortConfig={sortConfig}
      onSort={handleSort}
      bordered
    />
  );
};
With Pagination story ok 
const WithPagination = () => {
  const { tColumns } = useDataGridTranslations();
  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = React.useState(1);
  const pageSize = 10;
  const startIndex = (currentPage - 1) * pageSize;
  const endIndex = startIndex + pageSize;
  const currentData = manyRows.slice(startIndex, endIndex);

  return (
    <DataGrid
      columns={tColumns}
      rows={currentData as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[]}
      pagination={{
        total: manyRows.length,
        pageSize,
        current: currentPage,
        onPageChange: setCurrentPage,
      }}
      bordered
    />
  );
};
With Actions story ok 
const WithActions = () => {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  const columns = [
    {
      key: "id",
      header: t("story.datagrid_col_id"),
      width: 55,
      fixed: true,
    },
    {
      key: "name",
      header: t("story.datagrid_col_name"),
      width: 150,
      fixed: false,
    },
    {
      key: "email",
      header: t("story.datagrid_col_email"),
      width: 200,
    },
    {
      key: "actions",
      header: t("story.datagrid_col_actions"),
      width: 100,
      render: (_: unknown, row: Record<string, unknown>) => (
        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "8px" }}>
          <Button
            size="sm"
            variant="ghost"
            onClick={() =>
              alert(t("story.datagrid_action_edit", { name: row.name }))
            }
          >
            <Icon name="EditIcon" size="sm" />
          </Button>
          { }
          <Button
            size="sm"
            variant="ghost"
            intent="destructive"
            onClick={() =>
              alert(t("story.datagrid_action_delete", { name: row.name }))
            }
          >
            <Icon name="TrashIcon" size="sm" />
          </Button>
        </div>
      ),
    },
  ];
  return <DataGrid columns={columns} rows={sampleData as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[]} bordered />;
};
Loading story ok 
const Loading = (args: any) => {
  const { tColumns, tSampleData } = useDataGridTranslations();
  const rows = tSampleData;
  return <DataGrid {...(args as DataGridProps<Record<string, unknown>>)} columns={tColumns} rows={rows} />;
};
Empty story ok 
const Empty = (args: any) => {
  const { t, tColumns, tSampleData } = useDataGridTranslations();
  const rows = tSampleData;
  return <DataGrid {...(args as DataGridProps<Record<string, unknown>>)} columns={tColumns} rows={rows} emptyMessage={t('story.datagrid_empty')} />;
};
Striped story ok 
const Striped = (args: any) => {
  const { tColumns, tSampleData } = useDataGridTranslations();
  const rows = tSampleData;
  return <DataGrid {...(args as DataGridProps<Record<string, unknown>>)} columns={tColumns} rows={rows} />;
};
Bordered story ok 
const Bordered = (args: any) => {
  const { tColumns, tSampleData } = useDataGridTranslations();
  const rows = tSampleData;
  return <DataGrid {...(args as DataGridProps<Record<string, unknown>>)} columns={tColumns} rows={rows} />;
};
Sticky Header story ok 
const StickyHeader = (args: any) => {
  const { tColumns } = useDataGridTranslations();
  const rows = manyRows as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[];
  return <DataGrid {...(args as DataGridProps<Record<string, unknown>>)} columns={tColumns} rows={rows} />;
};
Full Featured story ok 
const FullFeatured = () => {
  const { tColumns } = useDataGridTranslations();
  const [selectedRowKeys, setSelectedRowKeys] = React.useState<React.Key[]>([]);
  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = React.useState(1);
  const [sortConfig, setSortConfig] = React.useState<{
    key: string;
    direction: "asc" | "desc" | "none";
  }>({
    key: "id",
    direction: "none",
  });
  const [data, setData] = React.useState(manyRows);

  const handleSort = (key: string, direction: "asc" | "desc" | "none") => {
    setSortConfig({ key, direction });

    if (direction === "none") {
      setData(manyRows);
    } else {
      const sortedData = [...data].sort((a, b) => {
        const aValue = (a as unknown as Record<string, unknown>)[key];
        const bValue = (b as unknown as Record<string, unknown>)[key];
        if (String(aValue) < String(bValue)) return direction === "asc" ? -1 : 1;
        if (String(aValue) > String(bValue)) return direction === "asc" ? 1 : -1;
        return 0;
      });
      setData(sortedData);
    }
  };

  const pageSize = 10;
  const startIndex = (currentPage - 1) * pageSize;
  const endIndex = startIndex + pageSize;
  const currentData = data.slice(startIndex, endIndex);

  return (
    <div>
      <DataGrid
        columns={tColumns}
        rows={currentData as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[]}
        selection
        selectedRowKeys={selectedRowKeys}
        onSelectionChange={setSelectedRowKeys}
        sortConfig={sortConfig}
        onSort={handleSort}
        pagination={{
          total: data.length,
          pageSize,
          current: currentPage,
          onPageChange: setCurrentPage,
        }}
        striped
        hoverable
        bordered
      />
    </div>
  );
};
With Fixed Column story ok 
const WithFixedColumn = () => {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  const columns = [
    {
      key: "id",
      header: t("story.datagrid_col_id"),
      width: 55,
      fixed: true,
    },
    {
      key: "name",
      header: t("story.datagrid_col_name"),
      width: 150,
      fixed: false,
    },
    {
      key: "email",
      header: t("story.datagrid_col_email"),
      width: 200,
    },
    {
      key: "role",
      header: t("story.datagrid_col_role"),
      width: 100,
    },
    {
      key: "joinDate",
      header: t("story.datagrid_col_joinDate"),
      width: 150,
    },
    {
      key: "status",
      header: t("story.datagrid_col_status"),
      width: 100,
      render: (value: unknown) => {
        const translatedValue =
          value === "Active"
            ? t("story.datagrid_status_active")
            : value === "Inactive"
              ? t("story.datagrid_status_inactive")
              : t("story.datagrid_status_pending");
        return (
          <Badge
            content={translatedValue}
            size="sm"
            color={
              value === "Active"
                ? "primary"
                : value === "Inactive"
                  ? "neutral"
                  : "secondary"
            }
          />
        );
      },
    },
  ];
  return (
    <DataGrid columns={columns} rows={sampleData as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[]} selection bordered />
  );
};
With Right Fixed Column story ok 
const WithRightFixedColumn = () => {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  const columns = [
    {
      key: "id",
      header: t("story.datagrid_col_id"),
      width: 55,
    },
    {
      key: "name",
      header: t("story.datagrid_col_name"),
      width: 150,
    },
    {
      key: "email",
      header: t("story.datagrid_col_email"),
      width: 200,
    },
    {
      key: "role",
      header: t("story.datagrid_col_role"),
      width: 100,
    },
    {
      key: "joinDate",
      header: t("story.datagrid_col_joinDate"),
      width: 150,
    },
    {
      key: "actions",
      header: t("story.datagrid_col_actions"),
      width: 120,
      fixed: "right" as const,
      align: "center" as const,
      render: (_: unknown, _row: Record<string, unknown>) => (
        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "8px", justifyContent: "center" }}>
          <Button size="sm" variant="ghost">
            <Icon name="EditIcon" size="sm" />
          </Button>
          <Button size="sm" variant="ghost" intent="destructive">
            <Icon name="TrashIcon" size="sm" />
          </Button>
        </div>
      ),
    },
  ];
  return (
    <DataGrid columns={columns} rows={sampleData as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[]} selection bordered />
  );
};
Infinite Scroll story ok 
const InfiniteScroll = () => {
  const { tColumns } = useDataGridTranslations();
  const [data, setData] = React.useState(manyRows.slice(0, 15));
  const [loading, setLoading] = React.useState(false);
  const [hasMore, setHasMore] = React.useState(true);

  const loadMoreData = () => {
    if (loading) return;
    setLoading(true);
    
    // Simulate network request
    setTimeout(() => {
      const nextData = manyRows.slice(data.length, data.length + 15);
      setData((prev) => [...prev, ...nextData]);
      
      if (data.length + nextData.length >= manyRows.length) {
        setHasMore(false);
      }
      setLoading(false);
    }, 1000);
  };

  return (
    <DataGrid
      columns={tColumns}
      rows={data as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[]}
      bordered
      stickyHeader
      maxHeight="400px"
      loadMore={{
        onLoadMore: loadMoreData,
        hasMore,
        loading,
      }}
    />
  );
};
Docs doc ok

## <T k="doc.datagrid_usage_typescript" />

```tsx
import { DataGrid, DataGridColumn } from './DataGrid';

interface User {
  id: number;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  role: string;
}

const columns: DataGridColumn<User>[] = [
  { key: 'id', header: 'ID', width: 80, sortable: true },
  { key: 'name', header: 'Name', sortable: true },
  { key: 'email', header: 'Email', sortable: true },
  {
    key: 'role',
    header: 'Role',
    render: (value) => <Badge content={value} />
  },
];

function UserTable() {
  const [users, setUsers] = useState<User[]>([]);
  const [selectedKeys, setSelectedKeys] = useState<React.Key[]>([]);

  return (
    <DataGrid
      columns={columns}
      rows={users}
      selection
      selectedRowKeys={selectedKeys}
      onSelectionChange={setSelectedKeys}
    />
  );
}
```

DatePicker

components-pickers-sliders-datepicker · ./stories/DatePicker/DatePicker.stories.tsx
ユーザーが日付を選択するためのコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 16 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/DatePicker/DatePicker.tsx::DatePicker
Props:
/**
 * Show clear button
 */
clearable?: boolean = true

/**
 * Default date value (uncontrolled)
 */
defaultValue?: Date

/**
 * Disabled dates
 */
disabledDates?: Date[]

error?: string

/**
 * Date format for display (default: 'YYYY-MM-DD')
 */
format?: string = "YYYY-MM-DD"

fullWidth?: boolean = false

label?: string

layout?: "vertical" | "horizontal"

/**
 * Maximum selectable date
 */
maxDate?: Date

/**
 * Minimum selectable date
 */
minDate?: Date

/**
 * Callback when date changes
 */
onChange?: (date: Date | null) => void

/**
 * Placeholder text
 */
placeholder?: string

required?: boolean

status?: "default" | "error" | "warning" | "success" = "default"

/**
 * Selected date value
 */
value?: Date

variant?: "outline" | "ghost" = "outline"
Imports 
import { DatePicker, Label } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.datepicker_select")}>
            <DatePicker />
        </Label>
    );
};
Outline story ok 
const Outline = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.datepicker_outline")}>
            <DatePicker variant="outline" />
        </Label>
    );
};
Ghost story ok 
const Ghost = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.datepicker_ghost")}>
            <DatePicker variant="ghost" />
        </Label>
    );
};
Error Status story ok 
const ErrorStatus = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.picker_error")}>
            <DatePicker status="error" />
        </Label>
    );
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.picker_disabled")}>
            <DatePicker disabled />
        </Label>
    );
};
Full Width story ok 
const FullWidth = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.picker_fullwidth")} style={{ width: "100%" }}>
            <DatePicker fullWidth />
        </Label>
    );
};

## <T k="doc.basic_usage" />

```tsx
import { DatePicker } from "@/components/form/DatePicker/DatePicker";

<DatePicker onChange={(date) => console.log(date)} placeholder="Select date" />;
```

## <T k="doc.datepicker_ts" />
<p><T k="doc.datepicker_ts_desc" /></p>

```tsx
<DatePicker
  value={new Date()}
  onChange={(date: Date | null) => {
    if (date) {
      console.log(date.toISOString());
    }
  }}
  format="YYYY-MM-DD"
  clearable
/>;
```

components-pickers-sliders-daterangepicker · ./stories/DateRangePicker/DateRangePicker.stories.tsx
ユーザーが日付の範囲（開始日・終了日）を選択するためのコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 7 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/DateRangePicker/DateRangePicker.tsx::DateRangePicker
Props:
className?: string

endProps?: React.ComponentProps<typeof DatePicker>

error?: string

label?: string

layout?: "vertical" | "horizontal" = "vertical"

required?: boolean

startProps?: React.ComponentProps<typeof DatePicker>
Imports 
import { DateRangePicker } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <DateRangePicker
            startProps={{
              placeholder: t("story.daterangepicker_start"),
              ...args.startProps,
            }}
            endProps={{
              placeholder: t("story.daterangepicker_end"),
              ...args.endProps,
            }} />
    );
};

components-overlays-dialog · ./stories/Dialog/Dialog.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 4 prop types 
Component: src/components/overlay/Dialog/Dialog.tsx::Dialog
Props:
children: React.ReactNode

defaultOpen?: boolean = false

onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void

open?: boolean
Imports 
import {
    Button,
    Dialog,
    DialogClose,
    DialogContent,
    DialogDescription,
    DialogFooter,
    DialogHeader,
    DialogTitle,
    DialogTrigger,
    Input,
    Label,
} from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Dialog>
            <DialogTrigger asChild>
                <Button variant="filled" label={t("story.dialog_open")} />
            </DialogTrigger>
            <DialogContent>
                <DialogHeader>
                    <DialogTitle>{t("story.dialog_edit_title")}</DialogTitle>
                    <DialogDescription>{t("story.dialog_edit_desc")}</DialogDescription>
                </DialogHeader>
                <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: "1.5rem", padding: "1rem 0" }}>
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "0.5rem" }}>
                        <Label htmlFor="name" label={t("story.dialog_name")} />
                        <Input id="name" defaultValue="Pedro Duarte" fullWidth />
                    </div>
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "0.5rem" }}>
                        <Label htmlFor="username" label={t("story.dialog_username")} />
                        <Input id="username" defaultValue="@peduarte" fullWidth />
                    </div>
                </div>
                <DialogFooter>
                    <DialogClose asChild>
                        <Button variant="outlined" label={t("story.dialog_cancel")} />
                    </DialogClose>
                    <Button variant="filled" label={t("story.dialog_save")} />
                </DialogFooter>
            </DialogContent>
        </Dialog>
    );
};
Uncontrolled story ok 
const Uncontrolled = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <Dialog>
      <DialogTrigger asChild>
        <Button
          variant="outlined"
          label={t("story.dialog_uncontrolled")}

        />
      </DialogTrigger>
      <DialogContent>
        <DialogHeader>
          <DialogTitle>{t("story.dialog_uncontrolled_title")}</DialogTitle>
          <DialogDescription>
            {t("story.dialog_uncontrolled_desc")}
          </DialogDescription>
        </DialogHeader>
        <p>{t("story.dialog_uncontrolled_body")}</p>
        <DialogFooter>
          <DialogClose asChild>
            <Button
              variant="outlined"
              label={t("story.dialog_cancel")}

            />
          </DialogClose>
          <Button
            variant="filled"
            label={t("story.dialog_confirm")}
            onClick={() => alert(t("story.dialog_confirmed_msg"))}

          />
        </DialogFooter>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  );
};
Controlled story ok 
const Controlled = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <div
      style={{
        display: "flex",
        flexDirection: "column",
        gap: "1rem",
        alignItems: "center",
      }}
    >
      <p>
        {t("story.dialog_curr_state")}: {open ? t("story.dialog_open_state") : t("story.dialog_closed_state")}
      </p>
      <Button
        variant="filled"
        label={t("story.dialog_state_open")}
        onClick={() => setOpen(true)}

      />

      <Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
        <DialogContent>
          <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle>{t("story.dialog_controlled_title")}</DialogTitle>
            <DialogDescription>
              {t("story.dialog_controlled_desc")}
            </DialogDescription>
          </DialogHeader>
          <p>{t("story.dialog_controlled_body")}</p>
          <DialogFooter>
            <Button
              variant="outlined"
              label={t("story.dialog_cancel")}
              onClick={() => setOpen(false)}

            />
            <Button
              variant="filled"
              label={t("story.dialog_state_close")}
              onClick={() => setOpen(false)}

            />
          </DialogFooter>
        </DialogContent>
      </Dialog>
    </div>
  );
};
Docs doc ok

import {
    Button,
    Drawer,
    DrawerClose,
    DrawerContent,
    DrawerDescription,
    DrawerFooter,
    DrawerHeader,
    DrawerTitle,
    DrawerTrigger,
} from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Drawer side="right">
            <DrawerTrigger asChild>
                <Button variant="filled" label={t("story.drawer_open_right")} />
            </DrawerTrigger>
            <DrawerContent>
                <DrawerHeader>
                    <DrawerTitle>{t("story.drawer_title")}</DrawerTitle>
                    <DrawerDescription>{t("story.drawer_desc")}</DrawerDescription>
                </DrawerHeader>
                <div style={{ padding: "20px" }}>
                    <p>{t("story.drawer_body1")}</p>
                    <p>{t("story.drawer_body2")}</p>
                </div>
                <DrawerFooter>
                    <DrawerClose asChild>
                        <Button variant="outlined" label={t("story.dialog_cancel")} />
                    </DrawerClose>
                    <Button variant="filled" label={t("story.drawer_confirm")} />
                </DrawerFooter>
            </DrawerContent>
        </Drawer>
    );
};
Left story ok 
const Left = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Drawer side="left">
            <DrawerTrigger asChild>

            </DrawerTrigger>

                    <DrawerTitle>{t("story.drawer_left_title")}</DrawerTitle>

                    <p>{t("story.drawer_left_body")}</p>
                </div>

                    <DrawerClose asChild>
                        <Button variant="outlined" label={t("story.dialog_cancel")} />
                    </DrawerClose>
                </DrawerFooter>
            </DrawerContent>
        </Drawer>
    );
};

Controlled story ok 
const Controlled = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <div
      style={{
        display: "flex",
        flexDirection: "column",
        gap: "1rem",
        alignItems: "center",
      }}
    >
      <p>
        {t("story.dialog_curr_state")}: {open ? "Open" : "Closed"}
      </p>
      <Button
        variant="filled"
        label={t("story.dialog_state_open")}
        onClick={() => setOpen(true)}
      />

      <Drawer open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
        <DrawerContent>
          <DrawerHeader>
            <DrawerTitle>{t("story.drawer_controlled_title")}</DrawerTitle>
            <DrawerDescription>
              {t("story.dialog_controlled_desc")}
            </DrawerDescription>
          </DrawerHeader>
          <div style={{ padding: "20px" }}>
            <p>{t("story.dialog_controlled_body")}</p>
          </div>
          <DrawerFooter>
            <Button
              variant="outlined"
              label={t("story.dialog_cancel")}
              onClick={() => setOpen(false)}
            />
            <Button
              variant="filled"
              label={t("story.dialog_state_close")}
              onClick={() => setOpen(false)}
            />
          </DrawerFooter>
        </DrawerContent>
      </Drawer>
    </div>
  );
};
Without Slide story ok 
const WithoutSlide = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Drawer side="right" slideIn={false} slideOut={false}>
            <DrawerTrigger asChild>
                <Button variant="filled" label={t("story.drawer_open_no_slide")} />
            </DrawerTrigger>
            <DrawerContent>
                <DrawerHeader>
                    <DrawerTitle>{t("story.drawer_no_slide_title")}</DrawerTitle>
                    <DrawerDescription>
                        {t("story.drawer_no_slide_desc")}
                    </DrawerDescription>
                </DrawerHeader>
                <div style={{ padding: "20px" }}>
                    <p>{t("story.drawer_no_slide_body")}</p>
                </div>
                <DrawerFooter>
                    <DrawerClose asChild>
                        <Button variant="outlined" label={t("story.dialog_cancel")} />
                    </DrawerClose>
                </DrawerFooter>
            </DrawerContent>
        </Drawer>
    );
};

children: ReactNode

className?: string
Imports 
import { Button, Dropdown, DropdownItem, DropdownMenu, DropdownTrigger, Icon } from "wimui";
Basic story ok 
const Basic = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Dropdown>
            <DropdownTrigger>
                <Button label={t("story.dropdown_open")} />
            </DropdownTrigger>
            <DropdownMenu>
                <DropdownItem onClick={() => console.log("Profile clicked")}>
                    {t("story.dropdown_profile")}
                </DropdownItem>
                <DropdownItem onClick={() => console.log("Settings clicked")}>
                    {t("story.dropdown_settings")}
                </DropdownItem>
                <DropdownItem onClick={() => console.log("Logout clicked")}>
                    {t("story.dropdown_logout")}
                </DropdownItem>
            </DropdownMenu>
        </Dropdown>
    );
};
With Icons story ok 
const WithIcons = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Dropdown>
            <DropdownTrigger>
                <Button variant="outlined" label={t("story.dropdown_options")} />
            </DropdownTrigger>
            <DropdownMenu>
                <DropdownItem>
                    <Icon name="CheckIcon" size="sm" /> {t("story.dropdown_edit")}
                </DropdownItem>
                <DropdownItem>
                    <Icon name="CopyIcon" size="sm" /> {t("story.dropdown_duplicate")}
                </DropdownItem>
                <DropdownItem disabled>
                    <Icon name="CloseIcon" size="sm" /> {t("story.dropdown_delete")}
                </DropdownItem>
            </DropdownMenu>
        </Dropdown>
    );
};
Alignment Right story ok 
const AlignmentRight = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ paddingLeft: "200px" }}>
            <Dropdown>
                <DropdownTrigger>
                    <Button label={t("story.dropdown_right_aligned")} />
                </DropdownTrigger>
                <DropdownMenu align="right">
                    <DropdownItem>
                        {t("story.dropdown_item")}1
                                    </DropdownItem>
                    <DropdownItem>
                        {t("story.dropdown_item")}2
                                    </DropdownItem>
                    <DropdownItem>
                        {t("story.dropdown_item")}3
                                    </DropdownItem>
                </DropdownMenu>
            </Dropdown>
        </div>
    );
};

Dropzone

components-advanced-inputs-dropzone · ./stories/Dropzone/Dropzone.stories.tsx
ユーザーがファイルをドラッグ＆ドロップまたはクリックでアップロードするためのコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 11 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/Dropzone/Dropzone.tsx::Dropzone
Props:
/**
 * 受け付けるファイル形式（例: ".jpg,.png"）。
 */
accept?: string

/**
 * 追加のクラス名。
 */
className?: string

/**
 * ドラッグ＆ドロップエリアに表示する説明テキスト。
 */
description?: string

/**
 * 無効状態にするかどうか。
 */
disabled?: boolean = false

/**
 * エラーメッセージ
 */
error?: string

/**
 * アイコンの名前。
 */
iconName?: React.ComponentProps<typeof Icon>["name"] = "UploadIcon"

/**
 * コンポーネントのラベル。
 */
label?: string

/**
 * レイアウト方向
 */
layout?: "vertical" | "horizontal" = "vertical"

/**
 * 複数のファイル選択を許可するかどうか。
 */
multiple?: boolean = false

/**
 * ファイルが選択された時に呼ばれるコールバック。
 */
onChange?: (files: FileList | null) => void

/**
 * 必須表示にするかどうか
 */
required?: boolean
Imports 
import { Dropzone } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Dropzone
            label={t("story.dropzone_label_file")}
            description={t("story.dropzone_default_desc")} />
    );
};
Multiple story ok 
const Multiple = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Dropzone
            label={t("story.dropzone_label_multi")}
            multiple={true}
            description={t("story.dropzone_desc_multi")} />
    );
};
Accept Images story ok 
const AcceptImages = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Dropzone
            label={t("story.dropzone_label_image_only")}
            accept="image/*"
            iconName="ImageIcon"
            description={t("story.dropzone_desc_image")} />
    );
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Dropzone
            label={t("story.dropzone_label_disabled")}
            disabled={true}
            description={t("story.dropzone_desc_disabled")} />
    );
};
Custom Icon story ok 
const CustomIcon = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (

            iconName="PdfIcon"
            accept=".pdf"

    );
};

components-data-indicators-emptystate · ./stories/EmptyState/EmptyState.stories.tsx
データが空の場合や、検索結果がない場合などに表示するプレースホルダーコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 5 prop types 
Component: src/components/data-display/EmptyState/EmptyState.tsx::EmptyState
Props:
/**
 * 表示する説明文（翻訳キーも可）。
 */
description?: string

/**
 * アクションとして表示する要素（ボタンなど）。
 */
extra?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * 表示するアイコン。
 */
icon?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * 表示するタイトル（翻訳キーも可）。
 */
title: string

/**
 * デザインバリエーション。
 */
variant?: "default" | "simple" = "default"
Imports 
import { Button, EmptyState, Icon } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <EmptyState
            title={t("story.emptystate_nodata_title")}
            description={t("story.emptystate_nodata_desc")}
            icon={<Icon name="SearchIcon" size="lg" />}
            extra={<Button label={t("story.emptystate_clear_search")} />} />
    );
};
Simple story ok 
const Simple = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <EmptyState
            title={t("story.emptystate_nomessages_title")}
            description={t("story.emptystate_nomessages_desc")}
            variant="simple" />
    );
};
Without Description story ok 
const WithoutDescription = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <EmptyState
            title={t("story.emptystate_empty_list")}
            icon={<Icon name="CircleIcon" size="lg" />} />
    );
};
Custom Action story ok 
const CustomAction = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <EmptyState
            title={t("story.emptystate_ready_title")}
            description={t("story.emptystate_ready_desc")}
            icon={<Icon name="PlusIcon" style={{ width: 48, height: 48 }} />}
            extra={
              <>
                <Button label={t("story.emptystate_browse_templates")} variant="outlined" />
                <Button label={t("story.emptystate_create_project")} variant="filled" />
              </>
            } />
    );
};
No Messages story ok 
const NoMessages = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (

            description={t("story.emptystate_noemails_desc")}

};

const NoVideos = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

const NoFiles = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <EmptyState
            title={t("story.emptystate_nofiles_title")}
            description={t("story.emptystate_nofiles_desc")}
            icon={<Icon name="DocumentIcon" size="lg" />} />
    );
};

ErrorBoundary

components-utilities-errorboundary · ./stories/ErrorBoundary/ErrorBoundary.stories.tsx
JavaScriptのエラーをキャッチしてフォールバックUIを表示する標準のReactエラー境界コンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 4 prop types 
Component: src/components/feedback/ErrorBoundary/ErrorBoundary.tsx::ErrorBoundary
Props:
/**
 * 子要素。
 */
children: ReactNode

/**
 * エラーが発生した時に表示されるコンポーネントまたは要素。
 * 関数が渡された場合は (error, errorInfo, reset) => ReactNode として呼び出されます。
 */
fallback?: | ReactNode
| ((error: Error, errorInfo: ErrorInfo | null, reset: () => void) => ReactNode)

/**
 * エラーが発生した時に呼び出されるコールバック。
 */
onError?: (error: Error, errorInfo: ErrorInfo) => void

/**
 * エラーがリセットされた時に呼び出されるコールバック。
 */
onReset?: () => void
Imports 
import { Alert, Button, Container, ErrorBoundary, Stack } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = function Render() {
  const [shouldThrow, setShouldThrow] = useState(false);
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <Container size="sm" py="xl">
      <Stack align="center" gap="lg">
        <p>{t("story.errorboundary_desc")}</p>
        <Button
          onClick={() => setShouldThrow(true)}
          label={t("story.errorboundary_btn_trigger")}
          variant="filled"
        />
        <ErrorBoundary onReset={() => setShouldThrow(false)}>
          {shouldThrow ? (
            <BuggyComponent />
          ) : (
            <Alert status="info" title={t("story.errorboundary_status_ok")} />
          )}
        </ErrorBoundary>
      </Stack>
    </Container>
  );
};
Custom Fallback story ok 
const CustomFallback = function Render() {
  const [shouldThrow, setShouldThrow] = useState(false);
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <Container size="sm" py="xl">
      <Stack align="center" gap="lg">
        <Button
          onClick={() => setShouldThrow(true)}
          label={t("story.errorboundary_btn_trigger_custom")}
          variant="filled"
        />
        <ErrorBoundary
          onReset={() => setShouldThrow(false)}
          fallback={(error, _info, reset) => (
            <Alert
              status="error"
              title={t("story.errorboundary_oops")}
              description={error.message}
            >
              <div style={{ marginTop: "1rem" }}>
                <Button
                  onClick={reset}
                  label={t("story.errorboundary_btn_reset")}
                  variant="outlined"
                  size="sm"
                />
              </div>
            </Alert>
          )}
        >
          {shouldThrow ? (
            <BuggyComponent />
          ) : (
            <Alert status="success" title={t("story.errorboundary_status_stable")} />
          )}
        </ErrorBoundary>
      </Stack>
    </Container>
  );
};

FAQSection

components-layout-faqsection · ./stories/FAQSection/FAQSection.stories.tsx
よくある質問 (FAQ)を表示するためのセクションコンポーネント。 既存のAccordionコンポーネントを活用して構築されています。
Prop types (react-docgen) 6 prop types 
Component: src/components/data-display/FAQSection/FAQSection.tsx::FAQSection
Props:
/**
 * 内部のAccordionコンポーネントに渡すProps。
 */
accordionProps?: Omit<AccordionProps, "children">

/**
 * 追加のクラス名。
 */
className?: string

/**
 * タイトルの下に表示される補足説明。
 */
description?: string

/**
 * FAQの各項目。
 */
items: FAQItem[]

/**
 * レイアウト。
 * - top: タイトルと説明をアコーディオンの上に配置。
 * - left: タイトルと説明を左側、アコーディオンを右側に配置 (デスクトップ以上)。
 */
layout?: "top" | "left" = "top"

/**
 * セクションのメインタイトル。
 */
title?: string
Imports 
import { FAQSection } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <FAQSection
    title="faq.section_default_title"
    description="faq.section_default_desc"
    items={mockItems}
    layout="top" />;
Layout Left story ok 
const LayoutLeft = () => <FAQSection layout="left" />;
Without Header story ok 
const WithoutHeader = () => <FAQSection items={mockItems} />;
Custom Accordion Props story ok 
const CustomAccordionProps = () => <FAQSection
    accordionProps={{
      type: "single",
    }} />;
