Imports 
import { CheckboxGroup, Fieldset, Input, Label, Legend } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Fieldset>
            <Legend label={t("story.fieldset_basic")} />
            <Label label={t("story.fieldset_name")}>
                <Input placeholder={t("story.fieldset_name_placeholder")} />
            </Label>
            <Label label={t("story.header_contact")}>
                <Input type="email" placeholder="example@wim.ui" />
            </Label>
        </Fieldset>
    );
};
With Checkbox Group story ok 
const WithCheckboxGroup = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Fieldset>
            <Legend label={t("story.fieldset_notif")} />
            <CheckboxGroup
                options={[
                  { label: t("story.fieldset_notif_email"), value: "email" },
                  { label: t("story.fieldset_notif_push"), value: "push" },
                  { label: t("story.fieldset_notif_sms"), value: "sms" },
                ]}
                defaultValue={["email"]} />
        </Fieldset>
    );
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Fieldset disabled>
            <Legend label={t("story.fieldset_disabled_sec")} />
            <Label label={t("story.fieldset_name")}>
                <Input placeholder={t("story.fieldset_disabled_placeholder")} />
            </Label>
            <CheckboxGroup
                options={[
                  { label: t("story.fieldset_opt1"), value: "1" },
                  { label: t("story.fieldset_opt2"), value: "2" },
                ]} />
        </Fieldset>
    );
};
Docs doc ok

## <T k="doc.usage" />

```tsx
import { Fieldset, Legend, Label, Input } from "wimui";
import { T } from "../T";

<Fieldset>
  <Legend>User Information</Legend>
  <Label label="Name">
    <Input />
  </Label>
  <Label label="Email Address">
    <Input />
  </Label>
</Fieldset>;
```

FieldTemplate

components-internal-fieldtemplate · ./stories/Internal/FieldTemplate/FieldTemplate.stories.tsx
フォーム系コンポーネントの共通レイアウト（ラベル、エラー表示、配置）を管理する内部コンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 8 prop types 
Component: src/components/_internal/FieldTemplate/FieldTemplate.tsx::FieldTemplate
Props:
/**
 * フィールドのメインコンテンツ
 */
children: React.ReactNode

/**
 * カスタムクラス名
 */
className?: string

/**
 * エラーメッセージ
 */
error?: string

/**
 * エラー表示用のID
 */
errorId?: string

/**
 * フィールドのラベルテキスト
 */
label?: string

/**
 * アクセシビリティ用のラベルID
 */
labelId?: string

/**
 * レイアウト方向
 * @default "vertical"
 */
layout?: "vertical" | "horizontal" = "vertical"

/**
 * 必須表示にするかどうか
 */
required?: boolean
Imports 
import { FieldTemplate, Input } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <FieldTemplate required label={args.label || t("doc.ft_email_label")}>
            <Input placeholder="example@example.com" fullWidth />
        </FieldTemplate>
    );
};
Horizontal story ok 
const Horizontal = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <FieldTemplate label={t("doc.ft_email_label")} layout="horizontal">
            <Input placeholder="example@example.com" fullWidth />
        </FieldTemplate>
    );
};
With Error story ok 
const WithError = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <FieldTemplate label={t("doc.ft_email_label")} error={t("doc.ft_email_error")}>
            <Input placeholder="example@example.com" fullWidth />
        </FieldTemplate>
    );
};
No Label story ok 
const NoLabel = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <FieldTemplate>
            <Input placeholder={t("doc.ft_no_label")} fullWidth />
        </FieldTemplate>
    );
};

FileUpload

components-advanced-inputs-fileupload · ./stories/FileUpload/FileUpload.stories.tsx
ユーザーがファイルを選択・アップロードするためのコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 14 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/FileUpload/FileUpload.tsx::FileUpload
Props:
accept?: string

buttonLabel?: string

className?: string

disabled?: boolean = false

error?: string

iconName?: React.ComponentProps<typeof Icon>["name"]

iconPosition?: "left" | "right"

label?: string

layout?: "vertical" | "horizontal" = "vertical"

multiple?: boolean = false

noFileLabel?: string

onChange?: (files: FileList | null) => void

required?: boolean

size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg" = "md"
Imports 
import { FileUpload } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <FileUpload
            label={t("story.fileupload_label_profile")}
            buttonLabel={t("story.fileupload_btn_image")}
            noFileLabel={t("story.fileupload_no_file")} />
    );
};
Multiple story ok 
const Multiple = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <FileUpload
            label={t("story.fileupload_label_doc")}
            buttonLabel={t("story.fileupload_btn_file")}
            noFileLabel={t("story.fileupload_no_file")}
            multiple={true} />
    );
};
Accept Images story ok 
const AcceptImages = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <FileUpload
            label={t("story.fileupload_label_image_only")}
            buttonLabel={t("story.fileupload_btn_image")}
            noFileLabel={t("story.fileupload_no_file")}
            accept="image/*"
            iconName="ImageIcon"
            size="lg" />
    );
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <FileUpload
            label={t("story.fileupload_label_disabled")}
            buttonLabel={t("story.fileupload_btn_file")}
            noFileLabel={t("story.fileupload_no_file")}
            disabled={true} />
    );
};
With Icon story ok 
const WithIcon = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <FileUpload
            label={t("story.fileupload_label_icon")}
            buttonLabel={t("story.fileupload_btn_upload")}
            noFileLabel={t("story.fileupload_no_file")}
            iconName="UploadIcon"
            iconPosition="left"
            size="lg" />
    );
};

Flex

components-layout-flex · ./stories/Flex/Flex.stories.tsx
Flex component for flexible layouts.
Prop types (react-docgen) 6 prop types 
Component: src/components/layout/Flex/Flex.tsx::Flex
Props:
/**
 * Align-items
 */
align?: "start" | "center" | "end" | "stretch" | "baseline"

/**
 * Flex direction
 */
direction?: "row" | "row-reverse" | "column" | "column-reverse" = "row"

/**
 * Gap between children
 */
gap?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Display inline-flex
 */
inline?: boolean = false

/**
 * Justify-content
 */
justify?: | "start"
| "center"
| "end"
| "between"
| "around"
| "evenly"
| "stretch"

/**
 * Flex-wrap
 */
wrap?: "nowrap" | "wrap" | "wrap-reverse"
Imports 
import { Flex } from "wimui";
Basic story ok 
const Basic = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Flex direction="row" gap={16}>
            <Box>{t("story.flex_item_1", "1")}</Box>
            <Box color="#10b981">{t("story.flex_item_2", "2")}</Box>
            <Box color="#f59e0b">{t("story.flex_item_3", "3")}</Box>
        </Flex>
    );
};
Column story ok 
const Column = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Flex direction="column" gap="1rem">
            <Box>{t("story.flex_item_1", "Item 1")}</Box>
            <Box color="#10b981">{t("story.flex_item_2", "Item 2")}</Box>
            <Box color="#ef4444">{t("story.flex_item_3", "Item 3")}</Box>
        </Flex>
    );
};
Justify Between story ok 
const JustifyBetween = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Flex
            justify="between"
            gap={16}
            style={{ width: "100%", border: "1px solid #ddd", padding: "10px" }}>
            <Box>{t("story.flex_left")}</Box>
            <Box color="#8b5cf6">{t("story.flex_middle")}</Box>
            <Box color="#ec4899">{t("story.flex_right")}</Box>
        </Flex>
    );
};
Wrapped story ok 
const Wrapped = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Flex
            wrap="wrap"
            gap={16}
            style={{ width: "200px", padding: "10px", border: "1px solid #ccc" }}>
            <Box>{t("story.flex_item_1", "1")}</Box>
            <Box color="#10b981">{t("story.flex_item_2", "2")}</Box>
            <Box color="#f59e0b">{t("story.flex_item_3", "3")}</Box>
            <Box color="#ef4444">{t("story.flex_item_4", "4")}</Box>
            <Box color="#8b5cf6">{t("story.flex_item_5", "5")}</Box>
        </Flex>
    );
};

import { Flex } from "@/components/layout/Flex/Flex";

const Demo = () => (
  <Flex direction="row" align="center" justify="between" gap={16}>
    <div>Item 1</div>
    <div>Item 2</div>
    <div>Item 3</div>
  </Flex>
);

components-navigation-utilities-floatbutton · ./stories/FloatButton/FloatButton.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 14 prop types 
Component: src/components/misc/FloatButton/FloatButton.tsx::FloatButton
Props:
/**
 * Aria label for accessibility
 */
aria-label?: string

/**
 * If true, the button will scroll to the top of the page when clicked
 */
backTop?: boolean = false

/**
 * Badge content (number or dot)
 */
badge?: number | boolean

/**
 * Additional class names
 */
className?: string

/**
 * Description for tooltip
 */
description?: string

/**
 * Icon name from the library
 */
iconName?: | "CircleIcon"
| "SquareIcon"
| "LoadingIcon"
| "ExternalLinkIcon"
| "ArrowUpIcon"
| string = "CircleIcon"

/**
 * Label text for extended FAB
 */
label?: string

/**
 * Position of the button
 */
position?: | "bottom-right"
| "bottom-left"
| "bottom-center"
| "top-right"
| "top-left"
| "static" = "bottom-right"

/**
 * Shape of the button
 */
shape?: "circle" | "square" = "circle"

/**
 * Whether to shrink the extended FAB (hide label)
 */
shrink?: boolean = false

/**
 * Size of the button
 */
size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg" = "md"

/**
 * Style attribute
 */
style?: React.CSSProperties

/**
 * Variant of the button
 */
variant?: "default" | "primary" = "default"

/**
 * Visibility threshold for backTop (in pixels)
 */
visibilityHeight?: number = 400
Imports 
import { FloatButton } from "wimui";
Basic story ok 
const Basic = () => <FloatButton
    iconName="CircleIcon"
    variant="primary"
    shape="circle"
    size="md"
    position="static" />;
Extended story ok 
const Extended = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <FloatButton
            iconName="CircleIcon"
            variant="primary"
            size="md"
            position="static"
            shrink={false}
            label={t("story.floatbutton_send")} />
    );
};
Sizes story ok 
const Sizes = () => (
  <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "16px", alignItems: "center" }}>
    <FloatButton
      iconName="CircleIcon"
      size="sm"
      variant="primary"
      position="static"
    />
    <FloatButton
      iconName="CircleIcon"
      size="md"
      variant="primary"
      position="static"
    />
    <FloatButton
      iconName="CircleIcon"
      size="lg"
      variant="primary"
      position="static"
    />
  </div>
);
Extended Sizes story ok 
const ExtendedSizes = () => {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div
      style={{
        display: "flex",
        flexDirection: "column",
        gap: "16px",
        alignItems: "flex-start",
      }}
    >
      <FloatButton
        iconName="CircleIcon"
        label={t("story.floatbutton_small")}
        size="sm"
        variant="primary"
        position="static"
      />
      <FloatButton
        iconName="CircleIcon"
        label={t("story.floatbutton_medium")}
        size="md"
        variant="primary"
        position="static"
      />
      <FloatButton
        iconName="CircleIcon"
        label={t("story.floatbutton_large")}
        size="lg"
        variant="primary"
        position="static"
      />
    </div>
  );
};
Auto Shrink story ok 
const AutoShrink = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <AutoShrinkDemo
            iconName="CircleIcon"
            variant="primary"
            size="md"
            position="static"
            shrink={false}
            label={t("story.floatbutton_shrink")} />
    );
};
Primary story ok 
const Primary = () => <FloatButton
    iconName="LoadingIcon"
    variant="primary"
    shape="circle"
    size="md"
    position="static" />;
Square story ok 
const Square = () => <FloatButton
    iconName="SquareIcon"
    variant="default"
    shape="square"
    size="md"
    position="static" />;
With Badge story ok 
const WithBadge = () => <FloatButton
    iconName="CircleIcon"
    badge={3}
    variant="primary"
    size="md"
    position="static" />;
Fixed Position story ok 
const FixedPosition = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ height: "150vh", padding: "20px" }}>
            <p>{t("story.floatbutton_look_bottom")}</p>
            <FloatButton
                iconName="ChevronUpIcon"
                variant="primary"
                shape="circle"
                size="md"
                position="bottom-right"
                description={t("story.floatbutton_click_me")} />
        </div>
    );
};
Back Top story ok 
const BackTop = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ height: "200vh", padding: "20px" }}>
            <p>{t("story.floatbutton_scroll_top_desc")}</p>
            <FloatButton backTop visibilityHeight={100} variant="primary" size="md" />
        </div>
    );
};

FocusTrap

components-internal-focustrap · ./stories/FocusTrap/FocusTrap.stories.tsx
フォーカスを特定の領域内に閉じ込めるためのユーティリティコンポーネント。 ダイアログやモーダルなどで使用します。
Prop types (react-docgen) 4 prop types 
Component: src/components/misc/FocusTrap/FocusTrap.tsx::FocusTrap
Props:
/**
 * トラップが有効かどうか。
 */
active?: boolean = true

/**
 * マウント時に最初の要素にフォーカスするかどうか。
 */
autoFocus?: boolean = true

/**
 * トラップされるコンテンツ。
 */
children: React.ReactNode

/**
 * 追加のクラス名。
 */
className?: string
Imports 
import { Button, Card, Container, FocusTrap, Input, Stack } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = (args: any) => {
  const [active, setActive] = useState(false);
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

  return (
    <Container size="sm" py="xl">
      <Stack gap="xl" align="center">
        <Button onClick={() => setActive(!active)} variant="filled">
          {active ? t("story.focustrap_deactivate") : t("story.focustrap_activate")}
        </Button>

        <Card variant="outline" style={{ width: "100%" }}>
          <Card.Header>
            <strong>{t("story.focustrap_outside_title")}</strong>
          </Card.Header>
          <Card.Body>
            <Stack gap="md">
              <p>{t("story.focustrap_outside_desc")}</p>
              <Button variant="outlined">{t("story.focustrap_outside_btn")}</Button>
            </Stack>
          </Card.Body>
        </Card>

        {active && (
          <FocusTrap {...args} active={active}>
            <Card
              variant="elevated"
              style={{
                width: "100%",
                border: "2px solid", borderColor: "var(--wim-primary, #0070f3)",
              }}
            >
              <Card.Header>
                <strong style={{ color: "var(--wim-primary, #0070f3)" }}>
                  {t("story.focustrap_trapped_title")}
                </strong>
              </Card.Header>
              <Card.Body>
                <Stack gap="md">
                  <p>
                    {t("story.focustrap_trapped_desc")}
                  </p>
                  <Input placeholder={t("story.focustrap_input_first")} fullWidth />
                  <Input placeholder={t("story.focustrap_input_second")} fullWidth />
                  <Button onClick={() => setActive(false)} variant="filled">
                    {t("story.focustrap_btn_close")}
                  </Button>
                </Stack>
              </Card.Body>
            </Card>
          </FocusTrap>
        )}
      </Stack>
    </Container>
  );
};
Auto Focus story ok 
const AutoFocus = (args: any) => {
  const [active, setActive] = useState(false);
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

  return (
    <Container size="sm" py="xl">
      <Stack gap="xl" align="center">
        <Button onClick={() => setActive(!active)} variant="filled">
          {active ? t("story.focustrap_deactivate_short") : t("story.focustrap_activate_autofocus")}
        </Button>

        {active && (
          <FocusTrap {...args} active={active}>
            <Card
              variant="elevated"
              style={{
                width: "100%",
                border: "2px solid", borderColor: "var(--wim-success, #28a745)",
              }}
            >
              <Card.Header>
                <strong style={{ color: "var(--wim-success, #28a745)" }}>
                  {t("story.focustrap_autofocus_title")}
                </strong>
              </Card.Header>
              <Card.Body>
                <Stack gap="md">
                  <Input placeholder={t("story.focustrap_input_autofocus")} fullWidth />
                  <Button variant="outlined">{t("story.focustrap_btn_another")}</Button>
                  <Button onClick={() => setActive(false)} variant="filled">
                    {t("story.focustrap_btn_close_short")}
                  </Button>
                </Stack>
              </Card.Body>
            </Card>
          </FocusTrap>
        )}
      </Stack>
    </Container>
  );
};

GanttChart

components-data-structures-ganttchart · ./stories/GanttChart/GanttChart.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 8 prop types 
Component: src/components/charts/GanttChart/GanttChart.tsx::GanttChart
Props:
className?: string

columnWidth?: number

endDate?: Date

onTaskClick?: (task: GanttTask) => void

rowHeight?: number = 40

startDate?: Date

tasks: GanttTask[]

viewMode?: "day" | "week" | "month" = "day"
Imports 
import { GanttChart } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

  const tasks = [
    {
      id: "task-1",
      label: t("story.ganttchart_task_requirements"),
      startDate: new Date(2026, 2, 1),
      endDate: new Date(2026, 2, 5),
    },
    {
      id: "task-2",
      label: t("story.ganttchart_task_design"),
      startDate: new Date(2026, 2, 4),
      endDate: new Date(2026, 2, 10),
    },
    {
      id: "task-3",
      label: t("story.ganttchart_task_development"),
      startDate: new Date(2026, 2, 9),
      endDate: new Date(2026, 2, 20),
      progress: 60,
    },
    {
      id: "task-4",
      label: t("story.ganttchart_task_testing"),
      startDate: new Date(2026, 2, 18),
      endDate: new Date(2026, 2, 24),
    },
    {
      id: "task-5",
      label: t("story.ganttchart_task_release"),
      startDate: new Date(2026, 2, 25),
      endDate: new Date(2026, 2, 31),
    },
  ];

  return (
    <GanttChart
      tasks={tasks}
      startDate={new Date(2026, 2, 1)}
      endDate={new Date(2026, 2, 31)}
      viewMode="day"
    />
  );
};
Week View story ok 
const WeekView = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

  const tasks = [
    {
      id: "task-1",
      label: t("story.ganttchart_task_requirements"),
      startDate: new Date(2026, 2, 1),
      endDate: new Date(2026, 2, 14),
    },
    {
      id: "task-2",
      label: t("story.ganttchart_task_design"),
      startDate: new Date(2026, 2, 10),
      endDate: new Date(2026, 2, 28),
      progress: 30,
    },
    {
      id: "task-3",
      label: t("story.ganttchart_task_development"),
      startDate: new Date(2026, 2, 20),
      endDate: new Date(2026, 3, 15),
      progress: 10,
    },
    {
      id: "task-4",
      label: t("story.ganttchart_task_testing"),
      startDate: new Date(2026, 3, 10),
      endDate: new Date(2026, 3, 24),
    },
  ];

  return (
    <GanttChart
      tasks={tasks}
      startDate={new Date(2026, 2, 1)}
      endDate={new Date(2026, 3, 30)}
      viewMode="week"
    />
  );
};
Month View story ok 
const MonthView = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

  const tasks = [
    {
      id: "task-1",
      label: t("story.ganttchart_task_requirements"),
      startDate: new Date(2026, 0, 5),
      endDate: new Date(2026, 1, 10),
    },
    {
      id: "task-2",
      label: t("story.ganttchart_task_design"),
      startDate: new Date(2026, 1, 1),
      endDate: new Date(2026, 2, 20),
      progress: 70,
    },
    {
      id: "task-3",
      label: t("story.ganttchart_task_development"),
      startDate: new Date(2026, 2, 1),
      endDate: new Date(2026, 5, 30),
      progress: 20,
    },
    {
      id: "task-4",
      label: t("story.ganttchart_task_testing"),
      startDate: new Date(2026, 5, 1),
      endDate: new Date(2026, 7, 31),
    },
    {
      id: "task-5",
      label: t("story.ganttchart_task_release"),
      startDate: new Date(2026, 8, 1),
      endDate: new Date(2026, 8, 30),
    },
  ];

  return (
    <GanttChart
      tasks={tasks}
      startDate={new Date(2026, 0, 1)}
      endDate={new Date(2026, 9, 31)}
      viewMode="month"
    />
  );
};
With Click Handler story ok 
const WithClickHandler = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

  const tasks = [
    {
      id: "task-1",
      label: t("story.ganttchart_task_design"),
      startDate: new Date(2026, 2, 1),
      endDate: new Date(2026, 2, 10),
      color: "var(--wim-color-primary)",
    },
    {
      id: "task-2",
      label: t("story.ganttchart_task_development"),
      startDate: new Date(2026, 2, 8),
      endDate: new Date(2026, 2, 20),
      color: "var(--wim-color-positive)",
      progress: 45,
    },
    {
      id: "task-3",
      label: t("story.ganttchart_task_testing"),
      startDate: new Date(2026, 2, 18),
      endDate: new Date(2026, 2, 28),
      color: "var(--wim-color-caution)",
    },
  ];

  return (
    <GanttChart
      tasks={tasks}
      startDate={new Date(2026, 2, 1)}
      endDate={new Date(2026, 2, 31)}
      viewMode="day"
      onTaskClick={(task: any) => alert(`Clicked: ${task.label}`)}
    />
  );
};
Docs doc ok
./stories/GanttChart/GanttChart.mdx
import {
  Meta,
  Title,
  Controls,
  Canvas,
} from "@storybook/addon-docs/blocks";
import * as GanttChartStories from "./GanttChart.stories";
import { T } from "../T";

<Meta of={GanttChartStories} />

<Title />
<p
  style={{
    margin: "0 0 16px 0",
    fontSize: "18px",
    lineHeight: "28px",
    color: "#6c757d",
  }}
>
  <T k="doc.ganttchart_long_desc" />
</p>

Imports 
import { Grid } from "wimui";
Basic story ok 
const Basic = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Grid cols={3} gap={16}>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_item", "1")}</Box>
            <Box color="#10b981">{t("story.grid_item", "2")}</Box>
            <Box color="#f59e0b">{t("story.grid_item", "3")}</Box>
            <Box color="#ef4444">{t("story.grid_item", "4")}</Box>
            <Box color="#8b5cf6">{t("story.grid_item", "5")}</Box>
            <Box color="#ec4899">{t("story.grid_item", "6")}</Box>
        </Grid>
    );
};
Custom Columns story ok 
const CustomColumns = () => {
    return (
        <Grid cols="1fr 2fr 1fr" gap="1rem">
            <Box>1fr</Box>
            <Box color="#10b981">2fr</Box>
            <Box color="#f59e0b">1fr</Box>
        </Grid>
    );
};
Responsive story ok 
const Responsive = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Grid cols={{ base: 1, sm: 2, md: 3, lg: 4 }} gap={16}>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_item", "1")}</Box>
            <Box color="#10b981">{t("story.grid_item", "2")}</Box>
            <Box color="#f59e0b">{t("story.grid_item", "3")}</Box>
            <Box color="#ef4444">{t("story.grid_item", "4")}</Box>
            <Box color="#8b5cf6">{t("story.grid_item", "5")}</Box>
            <Box color="#ec4899">{t("story.grid_item", "6")}</Box>
            <Box color="#6366f1">{t("story.grid_item", "7")}</Box>
            <Box color="#14b8a6">{t("story.grid_item", "8")}</Box>
        </Grid>
    );
};

components-layout-group · ./stories/Group/Group.stories.tsx
Group component for horizontal layouts with spacing.
Prop types (react-docgen) 5 prop types 
Component: src/components/layout/Group/Group.tsx::Group
Props:
/**
 * Vertical alignment
 */
align?: "start" | "center" | "end" | "stretch" | "baseline" = "center"

/**
 * Gap between elements
 */
gap?: number | string = 16

/**
 * Whether items should grow to fill available space
 */
grow?: boolean = false

/**
 * Horizontal alignment
 */
justify?: "start" | "center" | "end" | "between" | "around" | "evenly" = "start"

/**
 * Whether to wrap children
 */
wrap?: "nowrap" | "wrap" | "wrap-reverse" = "wrap"
Imports 
import { Button, Group } from "wimui";
Basic story ok 
const Basic = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Group gap={16}>
            <Button label={t("story.group_first", "First")} variant="filled" />
            <Button label={t("story.group_second", "Second")} variant="outlined" />
            <Button label={t("story.group_third", "Third")} variant="ghost" />
        </Group>
    );
};
Grow story ok 
const Grow = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Group grow gap={16}>
            <Button label={t("story.group_first", "First")} variant="filled" />
            <Button label={t("story.group_second", "Second")} variant="outlined" />
        </Group>
    );
};
Align End story ok 
const AlignEnd = () => <Group align="end" gap={16}>(<>
      <div
        style={{ height: "40px", width: "40px", backgroundColor: "#3b82f6" }}
      />
      <div
        style={{ height: "80px", width: "40px", backgroundColor: "#10b981" }}
      />
      <div
        style={{ height: "60px", width: "40px", backgroundColor: "#ef4444" }}
      />
    </>)</Group>;

HamburgerMenu

components-navigation-elements-hamburgermenu · ./stories/HamburgerMenu/HamburgerMenu.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 5 prop types 
Component: src/components/navigation/HamburgerMenu/HamburgerMenu.tsx::HamburgerMenu
Props:
/**
 * Custom class name
 */
className?: string

/**
 * Color of the bars
 */
color?: string

/**
 * Check if the menu is open
 */
isOpen?: boolean = false

/**
 * Callback function when the menu is toggled
 */
onClick?: React.MouseEventHandler<HTMLButtonElement>

/**
 * Size of the hamburger menu
 */
size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg" = "md"
Imports 
import { HamburgerMenu } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(args.isOpen || false);

    useEffect(() => {
      setIsOpen(args.isOpen || false);
    }, [args.isOpen]);

    const toggle = (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement>) => {
      setIsOpen((prev) => !prev);
      args.onClick?.(e);
    };

    return <HamburgerMenu size="md" isOpen={isOpen} onClick={toggle} />;
};
Small story ok 
const Small = () => {
    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(args.isOpen || false);

    useEffect(() => {
      setIsOpen(args.isOpen || false);
    }, [args.isOpen]);

    const toggle = (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement>) => {
      setIsOpen((prev) => !prev);
      args.onClick?.(e);
    };

    return <HamburgerMenu size="sm" isOpen={isOpen} onClick={toggle} />;
};
Large story ok 
const Large = () => {
    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(args.isOpen || false);

    useEffect(() => {
      setIsOpen(args.isOpen || false);
    }, [args.isOpen]);

    const toggle = (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement>) => {
      setIsOpen((prev) => !prev);
      args.onClick?.(e);
    };

    return <HamburgerMenu size="lg" isOpen={isOpen} onClick={toggle} />;
};
Colored story ok 
const Colored = () => {
    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(args.isOpen || false);

    useEffect(() => {
      setIsOpen(args.isOpen || false);
    }, [args.isOpen]);

    const toggle = (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement>) => {
      setIsOpen((prev) => !prev);
      args.onClick?.(e);
    };

    return <HamburgerMenu color="#ff5722" isOpen={isOpen} onClick={toggle} />;
};

components-application-shell-header · ./stories/Header/Header.stories.tsx
Info

Props:
/**
 * Background color
 */
background?: "primary" | "secondary" | "transparent" = "primary"

/**
 * Border at the bottom
 */
bordered?: boolean

/**
 * Fixed position at the top
 */
fixed?: boolean

/**
 * Glassmorphism effect
 */
glass?: boolean

/**
 * Sticky position at the top
 */
sticky?: boolean
Imports 
import { Header } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Header>
            <Header.Section align="start">
                <div style={{ fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: "1.2rem" }}>WIM UI</div>
            </Header.Section>
            <Header.Section align="center">
                <nav style={{ display: "flex", gap: "20px" }}>
                    <a href="/">{t("story.header_home")}</a>
                    <a href="/">{t("story.header_about")}</a>
                    <a href="/">{t("story.header_contact")}</a>
                </nav>
            </Header.Section>
            <Header.Section align="end">
                <button>{t("story.header_login")}</button>
            </Header.Section>
        </Header>
    );
};
Bordered story ok 
const Bordered = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Header bordered>
            <Header.Section align="start">
                <div style={{ fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: "1.2rem" }}>WIM UI</div>
            </Header.Section>
            <Header.Section align="center">
                <nav style={{ display: "flex", gap: "20px" }}>
                    <a href="/">{t("story.header_home")}</a>
                    <a href="/">{t("story.header_about")}</a>
                    <a href="/">{t("story.header_contact")}</a>
                </nav>
            </Header.Section>
            <Header.Section align="end">
                <button>{t("story.header_login")}</button>
            </Header.Section>
        </Header>
    );
};
Glass story ok 
const Glass = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Header glass background="transparent">
            <Header.Section align="start">
                <div style={{ fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: "1.2rem" }}>WIM UI</div>
            </Header.Section>
            <Header.Section align="center">
                <nav style={{ display: "flex", gap: "20px" }}>
                    <a href="/">{t("story.header_home")}</a>
                    <a href="/">{t("story.header_about")}</a>
                    <a href="/">{t("story.header_contact")}</a>
                </nav>
            </Header.Section>
            <Header.Section align="end">
                <button>{t("story.header_login")}</button>
            </Header.Section>
        </Header>
    );
};
Sticky story ok 
const Sticky = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div
            style={{
              height: "200vh",
              background: "linear-gradient(to bottom, #f0f0f0, #e0e0e0)",
            }}>
            <Header sticky bordered>
                <Header.Section align="start">
                    <div style={{ fontWeight: "bold" }}>Sticky Header</div>
                </Header.Section>
                <Header.Section align="end">
                    <button>{t("story.header_action")}</button>
                </Header.Section>
            </Header>
            <div style={{ padding: "20px" }}>
                <p>{t("story.header_scroll_desc")}</p>
                {Array.from({ length: 10 }).map((_, i) => (
                  <p key={i} style={{ margin: "20px 0" }}>
                    {t("story.header_content_block")} {i + 1}
                  </p>
                ))}
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
Playground story ok 
const Playground = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div
            style={{
              height: "300px",
              position: "relative",
              border: "1px dashed #ccc",
            }}>
            <Header
                bordered
                glass={false}
                background="primary"
                style={{ position: "absolute", top: 0, left: 0, width: "100%" }}>
                <Header.Section align="start">
                    <div style={{ fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: "1.2rem" }}>WIM UI</div>
                </Header.Section>
                <Header.Section align="center">
                    <nav style={{ display: "flex", gap: "20px" }}>
                        <a href="/">{t("story.header_home")}</a>
                        <a href="/">{t("story.header_about")}</a>
                        <a href="/">{t("story.header_contact")}</a>
                    </nav>
                </Header.Section>
                <Header.Section align="end">
                    <button>{t("story.header_login")}</button>
                </Header.Section>
            </Header>
            <div style={{ padding: "100px 20px 20px" }}>
                <p>{t("story.header_playground_desc")}</p>
                <p>{t("story.header_control_desc")}</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

Props:
/**
 * Text alignment.
 */
align?: "left" | "center" | "right" = "left"

children: React.ReactNode

/**
 * Text color.
 */
color?: | "black"
| "deepgray"
| "gray"
| "lightgray"
| "white"
| "error"
| "primary"
| "success"
| "warning"
| "info"
| WimColor = "black"

decoration?: "underline" | "highlight" | "none" = "none"

/**
 * The visual size of the heading.
 */
size?: "xs" | "sm" | "md" | "lg" | "xl" | "2xl" | "3xl" | "4xl" = "xl"

/**
 * The semantic HTML tag to use.
 */
tag?: "h1" | "h2" | "h3" | "h4" | "h5" | "h6" = "h1"
Imports 
import { Heading } from "wimui";
H 1 Heading story ok 
const H1Heading = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Heading tag="h1" size="2xl" color="black" align="left">{t("story.heading_text")}</Heading>;
};

const H6Heading = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Heading tag="h6" size="xs" color="black" align="left">{t("story.heading_text")}</Heading>;
};
Underline Heading story ok 
const UnderlineHeading = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Heading tag="h2" size="xl" decoration="underline">{t("story.heading_underline")}</Heading>;
};
Highlight Heading story ok 
const HighlightHeading = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Heading tag="h2" size="xl" decoration="highlight">{t("story.heading_highlight")}</Heading>;
};
Docs doc ok

Highlight

components-typography-icons-highlight · ./stories/Highlight/Highlight.stories.tsx
Highlight component that emphasizes specific parts of a text.
Prop types (react-docgen) 5 prop types 
Component: src/components/typography/Highlight/Highlight.tsx::Highlight
Props:
/**
 * The full text to highlight substrings in.
 */
children: string

/**
 * The HTML tag or component to use for the container. Default is "span".
 */
component?: React.ElementType = "span"

/**
 * Substring(s) to highlight.
 */
highlight: string | string[]

/**
 * Custom class name for the highlighted `<mark>` element.
 */
highlightClassName?: string

/**
 * Custom styles for the highlighted `<mark>` element.
 */
highlightStyles?: React.CSSProperties
Imports 
import { Highlight } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <Highlight highlight="highlight">You can highlight specific words in this sentence.</Highlight>;
Multiple Highlights story ok 
const MultipleHighlights = () => <Highlight highlight={["React", "Vue", "Angular"]}>React, Vue, and Angular are popular frontend frameworks.</Highlight>;
Case Insensitive story ok 
const CaseInsensitive = () => <Highlight highlight="search">SEARCH RESULTS FOR SEARCH TERM</Highlight>;
Custom Style story ok 
const CustomStyle = () => <Highlight
    highlight="Custom"
    highlightStyles={{
      backgroundColor: "var(--wim-color-primary)",
      color: "var(--wim-color-text-on-primary)",
      borderRadius: "4px",
      padding: "0 4px",
    }}>Custom highlight styles can be applied.</Highlight>;
Custom Component story ok 
const CustomComponent = () => <Highlight
    highlight="paragraph"
    component="p"
    style={{ fontSize: "20px", color: "gray" }}>This is a paragraph with a highlight.</Highlight>;
Docs doc ok

components-overlays-hovercard · ./stories/HoverCard/HoverCard.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 6 prop types 
Component: src/components/overlay/HoverCard/HoverCard.tsx::HoverCard
Props:
children: ReactNode

className?: string

/**
 * Delay before hiding the hover card in ms.
 */
closeDelay?: number = 300

/**
 * If provided, controls the open state.
 */
isOpen?: boolean

/**
 * Callback when open state changes.
 */
onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void

/**
 * Delay before showing the hover card in ms.
 */
openDelay?: number = 700
Imports 
import { Avatar, HoverCard, HoverCardContent, HoverCardTrigger } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div
      style={{
        padding: "100px",
        display: "flex",
        justifyContent: "center",
        alignItems: "center",
        minHeight: "600px",
      }}
    >
      <HoverCard>
        <HoverCardTrigger asChild>
          <a
            href="/"
            style={{
              borderRadius: "50%",
              display: "inline-block",
              cursor: "pointer",
            }}
          >
            <Avatar
              src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1494790108377-be9c29b29330?auto=format&fit=crop&w=120&h=120"
              alt="Sarah Miller"
            />
          </a>
        </HoverCardTrigger>
        <HoverCardContent side="bottom">
          <div
            style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "12px" }}
          >
            <Avatar
              src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1494790108377-be9c29b29330?auto=format&fit=crop&w=120&h=120"
              alt="Sarah Miller"
              size="lg"
            />
            <div
              style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "4px" }}
            >
              <div style={{ fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: "16px" }}>
                Sarah Miller
              </div>
              <div
                style={{ color: "var(--wim-color-text-secondary)", fontSize: "14px" }}
              >
                @sarah_m
              </div>
            </div>
            <div style={{ fontSize: "14px" }}>
              {t("story.hovercard_bio")}
            </div>
            <div
              style={{
                display: "flex",
                gap: "16px",
                fontSize: "12px",
                color: "var(--wim-color-text-secondary)",
              }}
            >
              <div>
                <span
                  style={{ fontWeight: "bold", color: "var(--wim-color-text-primary)" }}
                >
                  452
                </span>{" "}
                {t("story.hovercard_following")}
              </div>
              <div>
                <span
                  style={{ fontWeight: "bold", color: "var(--wim-color-text-primary)" }}
                >
                  2.8k
                </span>{" "}
                {t("story.hovercard_followers")}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </HoverCardContent>
      </HoverCard>
    </div>
  );
};
Instant story ok 
const Instant = () => {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div
      style={{
        padding: "100px",
        display: "flex",
        justifyContent: "center",
        minHeight: "200px",
      }}
    >
      <HoverCard openDelay={0} closeDelay={0}>
        <HoverCardTrigger>{t("story.hovercard_hover_me")}</HoverCardTrigger>
        <HoverCardContent>{t("story.hovercard_instant_desc")}</HoverCardContent>
      </HoverCard>
    </div>
  );
};
Docs doc ok

Imports 
import { Icon } from "wimui";
Medium Square Icon story ok 
const MediumSquareIcon = () => <Icon onClick={fn()} name="SquareIcon" size="md" color="primary" />;
Medium Circle Icon story ok 
const MediumCircleIcon = () => <Icon onClick={fn()} name="CircleIcon" size="lg" color="destructive" />;
Medium Loading Icon story ok 
const MediumLoadingIcon = () => <Icon onClick={fn()} name="LoadingIcon" size="lg" color="primary" />;
Medium External Link Icon story ok 
const MediumExternalLinkIcon = () => <Icon onClick={fn()} name="ExternalLinkIcon" size="md" color="primary" />;
Medium Spinner Icon story ok 
const MediumSpinnerIcon = () => <Icon onClick={fn()} name="SpinnerIcon" size="lg" color="primary" />;
Medium More Horizontal Icon story ok 
const MediumMoreHorizontalIcon = () => <Icon onClick={fn()} name="MoreHorizontalIcon" size="md" color="primary" />;
Medium Thumb Up Icon story ok 
const MediumThumbUpIcon = () => <Icon onClick={fn()} name="ThumbUpIcon" size="md" color="positive" />;
Medium Thumb Down Icon story ok 
const MediumThumbDownIcon = () => <Icon onClick={fn()} name="ThumbDownIcon" size="md" color="destructive" />;

import {
  Meta,
  Canvas,
  Controls,
  Story,
  IconGallery,
  IconItem,
} from "@storybook/addon-docs/blocks";
import { T } from "../T";
import * as IconStories from "./Icon.stories";
import { Icon } from "@/components/media/Icon/Icon";

<Meta of={IconStories} />

IconButton

components-buttons-iconbutton · ./stories/IconButton/IconButton.stories.tsx
アイコンのみのボタンコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 2 prop types 
Component: src/components/misc/IconButton/IconButton.tsx::IconButton
Props:
aria-label: string

iconName: React.ComponentProps<typeof Icon>["name"]
Imports 
import { IconButton } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <IconButton iconName="SearchIcon" aria-label={t("story.iconbutton_search")} />;
};
Close story ok 
const Close = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <IconButton
            variant="ghost"
            iconName="CloseIcon"
            aria-label={t("story.iconbutton_close")} />
    );
};
Docs doc ok

Image

components-media-image · ./stories/Image/Image.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 25 prop types 
Component: src/components/media/Image/Image.tsx::Image
Props:
alt: string

/**
 * 背景に適用するフィルタ（透過画像などで効果的）
 */
backdropFilter?: ImageFilterOptions

/**
 * ブレンド用の背景色
 */
bgColor?: string

/**
 * 画像自体のブレンドモード
 */
blendMode?: React.CSSProperties["mixBlendMode"]

/**
 * 枠線を表示するか
 */
border?: boolean = false

/**
 * 画像の下に表示する説明文
 */
caption?: string

/**
 * デモ用：読み込み完了を意図的に遅らせるミリ秒
 */
demoDelay?: number

/**
 * デュオトーン設定
 */
duotone?: ImageDuotoneOptions

/**
 * 読み込み完了時にフェードインさせるか
 */
fadeIn?: boolean = false

/**
 * 画像自体に適用するフィルタ
 */
filter?: ImageFilterOptions

/**
 * 画像のフィット感
 */
fit?: "contain" | "cover" | "fill" | "none" | "scale-down" = "cover"

height?: string | number

/**
 * ホバー時に背景に適用するフィルタ
 */
hoverBackdropFilter?: ImageFilterOptions

/**
 * ホバー時に適用するフィルタ（指定がない場合はfilterが維持されます）
 */
hoverFilter?: ImageFilterOptions

/**
 * 遅延読み込み設定
 */
loading?: "eager" | "lazy"

/**
 * フィルムグレイン（ノイズ）の強度
 */
noise?: "none" | "sm" | "md" | "lg"

/**
 * オーバーレイ設定
 */
overlay?: ImageOverlayOptions

/**
 * LCP候補など、読み込み優先度を上げるかどうか（fetchpriority="high"）
 */
priority?: boolean = false

/**
 * 角丸のサイズ
 */
radius?: "none" | "small" | "medium" | "large" | "full" = "none"

/**
 * シャドウ（影）を表示するか
 */
shadow?: boolean = false

src: string

/**
 * マウスに追従するチルト（傾き）エフェクト
 */
tilt?: boolean = false

/**
 * フィルタ切り替え時のアニメーション速度
 */
transition?: "none" | "fast" | "normal" | "slow" = "normal"

width?: string | number

/**
 * ホバー時の拡大倍率 (例: 1.1) または true (デフォルト1.05)
 */
zoom?: boolean | number = false
Imports 
import { Button, Image } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Image src={vibrantLandscape} width={400} alt={t("story.image_alt")} />;
};
With Caption story ok 
const WithCaption = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Image
            src={vibrantLandscape}
            width={400}
            alt={t("story.image_alt")}
            caption={t("story.image_caption")} />
    );
};
Rounded story ok 
const Rounded = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Image
            src={vibrantLandscape}
            width={200}
            height={200}
            radius="large"
            fit="cover"
            alt={t("story.image_alt")} />
    );
};
Circular story ok 
const Circular = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Image
            src={vibrantLandscape}
            width={150}
            height={150}
            radius="full"
            fit="cover"
            border
            alt={t("story.image_alt")} />
    );
};
With Shadow story ok 
const WithShadow = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Image
            src={vibrantLandscape}
            width={400}
            shadow
            radius="medium"
            alt={t("story.image_alt")} />
    );
};
Filters story ok 
const Filters = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: "2rem" }}>
            <div>
                <p style={{ marginBottom: "0.5rem", fontSize: "0.875rem" }}>Grayscale to Color (Hover)</p>
                <Image
                    src={vibrantLandscape}
                    alt={t("story.image_alt")}
                    filter={{ grayscale: "lg" }}
                    hoverFilter={{ grayscale: "none" }}
                    width={260} />
            </div>
            <div>
                <p style={{ marginBottom: "0.5rem", fontSize: "0.875rem" }}>Blur to Clear (Hover)</p>
                <Image
                    src={vibrantLandscape}
                    alt={t("story.image_alt")}
                    filter={{ blur: "sm" }}
                    hoverFilter={{ blur: "none" }}
                    width={260} />
            </div>
            <div>
                <p style={{ marginBottom: "0.5rem", fontSize: "0.875rem" }}>Sepia (Fixed)</p>
                <Image
                    src={vibrantLandscape}
                    alt={t("story.image_alt")}
                    filter={{ sepia: "md" }}
                    width={260} />
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
Glassmorphism story ok 
const Glassmorphism = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div
            style={{
              position: "relative",
              width: "600px",
              height: "300px",
              overflow: "hidden",
              borderRadius: "12px",
              display: "flex",
              alignItems: "center",
              justifyContent: "center",
            }}>
            {/* 背景画像 */}
            <div
                style={{
                  position: "absolute",
                  inset: 0,
                  backgroundImage: `url(${vibrantLandscape})`,
                  backgroundSize: "cover",
                  filter: "saturate(1.5) brightness(0.8)",
                }} />
            {/* Backdrop Filterをかけた画像（透過素材を想定） */}
            <div style={{ position: "relative", zIndex: 1, textAlign: "center" }}>
                <Image
                    src={vibrantLandscape}
                    alt={t("story.image_alt")}
                    backdropFilter={{ blur: "md" }}
                    hoverBackdropFilter={{ blur: "none" }}
                    style={{
                      backgroundColor: "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)",
                      padding: "20px",
                    }}
                    width={300}
                    radius="large"
                    border />
                <p style={{ color: "white", marginTop: "1rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>
                    {t("story.image_backdrop_hover_clear", { defaultValue: "Hover to clear backdrop blur" })}
                </p>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
Advanced Effects story ok 
const AdvancedEffects = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "3rem" }}>
            <div>
                <p style={{ marginBottom: "1rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>{t("story.image_advanced_noise")}</p>
                <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "1rem" }}>
                    <Image
                        src={vibrantLandscape}
                        radius="medium"
                        alt="Low noise"
                        noise="sm"
                        width={200}
                        caption={`${t("common.intensity", { defaultValue: "Intensity" })}: sm`} />
                    <Image
                        src={vibrantLandscape}
                        radius="medium"
                        alt="Medium noise"
                        noise="md"
                        width={200}
                        caption={`${t("common.intensity", { defaultValue: "Intensity" })}: md`} />
                    <Image
                        src={vibrantLandscape}
                        radius="medium"
                        alt="High noise"
                        noise="lg"
                        width={200}
                        caption={`${t("common.intensity", { defaultValue: "Intensity" })}: lg`} />
                </div>
            </div>
            <div>
                <p style={{ marginBottom: "1rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>{t("story.image_advanced_duotone")}</p>
                <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "1rem" }}>
                    <Image
                        src={vibrantLandscape}
                        radius="medium"
                        alt="Duotone gold"
                        duotone={{ light: "#f0dfaf", dark: "#3f3f3f" }}
                        width={300}
                        caption={t("story.image_advanced_goldish")} />
                    <Image
                        src={vibrantLandscape}
                        radius="medium"
                        alt="Duotone cyber"
                        duotone={{ light: "#00fff2", dark: "#6000ff" }}
                        width={300}
                        caption={t("story.image_advanced_cyberpunk")} />
                </div>
            </div>
            <div>
                <p style={{ marginBottom: "1rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>{t("story.image_advanced_overlay_vignette")}</p>
                <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "1rem" }}>
                    <div style={{ position: "relative" }}>
                        <Image
                            src={vibrantLandscape}
                            radius="medium"
                            alt="Overlay"
                            overlay={{
                              color: "linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.8), transparent)",
                              intensity: "medium",
                            }}
                            width={300} />
                        <div
                            style={{ position: "absolute", bottom: "20px", left: "20px", color: "white", zIndex: 2 }}>
                            <h4 style={{ margin: 0 }}>{t("story.image_advanced_text_over")}</h4>
                            <p style={{ margin: 0, fontSize: "0.8rem" }}>{t("story.image_advanced_overlay_readability")}</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <Image
                        src={vibrantLandscape}
                        radius="medium"
                        alt="Hover overlay"
                        overlay={{
                          color: "rgba(100, 108, 255, 0.4)",
                          showOnHover: true,
                        }}
                        width={300}
                        caption={t("story.image_advanced_hover_brand")} />
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
Motion Effects story ok 
const MotionEffects = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [imageKey, setImageKey] = React.useState(0);

    return (
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "3rem" }}>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: "2rem" }}>
                <div>
                    <p style={{ marginBottom: "1rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>{t("story.image_motion_effects_smooth_zoom")}</p>
                    <Image
                        src={vibrantLandscape}
                        alt="Zoom effect"
                        zoom={1.1}
                        width={300}
                        radius="medium"
                        caption={t("story.image_motion_effects_zoom_caption")} />
                </div>
                <div>
                    <p style={{ marginBottom: "1rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>{t("story.image_motion_effects_3d_tilt")}</p>
                    <Image
                        src={vibrantLandscape}
                        alt="Tilt effect"
                        tilt
                        width={300}
                        radius="medium"
                        shadow
                        caption={t("story.image_motion_effects_tilt_caption")} />
                </div>
            </div>
            <div>
                <p style={{ marginBottom: "1rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>{t("story.image_motion_effects_fade_in")}</p>
                <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "1rem" }}>
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "1rem" }}>
                        <Button
                            variant="filled"
                            onClick={() => setImageKey((prev) => prev + 1)}
                            label={t("story.image_motion_effects_reload")}
                            icon="RefreshIcon" />
                    </div>
                    <Image
                        key={imageKey}
                        src={`${vibrantLandscape}?k=${imageKey}`}
                        fadeIn
                        demoDelay={2000}
                        width={400}
                        radius="medium"
                        shadow
                        caption={t("story.image_motion_effects_interactive_caption")} />
                </div>
            </div>
            <div>
                <p style={{ marginBottom: "1rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>Ultimate Combo</p>
                <div style={{ maxWidth: "500px" }}>
                    <Image
                        src={vibrantLandscape}
                        alt="Combo"
                        zoom
                        tilt
                        noise="sm"
                        overlay={{
                          color: "linear-gradient(to top, rgba(100, 108, 255, 0.6), transparent)",
                          showOnHover: true
                        }}
                        filter={{ grayscale: "sm" }}
                        hoverFilter={{ grayscale: "none" }}
                        width="100%"
                        radius="large"
                        shadow
                        caption="Zoom + Tilt + Noise + Overlay + Filter" />
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
Blending Effects story ok 
const BlendingEffects = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "3rem" }}>
            <div>
                <p style={{ marginBottom: "1rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>{t("story.image_blending_overlay", { defaultValue: "Overlay Blending" })}</p>
                <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "1rem" }}>
                    <Image
                        src={vibrantLandscape}
                        radius="medium"
                        alt={t("story.image_alt_multiply", { defaultValue: "Multiply overlay" })}
                        overlay={{
                          color: "#3498db",
                          intensity: "medium",
                          blendMode: "multiply",
                        }}
                        width={300}
                        caption={t("story.image_caption_blue_multiply", { defaultValue: "Blue Multiply (Adds tint)" })} />
                    <Image
                        src={vibrantLandscape}
                        radius="medium"
                        alt={t("story.image_alt_overlay", { defaultValue: "Overlay blend" })}
                        overlay={{
                          color: "#e74c3c",
                          intensity: "medium",
                          blendMode: "overlay",
                        }}
                        width={300}
                        caption={t("story.image_caption_red_overlay", { defaultValue: "Red Overlay (Increases contrast)" })} />
                </div>
            </div>
            <div>
                <p style={{ marginBottom: "1rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>{t("story.image_blending_image", { defaultValue: "Image Blending with Background" })}</p>
                <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "1rem" }}>
                    <div
                        style={{ padding: "20px", background: "linear-gradient(45deg, #f3f3f3, #ddd)" }}>
                        <Image
                            src={vibrantLandscape}
                            radius="medium"
                            alt={t("story.image_alt_multiply_bg", { defaultValue: "Multiply image" })}
                            blendMode="multiply"
                            bgColor="#f1c40f"
                            width={300}
                            caption={t("story.image_caption_yellow_multiply", { defaultValue: "Image Multiply with Yellow BG" })} />
                    </div>
                    <div style={{ padding: "20px", background: "black" }}>
                        <Image
                            src={vibrantLandscape}
                            radius="medium"
                            alt={t("story.image_alt_screen", { defaultValue: "Screen image" })}
                            blendMode="screen"
                            width={300}
                            caption={t("story.image_caption_screen", { defaultValue: "Image Screen (Whitening effect)" })} />
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div>
                <p style={{ marginBottom: "1rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>{t("story.image_blending_difference", { defaultValue: "Creative: Difference Mode" })}</p>
                <div style={{ position: "relative", width: "400px" }}>
                    <Image
                        src={vibrantLandscape}
                        radius="medium"
                        alt={t("story.image_alt_difference", { defaultValue: "Difference" })}
                        overlay={{
                          color: "white",
                          intensity: 1,
                          blendMode: "difference",
                        }}
                        width="100%" />
                    <div
                        style={{ position: "absolute", top: "50%", left: "50%", transform: "translate(-50%, -50%)", color: "white", fontSize: "2rem", fontWeight: "bold", mixBlendMode: "difference" }}>
                        {t("story.image_inverted_text", { defaultValue: "INVERTED TEXT" })}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
Docs doc ok
./stories/Image/Image.mdx
import { Meta, Canvas, Controls, Story } from "@storybook/addon-docs/blocks";
import { T } from "../T";
import * as ImageStories from "./Image.stories";

<Meta of={ImageStories} />

# Image

  style={{
    margin: "0 0 16px 0",
    fontSize: "18px",
    lineHeight: "28px",

</p>

```tsx
import { Image } from "@/components/media/Image/Image";

<Image
  src="path/to/image.webp"
  alt="Description"
  width={400}
  radius="medium"
  shadow
  caption="Sample Image"
/>;
```

Indicator

components-data-indicators-indicator · ./stories/Indicator/Indicator.stories.tsx
要素の状態（オンライン、未読、エラーなど）を示す小さなドットコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 8 prop types 
Component: src/components/feedback/Indicator/Indicator.tsx::Indicator
Props:
children?: React.ReactNode

className?: string

color?: "primary" | "success" | "error" | "warning" | "neutral" | WimColor = "primary"

inline?: boolean = false

position?: "top-right" | "top-left" | "bottom-right" | "bottom-left" = "top-right"

pulse?: boolean = false

size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg" = "md"

style?: React.CSSProperties
Imports 
import { Avatar, Icon, Indicator } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <Indicator color="success" position="bottom-right"><Avatar initials="JD" /></Indicator>;
Colors story ok 
const Colors = () => <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "20px" }}>
    <Indicator color="primary">
        <Avatar initials="P" />
    </Indicator>
    <Indicator color="success">
        <Avatar initials="S" />
    </Indicator>
    <Indicator color="warning">
        <Avatar initials="W" />
    </Indicator>
    <Indicator color="error">
        <Avatar initials="E" />
    </Indicator>
    <Indicator color="neutral">
        <Avatar initials="N" />
    </Indicator>
</div>;
Pulse story ok 
const Pulse = () => <Indicator color="success" pulse position="bottom-right"><Avatar initials="AL" /></Indicator>;
Inline story ok 
const Inline = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "8px" }}>
            <Indicator color="success" inline />
            <span>{t("story.indicator_online")}</span>
        </div>
    );
};
Sizes story ok 
const Sizes = () => <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "20px" }}>
    <Indicator size="sm" inline />
    <Indicator size="md" inline />
    <Indicator size="lg" inline />
</div>;
With Icons story ok 
const WithIcons = () => <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "20px" }}>
    <Indicator color="error">
        <div
            style={{ padding: "8px", background: "var(--wim-color-surface-variant)", borderRadius: "8px" }}>
            <Icon name="BellIcon" />
        </div>
    </Indicator>
</div>;

IndicatorSlider

components-internal-indicatorslider · ./stories/Internal/IndicatorSlider/IndicatorSlider.stories.tsx
A shared internal component to manage a sliding indicator that follows an active element. Used by Tabs, SegmentedControl, and TabNavigation.
Prop types (react-docgen) 6 prop types 
Component: src/components/_internal/IndicatorSlider.tsx::IndicatorSlider
Props:
activeSelector: string

className?: string

dependence?: unknown

orientation?: "horizontal" | "vertical" = "horizontal"

style?: React.CSSProperties

variant?: string
Imports 
import { IndicatorSlider } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = function Render() {
  const [active, setActive] = useState(0);
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  const labels = ["home", "profile", "settings", "account"];

  return (
    <div 
      className="wim-tab-list" 
      style={{ 
          display: "flex", 
          position: "relative", 
          gap: "24px",
          padding: "8px 16px",
          background: "#f5f5f5",
          borderRadius: "8px"
      }}
    >
      {labels.map((key, i) => (
          <button
              key={i}
              className={active === i ? "is-active" : ""}
              style={{ 
                  border: "none", 
                  background: "none", 
                  padding: "8px 12px", 
                  cursor: "pointer",
                  zIndex: 2,
                  position: "relative",
                  color: active === i ? "#0070f3" : "#666",
                  fontWeight: active === i ? "bold" : "normal",
                  transition: "color 0.2s"
              }}
              onClick={() => setActive(i)}
          >
              {t(key)}
          </button>
      ))}
      {/* The slider follows the .is-active element */}
      <IndicatorSlider 
          activeSelector=".is-active" 
          className="wim-tab-indicator"
          style={{
              position: "absolute",
              bottom: 0,
              left: 0,
              height: "2px",
              backgroundColor: "#0070f3",
              zIndex: 1
          }}
      />
    </div>
  );
};
Vertical story ok 
const Vertical = function Render() {
    const [active, setActive] = useState(0);
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const labels = ["overview", "analytics", "reports", "audience"];

    return (
      <div 
        className="wim-nav-list" 
        style={{ 
            display: "flex", 
            flexDirection: "column",
            position: "relative", 
            gap: "8px",
            padding: "16px",
            background: "#fff",
            border: "1px solid #ddd",
            borderRadius: "8px",
            width: "200px"
        }}
      >
        {labels.map((key, i) => (
            <button
                key={i}
                className={active === i ? "is-active-v" : ""}
                style={{ 
                    border: "none", 
                    background: "none", 
                    padding: "10px 16px", 
                    textAlign: "left",
                    cursor: "pointer",
                    zIndex: 2,
                    position: "relative",
                    color: active === i ? "#0070f3" : "#666",
                    fontWeight: active === i ? "bold" : "normal"
                }}
                onClick={() => setActive(i)}
            >
                {t(key)}
            </button>
        ))}
        <IndicatorSlider 
            activeSelector=".is-active-v" 
            orientation="vertical"
            className="wim-nav-indicator"
            style={{
                position: "absolute",
                left: 0,
                width: "4px",
                backgroundColor: "#0070f3",
                borderRadius: "0 4px 4px 0",
                zIndex: 1
            }}
        />
      </div>
    );
  };

InfiniteScroll

components-utilities-infinitescroll · ./stories/InfiniteScroll/InfiniteScroll.stories.tsx
スクロールに応じて自動的に次のデータを読み込むためのコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 6 prop types 
Component: src/components/misc/InfiniteScroll/InfiniteScroll.tsx::InfiniteScroll
Props:
/**
 * まだ読み込むデータがあるかどうか。
 */
hasMore?: boolean = true

/**
 * 読み込み中に表示する要素。デフォルトは `Loader` コンポーネント。
 */
loader?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * 読み込み中かどうか。
 */
loading?: boolean = false

/**
 * 次のデータを読み込む際に呼び出されるコールバック関数。
 */
onLoadMore: () => void

/**
 * スクロールを検知する際のオフセット。root からの距離を指定。
 */
rootMargin?: string = "0px"

/**
 * スクロールを検知する閾値。0から1までの値を指定。デフォルトは 0。
 */
threshold?: number = 0
Imports 
import { Card, InfiniteScroll, Stack } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [items, setItems] = useState(
      Array.from({ length: 20 }, (_, i) => t("story.infscroll_item", { index: i + 1 })),
    );
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
    const [hasMore, setHasMore] = useState(true);

    const loadMore = () => {
      if (loading || !hasMore) return;
      setLoading(true);
      setTimeout(() => {
        const newItems = Array.from(
          { length: 10 },
          (_, i) => t("story.infscroll_item", { index: items.length + i + 1 }),
        );
        setItems((prev) => [...prev, ...newItems]);
        setLoading(false);
        if (items.length > 50) {
          setHasMore(false);
        }
      }, 1000);
    };

    return (
        <div
            tabIndex={0}
            style={{ height: "400px", overflowY: "auto", padding: "20px" }}>
            <InfiniteScroll loading={loading} hasMore={hasMore} onLoadMore={loadMore}>
                <Stack gap="md">
                    {items.map((item) => (
                      <Card key={item} padding="md">
                        {item}
                      </Card>
                    ))}
                </Stack>
            </InfiniteScroll>
        </div>
    );
};
Docs doc ok

Imports 
import { FieldError, Input, Label } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.input_label_name")}>
            <Input
                width="md"
                fullWidth={false}
                disabled={false}
                placeholder={t("story.input_placeholder_name")} />
        </Label>
    );
};
Select Like story ok 
const SelectLike = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const handleClick = () => alert("Dropdown or Modal would open here!");

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.input_label_dept")}>
            <Input
                width="md"
                fullWidth={false}
                disabled={false}
                rightIcon="ChevronDownIcon"
                placeholder={t("story.input_placeholder_dept")}
                onClick={handleClick}
                onRightIconClick={(e: React.MouseEvent) => {
                  e.stopPropagation(); // Prevent duplicate alert
                  handleClick();
                }}
                readOnly={true}
                style={{ cursor: "pointer" }} />
        </Label>
    );
};
Clearable story ok 
const Clearable = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.input_label_keyword")}>
            <Input
                width="md"
                fullWidth={false}
                disabled={false}
                allowClear
                placeholder={t("story.input_placeholder_keyword")}
                defaultValue={t("story.input_value_keyword")} />
        </Label>
    );
};

Custom Width story ok 
const CustomWidth = () => {
    return (
        <div
            style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "24px", width: "100%", maxWidth: "800px" }}>
            <Label label="XS (80px - Secure Code)">
                <Input fullWidth={false} disabled={false} width="xs" placeholder="000" />
            </Label>
            <Label label="SM (160px - Zip Code)">
                <Input fullWidth={false} disabled={false} width="sm" placeholder="000-0000" />
            </Label>
            <Label label="MD (320px - Name)">
                <Input fullWidth={false} disabled={false} width="md" placeholder="John Doe" />
            </Label>
            <Label label="LG (480px - Company)">
                <Input
                    fullWidth={false}
                    disabled={false}
                    width="lg"
                    placeholder="Antigravity Inc." />
            </Label>
            <Label label="Custom (8ch - Always 8 chars)">
                <Input fullWidth={false} disabled={false} width="8ch" placeholder="12345678" />
            </Label>
        </div>
    );
};

InputBase

components-internal-inputbase · ./stories/Internal/InputBase/InputBase.stories.tsx
フォーム入力コンポーネント（Input, SearchInput, Selectbox等）の外殻となる共用語コンポーネント。 prefix/suffix（アイコン）や clearable（クリアボタン）の配置とレイアウトを統一します。
Prop types (react-docgen) 14 prop types 
Component: src/components/_internal/InputBase/InputBase.tsx::InputBase
Props:
/**
 * Whether to show a clear button when value is present
 */
allowClear?: boolean

children: React.ReactNode

className?: string

disabled?: boolean

fullWidth?: boolean = false

hasValue?: boolean

leftIcon?: React.ComponentProps<typeof Icon>["name"]

leftIconColor?: React.ComponentProps<typeof Icon>["color"]

onClear?: () => void

onLeftIconClick?: (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement>) => void

rightIcons?: InputBaseIcon[] = []

status?: "default" | "error" | "warning" | "success" = "default"

variant?: "outline" | "ghost" = "outline"

width?: "xs" | "sm" | "md" | "lg" | "xl" | string | number
Imports 
import { InputBase } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <InputBase width="md"><DummyInput placeholder={t("doc.inputBase_placeholder")} /></InputBase>;
};
With Icons story ok 
const WithIcons = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <InputBase
            leftIcon="SearchIcon"
            rightIcons={[{ name: "CloseIcon", onClick: () => alert(t("button.clear")) }]}>
            <DummyInput placeholder={t("doc.inputBase_placeholder")} />
        </InputBase>
    );
};
Error story ok 
const Error = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <InputBase status="error" leftIcon="AlertCircleIcon">
            <DummyInput placeholder={t("doc.inputBase_placeholder")} />
        </InputBase>
    );
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <InputBase disabled leftIcon="ClockIcon">
            <DummyInput placeholder={t("doc.inputBase_placeholder")} />
        </InputBase>
    );
};
Ghost story ok 
const Ghost = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <InputBase variant="ghost" leftIcon="SearchIcon">
            <DummyInput placeholder={t("doc.inputBase_placeholder")} />
        </InputBase>
    );
};
Multiple Right Icons story ok 
const MultipleRightIcons = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <InputBase
            rightIcons={[
              { name: "EyeIcon", onClick: () => alert(t("a11y.play")) },
              { name: "SettingsIcon", onClick: () => alert(t("settings")) }
            ]}>
            <DummyInput placeholder={t("doc.inputBase_placeholder")} />
        </InputBase>
    );
};

import { Button, Input, InputGroup, InputGroupText } from "wimui";
Basic story ok 
const Basic = () => <InputGroup>
    <InputGroupText>@</InputGroupText>
    <Input placeholder="username" />
</InputGroup>;
With Button story ok 
const WithButton = () => <InputGroup>
    <Input placeholder="Search..." />
    <Button variant="filled" icon="SearchIcon" label="Search" />
</InputGroup>;
Suffix story ok 
const Suffix = () => <InputGroup>
    <Input placeholder="Recipient's username" />
    <InputGroupText>@example.com</InputGroupText>
</InputGroup>;
Multiple Addons story ok 
const MultipleAddons = () => <InputGroup>
    <InputGroupText>$</InputGroupText>
    <InputGroupText>0.00</InputGroupText>
    <Input placeholder="Price" />
    <InputGroupText>.00</InputGroupText>
</InputGroup>;
Full Width story ok 
const FullWidth = () => <div style={{ width: "100%", maxWidth: "600px" }}>
    <InputGroup fullWidth>
        <InputGroupText>Search</InputGroupText>
        <Input placeholder="Type something..." />
        <Button variant="filled" label="Go" />
    </InputGroup>
</div>;

特定の形式に沿った入力を強制するためのマスク付き入力コンポーネント。 '9': 数字 (0-9) 'a': 英字 (a-z, A-Z) '*': 英数字 その他: そのまま表示

maskChar?: string = "_"
Imports 
import { InputMask, Label } from "wimui";
Zip Code story ok 
const ZipCode = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.inputmask_zip")}>
            <InputMask disabled={false} mask="999-9999" placeholder="000-0000" />
        </Label>
    );
};
Phone story ok 
const Phone = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.inputmask_phone")}>
            <InputMask disabled={false} mask="(99) 9999-9999" placeholder="(03) 1234-5678" />
        </Label>
    );
};
Credit Card story ok 
const CreditCard = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.inputmask_credit")}>
            <InputMask
                disabled={false}
                mask="9999-9999-9999-9999"
                placeholder="0000-0000-0000-0000" />
        </Label>
    );
};
Custom Mask story ok 
const CustomMask = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.inputmask_custom")}>
            <InputMask disabled={false} mask="aaaa-9999-*" placeholder="ABCD-1234-X" />
        </Label>
    );
};
