InteractiveArea

components-internal-interactivearea · ./stories/Internal/InteractiveArea/InteractiveArea.stories.tsx
A base component for creating interactive surfaces like Dropzones, EmptyStates, etc.
Prop types (react-docgen) 10 prop types 
Component: src/components/layout/InteractiveArea/InteractiveArea.tsx::InteractiveArea
Props:
/**
 * Action elements (buttons, etc.)
 */
actions?: ReactNode

/**
 * Background variant
 */
bgVariant?: "default" | "transparent" | "muted" = "default"

/**
 * Area description
 */
description?: ReactNode

/**
 * Whether the area is disabled
 */
disabled?: boolean = false

/**
 * Icon to display
 */
icon?: ReactNode

/**
 * Whether the area is clickable
 */
isClickable?: boolean = false

/**
 * Whether the area is currently in a dragging state (for dropzone)
 */
isDragging?: boolean = false

/**
 * Size variation
 */
size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg" = "md"

/**
 * Area title
 */
title?: ReactNode

/**
 * Border variant
 */
variant?: "dashed" | "solid" | "none" = "dashed"
Imports 
import { Button, ContextMenu, ContextMenuItem, Icon, InteractiveArea } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <InteractiveArea
            icon={<Icon name="DocumentIcon" />}
            variant="dashed"
            title={t("doc.ia_empty_title")}
            description={t("doc.ia_empty_desc")} />
    );
};
Clickable story ok 
const Clickable = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <InteractiveArea
            isClickable
            title={t("doc.ia_empty_title")}
            description={t("doc.ia_clickable_desc")} />
    );
};
With Actions story ok 
const WithActions = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <InteractiveArea
            title={t("doc.ia_empty_title")}
            description={t("doc.ia_empty_desc")}
            actions={
              <>
                <Button label={t("upload")} variant="filled" />
                <Button label={t("learn.more")} variant="outlined" />
              </>
            } />
    );
};
Large story ok 
const Large = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <InteractiveArea
            size="lg"
            title={t("doc.ia_empty_title")}
            description={t("doc.ia_empty_desc")} />
    );
};
Small story ok 
const Small = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <InteractiveArea
            size="sm"
            title={t("doc.ia_empty_title")}
            description={t("doc.ia_compact_desc")} />
    );
};
With Context Menu story ok 
const WithContextMenu = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <ContextMenu
            menu={
              <>
                <ContextMenuItem icon={<Icon name="EditIcon" />}>{t("a11y.edit") || "Edit"}</ContextMenuItem>
                <ContextMenuItem icon={<Icon name="TrashIcon" />} danger>{t("a11y.delete") || "Delete"}</ContextMenuItem>
              </>
            }>
            <InteractiveArea
                variant="solid"
                bgVariant="muted"
                title={t("doc.ia_context_title")}
                description={t("doc.ia_context_desc")} />
        </ContextMenu>
    );
};

KanbanBoard

components-data-structures-kanban · ./stories/Kanban/Kanban.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 2 prop types 
Component: src/components/data-display/Kanban/Kanban.tsx
Props:
/**
 * タッチデバイス向けの移動ボタンUIを強制表示する。
 * Storybookでのモバイルプレビューや開発時の確認に使用する。
 */
forceMobileUI?: boolean = false

/**
 * カードが別の列にドロップ／移動された際に呼び出されるコールバック。
 */
onCardMove?: (
  cardId: string,
  fromColumnId: string,
  toColumnId: string,
) => void
Imports 
import { KanbanBoard } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

  const cardLabels: Record<string, string> = {
    "card-1": t("story.kanban_card_design"),
    "card-2": t("story.kanban_card_research"),
    "card-3": t("story.kanban_card_develop"),
    "card-4": t("story.kanban_card_review"),
    "card-5": t("story.kanban_card_deploy"),
    "card-6": t("story.kanban_card_done1"),
  };

  const [columns, setColumns] = useState<Columns>({
    todo: ["card-1", "card-2"],
    inProgress: ["card-3"],
    review: ["card-4"],
    done: ["card-5", "card-6"],
  });

  const handleCardMove = (
    cardId: string,
    fromColumnId: string,
    toColumnId: string,
  ) => {
    setColumns((prev) => {
      const next = { ...prev };
      next[fromColumnId] = prev[fromColumnId].filter((id) => id !== cardId);
      next[toColumnId] = [...prev[toColumnId], cardId];
      return next;
    });
  };

  return (
    <KanbanBoard onCardMove={handleCardMove}>
      <KanbanBoard.Column
        id="todo"
        title={t("story.kanban_col_todo")}
        cardCount={columns.todo.length}
      >
        {columns.todo.map((id) => (
          <KanbanBoard.Card key={id} id={id}>
            {cardLabels[id]}
          </KanbanBoard.Card>
        ))}
      </KanbanBoard.Column>
      <KanbanBoard.Column
        id="inProgress"
        title={t("story.kanban_col_in_progress")}
        cardCount={columns.inProgress.length}
      >
        {columns.inProgress.map((id) => (
          <KanbanBoard.Card key={id} id={id}>
            {cardLabels[id]}
          </KanbanBoard.Card>
        ))}
      </KanbanBoard.Column>
      <KanbanBoard.Column
        id="review"
        title={t("story.kanban_col_review")}
        cardCount={columns.review.length}
      >
        {columns.review.map((id) => (
          <KanbanBoard.Card key={id} id={id}>
            {cardLabels[id]}
          </KanbanBoard.Card>
        ))}
      </KanbanBoard.Column>
      <KanbanBoard.Column
        id="done"
        title={t("story.kanban_col_done")}
        cardCount={columns.done.length}
      >
        {columns.done.map((id) => (
          <KanbanBoard.Card key={id} id={id}>
            {cardLabels[id]}
          </KanbanBoard.Card>
        ))}
      </KanbanBoard.Column>
    </KanbanBoard>
  );
};
With Disabled Card story ok 
const WithDisabledCard = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

  const [columns, setColumns] = useState<Columns>({
    todo: ["card-1", "card-2"],
    done: ["card-3"],
  });

  const handleCardMove = (
    cardId: string,
    fromColumnId: string,
    toColumnId: string,
  ) => {
    setColumns((prev) => {
      const next = { ...prev };
      next[fromColumnId] = prev[fromColumnId].filter((id) => id !== cardId);
      next[toColumnId] = [...prev[toColumnId], cardId];
      return next;
    });
  };

  return (
    <KanbanBoard onCardMove={handleCardMove}>
      <KanbanBoard.Column
        id="todo"
        title={t("story.kanban_col_todo")}
        cardCount={columns.todo.length}
      >
        <KanbanBoard.Card id="card-1">
          {t("story.kanban_card_design")}
        </KanbanBoard.Card>
        <KanbanBoard.Card id="card-2" disabled>
          {t("story.kanban_card_locked")}
        </KanbanBoard.Card>
      </KanbanBoard.Column>
      <KanbanBoard.Column
        id="done"
        title={t("story.kanban_col_done")}
        cardCount={columns.done.length}
      >
        <KanbanBoard.Card id="card-3">
          {t("story.kanban_card_done1")}
        </KanbanBoard.Card>
      </KanbanBoard.Column>
    </KanbanBoard>
  );
};
Mobile UI story ok 
const MobileUI = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

  const [columns, setColumns] = useState<Columns>({
    todo: ["card-1", "card-2"],
    inProgress: ["card-3"],
    done: ["card-4"],
  });

  const cardLabels: Record<string, string> = {
    "card-1": t("story.kanban_card_design"),
    "card-2": t("story.kanban_card_research"),
    "card-3": t("story.kanban_card_develop"),
    "card-4": t("story.kanban_card_done1"),
  };

  const handleCardMove = (
    cardId: string,
    fromColumnId: string,
    toColumnId: string,
  ) => {
    setColumns((prev) => {
      const next = { ...prev };
      next[fromColumnId] = prev[fromColumnId].filter((id) => id !== cardId);
      next[toColumnId] = [...prev[toColumnId], cardId];
      return next;
    });
  };

  return (
    <KanbanBoard onCardMove={handleCardMove} forceMobileUI>
      <KanbanBoard.Column
        id="todo"
        title={t("story.kanban_col_todo")}
        cardCount={columns.todo.length}
      >
        {columns.todo.map((id) => (
          <KanbanBoard.Card key={id} id={id}>
            {cardLabels[id]}
          </KanbanBoard.Card>
        ))}
      </KanbanBoard.Column>
      <KanbanBoard.Column
        id="inProgress"
        title={t("story.kanban_col_in_progress")}
        cardCount={columns.inProgress.length}
      >
        {columns.inProgress.map((id) => (
          <KanbanBoard.Card key={id} id={id}>
            {cardLabels[id]}
          </KanbanBoard.Card>
        ))}
      </KanbanBoard.Column>
      <KanbanBoard.Column
        id="done"
        title={t("story.kanban_col_done")}
        cardCount={columns.done.length}
      >
        {columns.done.map((id) => (
          <KanbanBoard.Card key={id} id={id}>
            {cardLabels[id]}
          </KanbanBoard.Card>
        ))}
      </KanbanBoard.Column>
    </KanbanBoard>
  );
};

/**

size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg" = "md"

import { Kbd } from "wimui";
Primary story ok 
const Primary = () => <Kbd size="md">⌘</Kbd>;
Small story ok 
const Small = () => <Kbd size="sm">K</Kbd>;
Combined story ok 
const Combined = () => (
  <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "4px", alignItems: "center" }}>
    <Kbd>⌘</Kbd>
    <span>+</span>
    <Kbd>K</Kbd>
  </div>
);
Keyboard Symbols story ok 
const KeyboardSymbols = () => (
  <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "8px", flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
    <Kbd>Shift</Kbd>
    <Kbd>Ctrl</Kbd>
    <Kbd>Option</Kbd>
    <Kbd>Command</Kbd>
    <Kbd>Enter</Kbd>
    <Kbd>⌫</Kbd>
    <Kbd>⎋</Kbd>
  </div>
);

Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <LinkButton
            label={t("story.linkbutton_google")}
            href="https://google.com"
            target="_blank"
            icon="ExternalLinkIcon"
            iconPosition="right" />
    );
};

Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 4 prop types 
Component: src/components/data-display/List/List.tsx::List
Props:
as?: "ul" | "ol" = "ul"

children: React.ReactNode

size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg" = "md"

spacing?: "tight" | "normal" | "loose" = "normal"
Imports 
import { List, ListItem } from "wimui";
Unordered story ok 
const Unordered = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <List as="ul">
            <ListItem>{t("story.list_item1")}</ListItem>
            <ListItem>{t("story.list_item2")}</ListItem>
            <ListItem>
                {t("story.list_item3")} {t("story.list_item3_desc")}
            </ListItem>
        </List>
    );
};
Ordered story ok 
const Ordered = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <List as="ol">
            <ListItem>{t("story.list_step1")}</ListItem>
            <ListItem>{t("story.list_step2")}</ListItem>
            <ListItem>{t("story.list_step3")}</ListItem>
        </List>
    );
};
Small story ok 
const Small = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <List size="sm">
            <ListItem>
                {t("story.list_item_small")}1
                        </ListItem>
            <ListItem>
                {t("story.list_item_small")}2
                        </ListItem>
        </List>
    );
};
Large story ok 
const Large = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <List size="lg">
            <ListItem>
                {t("story.list_item_large")}1
                        </ListItem>
            <ListItem>
                {t("story.list_item_large")}2
                        </ListItem>
        </List>
    );
};
Loose Spacing story ok 
const LooseSpacing = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <List spacing="loose">
            <ListItem>
                {t("story.list_loose")}1
                        </ListItem>
            <ListItem>
                {t("story.list_loose")}2
                        </ListItem>
        </List>
    );
};
With Icons story ok 
const WithIcons = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <List>
            <ListItem iconName="CheckIcon">{t("story.list_task_completed")}</ListItem>
            <ListItem iconName="PdfIcon">{t("story.list_manual_pdf")}</ListItem>
            <ListItem iconName="ImageIcon">{t("story.list_gallery")}</ListItem>
            <ListItem iconName="EmailIcon">{t("story.list_email")}</ListItem>
            <ListItem iconName="PhoneIcon">{t("story.list_phone")}</ListItem>
            <ListItem iconName="ExternalLinkIcon" iconPosition="right">
                {t("story.list_view_details")}
            </ListItem>
        </List>
    );
};

Loader

components-loading-states-loader · ./stories/Loader/Loader.stories.tsx
データの読み込み中や処理中であることを示すためのコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 3 prop types 
Component: src/components/feedback/Loader/Loader.tsx::Loader
Props:
/**
 * ローダーの色。
 */
color?: | "primary"
| "secondary"
| "success"
| "warning"
| "error"
| "neutral"
| "currentColor"
| WimColor = "primary"

/**
 * ローダーのサイズ。
 */
size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg" = "md"

/**
 * ローダーのアニメーション形式。
 */
variant?: "bars" | "dots" | "pulse" = "bars"
Imports 
import { Loader } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <Loader variant="bars" color="primary" size="md" />;
Variants story ok 
const Variants = () => <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "48px", alignItems: "center" }}>
    <div
        style={{
          display: "flex",
          flexDirection: "column",
          alignItems: "center",
          gap: "8px",
        }}>
        <Loader variant="bars" />
        <span style={{ fontSize: "12px", color: "var(--wim-color-text-secondary)" }}>bars</span>
    </div>
    <div
        style={{
          display: "flex",
          flexDirection: "column",
          alignItems: "center",
          gap: "8px",
        }}>
        <Loader variant="dots" />
        <span style={{ fontSize: "12px", color: "var(--wim-color-text-secondary)" }}>dots</span>
    </div>
    <div
        style={{
          display: "flex",
          flexDirection: "column",
          alignItems: "center",
          gap: "8px",
        }}>
        <Loader variant="pulse" />
        <span style={{ fontSize: "12px", color: "var(--wim-color-text-secondary)" }}>pulse</span>
    </div>
</div>;
Colors story ok 
const Colors = () => <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "24px", alignItems: "center" }}>
    <Loader color="primary" />
    <Loader color="secondary" />
    <Loader color="success" />
    <Loader color="warning" />
    <Loader color="error" />
    <Loader color="neutral" />
</div>;
Sizes story ok 
const Sizes = () => <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "32px" }}>
    <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "24px", alignItems: "center" }}>
        <Loader variant="bars" size="sm" />
        <Loader variant="bars" size="md" />
        <Loader variant="bars" size="lg" />
    </div>
    <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "24px", alignItems: "center" }}>
        <Loader variant="dots" size="sm" />
        <Loader variant="dots" size="md" />
        <Loader variant="dots" size="lg" />
    </div>
    <div
        style={{
          display: "flex",
          gap: "24px",
          alignItems: "center",
          height: "48px",
        }}>
        <Loader variant="pulse" size="sm" />
        <Loader variant="pulse" size="md" />
        <Loader variant="pulse" size="lg" />
    </div>
</div>;
Docs doc ok

LoadingOverlay

components-loading-states-loadingoverlay · ./stories/LoadingOverlay/LoadingOverlay.stories.tsx
画面全体または特定の要素をオーバーレイし、ローディング状態を表示するコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 10 prop types 
Component: src/components/feedback/LoadingOverlay/LoadingOverlay.tsx::LoadingOverlay
Props:
/**
 * オーバーレイの背景スタイル。
 */
backdropVariant?: "light" | "dark" = "dark"

/**
 * 背景のぼかし効果の強さ。
 */
blur?: "none" | "sm" | "md" | "lg" = "sm"

/**
 * カスタムローディングコンテンツ。
 */
children?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * position: fixed を使用するかどうか（画面全体をカバー）。
 */
fixed?: boolean = false

/**
 * ローディングインジケーターの色。
 */
loaderColor?: | "primary"
| "secondary"
| "success"
| "warning"
| "error"
| "neutral"
| "currentColor" = "primary"

/**
 * ローディングインジケーターのサイズ。
 */
loaderSize?: "sm" | "md" | "lg" | "xl" = "lg"

/**
 * ローディングインジケーターのタイプ。
 */
loaderType?: "spinner" | "bars" | "dots" | "pulse" = "spinner"

/**
 * ローディングメッセージ。
 */
message?: string

/**
 * オーバーレイの表示/非表示を制御します。
 */
visible?: boolean = false

/**
 * z-index の値。
 */
zIndex?: number
Imports 
import { Button, Icon, LoadingOverlay } from "wimui";
Basic story ok 
const Basic = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div
            style={{
              position: "relative",
              height: "400px",
              border: "1px solid #ddd",
              borderRadius: "8px",
            }}>
            <div style={{ padding: "20px" }}>
                <h3>{t("story.loading_overlay_content_title")}</h3>
                <p>{t("story.loading_overlay_content_desc")}</p>
            </div>
            <LoadingOverlay visible loaderType="spinner" loaderSize="lg" loaderColor="primary" />
        </div>
    );
};
With Message story ok 
const WithMessage = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div
            style={{
              position: "relative",
              height: "400px",
              border: "1px solid #ddd",
              borderRadius: "8px",
            }}>
            <div style={{ padding: "20px" }}>
                <h3>{t("story.loading_overlay_content_title")}</h3>
                <p>{t("story.loading_overlay_with_msg_desc")}</p>
            </div>
            <LoadingOverlay
                visible
                loaderType="spinner"
                loaderSize="lg"
                loaderColor="primary"
                message={t("story.loading_overlay_loading_data")} />
        </div>
    );
};
Different Loader Types story ok 
const DifferentLoaderTypes = () => (
  <div
    style={{
      display: "grid",
      gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(2, 1fr)",
      gap: "20px",
    }}
  >
    {(["spinner", "bars", "dots", "pulse"] as const).map((type) => (
      <div
        key={type}
        style={{
          position: "relative",
          height: "300px",
          border: "1px solid #ddd",
          borderRadius: "8px",
        }}
      >
        <div style={{ padding: "20px" }}>
          <h4>{type.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + type.slice(1)}</h4>
        </div>
        <LoadingOverlay visible={true} loaderType={type} />
      </div>
    ))}
  </div>
);
Backdrop Variants story ok 
const BackdropVariants = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div
      style={{
        display: "grid",
        gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(2, 1fr)",
        gap: "20px",
      }}
    >
      <div
        style={{
          position: "relative",
          height: "300px",
          border: "1px solid #ddd",
          borderRadius: "8px",
          background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%)",
        }}
      >
        <div style={{ padding: "20px", color: "white" }}>
          <h4>{t("story.loading_overlay_light_backdrop")}</h4>
        </div>
        <LoadingOverlay
          visible={true}
          backdropVariant="light"
          loaderColor="primary"
        />
      </div>
      <div
        style={{
          position: "relative",
          height: "300px",
          border: "1px solid #ddd",
          borderRadius: "8px",
          background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%)",
        }}
      >
        <div style={{ padding: "20px", color: "white" }}>
          <h4>{t("story.loading_overlay_dark_backdrop")}</h4>
        </div>
        <LoadingOverlay
          visible={true}
          backdropVariant="dark"
          loaderColor="currentColor"
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
Blur Effects story ok 
const BlurEffects = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div
      style={{
        display: "grid",
        gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(2, 1fr)",
        gap: "20px",
      }}
    >
      {(["none", "sm", "md", "lg"] as const).map((blurLevel) => (
        <div
          key={blurLevel}
          style={{
            position: "relative",
            height: "300px",
            border: "1px solid #ddd",
            borderRadius: "8px",
            backgroundImage: "url(https://picsum.photos/400/300)",
            backgroundSize: "cover",
          }}
        >
          <div
            style={{
              padding: "20px",
              color: "white",
              textShadow: "0 0 4px black",
            }}
          >
            <h4>
              {t("story.loading_overlay_blur")}: {blurLevel}
            </h4>
          </div>
          <LoadingOverlay visible={true} blur={blurLevel} />
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
};
Full Screen story ok 
const FullScreen = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [loading, setLoading] = React.useState(false);

    const handleClick = () => {
      setLoading(true);
      setTimeout(() => setLoading(false), 3000);
    };

    return (
        <div style={{ padding: "20px" }}>
            <Button onClick={handleClick}>
                {t("story.loading_overlay_show_fullscreen")}
            </Button>
            <p>{t("story.loading_overlay_fullscreen_desc")}</p>
            <LoadingOverlay
                fixed
                loaderType="spinner"
                loaderSize="xl"
                visible={loading}
                message={t("story.loading_overlay_loading_app")} />
        </div>
    );
};
Interactive story ok 
const Interactive = function InteractiveStory() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  const [loading, setLoading] = React.useState(false);

  const handleClick = () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setTimeout(() => setLoading(false), 2000);
  };

  return (
    <div
      style={{
        position: "relative",
        height: "400px",
        border: "1px solid #ddd",
        borderRadius: "8px",
        padding: "20px",
      }}
    >
      <Button onClick={handleClick} disabled={loading} label={t("story.loading_overlay_load_data")} />


      <div style={{ marginTop: "20px" }}>

        <p>{t("story.loading_overlay_long_content")}</p>
      </div>
      <LoadingOverlay
        visible={loading}
        loaderType="spinner"
        loaderSize="lg"
        message={t("story.loading_overlay_fetching_data")}
      />
    </div>
  );
};
Custom Loader story ok 
const CustomLoader = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div
            style={{
              position: "relative",
              height: "400px",
              border: "1px solid #ddd",
              borderRadius: "8px",
            }}>
            <div style={{ padding: "20px" }}>
                <h3>{t("story.loading_overlay_custom_title")}</h3>
                <p>{t("story.loading_overlay_custom_desc")}</p>
            </div>
            <LoadingOverlay visible>
                <div style={{ textAlign: "center", color: "white" }}>
                    <Icon
                        name="ClockIcon"
                        style={{ width: "48px", height: "48px", marginBottom: "16px" }} />
                    <div style={{ fontSize: "18px", fontWeight: "bold" }}>
                        {t("story.loading_overlay_wait")}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </LoadingOverlay>
        </div>
    );
};

className?: string

Marquee

components-utilities-marquee · ./stories/Marquee/Marquee.stories.tsx
テキストや画像を水平・垂直方向にスクロールさせるためのアニメーションコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 5 prop types 
Component: src/components/data-display/Marquee/Marquee.tsx::Marquee
Props:
/**
 * アニメーションの速度（秒）。デフォルトは `20`。
 */
duration?: number = 20

/**
 * ホバー時にアニメーションを一時停止するかどうか。
 */
pauseOnHover?: boolean = true

/**
 * コンテンツの繰り返し回数。シームレスなループのために調整が必要な場合があります。デフォルトは `2`。
 */
repeat?: number = 2

/**
 * アニメーションを逆方向にするかどうか。
 */
reverse?: boolean = false

/**
 * 垂直方向に流すかどうか。
 */
vertical?: boolean = false
Imports 
import { Badge, Group, Marquee } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Marquee>
            <Group gap="xl">
                <Badge color="primary">{t("story.marquee_new_feature")}</Badge>
                <span style={{ fontSize: "1.2rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>
                    {t("story.marquee_welcome")}
                </span>
                <Badge color="secondary">{t("story.marquee_update")}</Badge>
                <span style={{ fontSize: "1.2rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>
                    {t("story.marquee_check_out")}
                </span>
            </Group>
        </Marquee>
    );
};
Fast story ok 
const Fast = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Marquee duration={5}>
            <Group gap="xl">
                <Badge color="primary">{t("story.marquee_new_feature")}</Badge>
                <span style={{ fontSize: "1.2rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>
                    {t("story.marquee_welcome")}
                </span>
                <Badge color="secondary">{t("story.marquee_update")}</Badge>
                <span style={{ fontSize: "1.2rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>
                    {t("story.marquee_check_out")}
                </span>
            </Group>
        </Marquee>
    );
};
Slow story ok 
const Slow = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Marquee duration={40}>
            <Group gap="xl">
                <Badge color="primary">{t("story.marquee_new_feature")}</Badge>
                <span style={{ fontSize: "1.2rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>
                    {t("story.marquee_welcome")}
                </span>
                <Badge color="secondary">{t("story.marquee_update")}</Badge>
                <span style={{ fontSize: "1.2rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>
                    {t("story.marquee_check_out")}
                </span>
            </Group>
        </Marquee>
    );
};
Reverse story ok 
const Reverse = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Marquee reverse>
            <Group gap="xl">
                <Badge color="primary">{t("story.marquee_new_feature")}</Badge>
                <span style={{ fontSize: "1.2rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>
                    {t("story.marquee_welcome")}
                </span>
                <Badge color="secondary">{t("story.marquee_update")}</Badge>
                <span style={{ fontSize: "1.2rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>
                    {t("story.marquee_check_out")}
                </span>
            </Group>
        </Marquee>
    );
};
Vertical story ok 
const Vertical = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ height: "200px", border: "1px solid #ccc" }}>
            <Marquee vertical duration={5}>
                <div style={{ padding: "10px", textAlign: "center", fontWeight: "bold" }}>
                    {t("story.marquee_item", { count: 1 })}
                </div>
                <div style={{ padding: "10px", textAlign: "center", fontWeight: "bold" }}>
                    {t("story.marquee_item", { count: 2 })}
                </div>
                <div style={{ padding: "10px", textAlign: "center", fontWeight: "bold" }}>
                    {t("story.marquee_item", { count: 3 })}
                </div>
            </Marquee>
        </div>
    );
};

Masonry

components-layout-masonry · ./stories/Masonry/Masonry.stories.tsx
Masonry layout component. It arranges items in columns, filling in gaps to minimize empty space.
Prop types (react-docgen) 2 prop types 
Component: src/components/layout/Masonry/Masonry.tsx::Masonry
Props:
/**
 * Number of columns
 */
columns?: number = 3

/**
 * Spacing between items
 */
spacing?: number | string = 16
Imports 
import { Box, Masonry } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <MasonryDemo columns={3} spacing={16} />;
Many Columns story ok 
const ManyColumns = () => <MasonryDemo columns={5} spacing={10} />;
Large Spacing story ok 
const LargeSpacing = () => <MasonryDemo columns={3} spacing={40} />;

## <T k="doc.usage" />

```tsx
import { Masonry } from "@/components/layout/Masonry/Masonry";
import { Box } from "../Box/Box";

const Demo = () => (
  <Masonry columns={3} spacing={16}>
    <Box h={150} bg="lightblue">
      1
    </Box>
    <Box h={200} bg="lightgreen">
      2
    </Box>
    <Box h={100} bg="lightpink">
      3
    </Box>
    <Box h={250} bg="lightyellow">
      4
    </Box>
  </Masonry>
);
```

<Canvas of={MasonryStories.Default} />

Mentions

components-basic-inputs-mentions · ./stories/Mentions/Mentions.stories.tsx
テキスト入力中に特定の文字（@など）をトリガーにして候補を表示し、選択できるようにするコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 3 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/Mentions/Mentions.tsx::Mentions
Props:
onSelect?: (option: MentionOption) => void

options: MentionOption[]

trigger?: string = "@"
Imports 
import { Label, Mentions } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.mentions_label_user")}>
            <Mentions
                disabled={false}
                options={mockUsers}
                placeholder={t("story.mentions_placeholder_user")}
                fullWidth
                rows={4} />
        </Label>
    );
};
Custom Trigger story ok 
const CustomTrigger = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "24px" }}>
            <Label label={t("story.mentions_label_char")}>
                <Mentions
                    disabled={false}
                    fullWidth
                    rows={3}
                    trigger="#"
                    placeholder={t("story.mentions_placeholder_char")}
                    options={[
                      { id: 1, display: "SuperMario" },
                      { id: 2, display: "Luigi" },
                      { id: 3, display: "Peach" },
                    ]} />
            </Label>
            <Label label={t("story.mentions_label_cmd")}>
                <Mentions
                    disabled={false}
                    fullWidth
                    rows={3}
                    trigger="/"
                    placeholder={t("story.mentions_placeholder_cmd")}
                    options={[
                      { id: 1, display: "help" },
                      { id: 2, display: "settings" },
                      { id: 3, display: "logout" },
                    ]} />
            </Label>
        </div>
    );
};

Menu

components-overlays-menu · ./stories/Menu/Menu.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 5 prop types 
Component: src/components/overlay/Menu/Menu.tsx::Menu
Props:
children: ReactNode

className?: string

/**
 * Default opened submenu keys
 */
defaultOpenKeys?: string[] = []

/**
 * Default selected keys
 */
defaultSelectedKeys?: string[]

/**
 * Mode of the menu
 */
mode?: "vertical" | "horizontal" | "inline" = "vertical"
Imports 
import { Icon, Menu, MenuDivider, MenuItem, MenuItemGroup, SubMenu } from "wimui";
Basic story ok 
const Basic = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Menu>
            <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_home")}</MenuItem>
            <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_about")}</MenuItem>
            <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_services")}</MenuItem>
            <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_contact")}</MenuItem>
        </Menu>
    );
};
With Icons story ok 
const WithIcons = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Menu>
            <MenuItem icon={<Icon name="CheckIcon" size="sm" />}>
                {t("story.menu_dashboard")}
            </MenuItem>
            <MenuItem icon={<Icon name="CopyIcon" size="sm" />}>
                {t("story.menu_projects")}
            </MenuItem>
            <MenuItem icon={<Icon name="CloseIcon" size="sm" />}>
                {t("story.menu_settings")}
            </MenuItem>
        </Menu>
    );
};
With Sub Menu story ok 
const WithSubMenu = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Menu defaultOpenKeys={["sub1"]}>
            <MenuItem icon={<Icon name="CheckIcon" size="sm" />}>
                {t("story.menu_dashboard")}
            </MenuItem>
            <SubMenu
                itemKey="sub1"
                title={t("story.menu_products")}
                icon={<Icon name="CopyIcon" size="sm" />}>
                <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_product")}1</MenuItem>
                <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_product")}2</MenuItem>
                <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_product")}3</MenuItem>
            </SubMenu>
            <SubMenu
                itemKey="sub2"
                title={t("story.menu_services")}
                icon={<Icon name="CloseIcon" size="sm" />}>
                <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_service")}A</MenuItem>
                <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_service")}B</MenuItem>
            </SubMenu>
            <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_contact")}</MenuItem>
        </Menu>
    );
};
With Groups story ok 
const WithGroups = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Menu>
            <MenuItemGroup title={t("story.menu_main_pages")}>
                <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_home")}</MenuItem>
                <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_about")}</MenuItem>
                <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_contact")}</MenuItem>
            </MenuItemGroup>
            <MenuDivider />
            <MenuItemGroup title={t("story.menu_user_actions")}>
                <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_profile")}</MenuItem>
                <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_settings")}</MenuItem>
                <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_logout")}</MenuItem>
            </MenuItemGroup>
        </Menu>
    );
};
Horizontal story ok 
const Horizontal = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Menu mode="horizontal">
            <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_home")}</MenuItem>
            <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_about")}</MenuItem>
            <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_services")}</MenuItem>
            <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_contact")}</MenuItem>
        </Menu>
    );
};
Inline story ok 
const Inline = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Menu mode="inline" defaultOpenKeys={["sub1"]}>
            <MenuItem icon={<Icon name="CheckIcon" size="sm" />}>
                {t("story.menu_dashboard")}
            </MenuItem>
            <SubMenu
                itemKey="sub1"
                title={t("story.menu_settings")}
                icon={<Icon name="CopyIcon" size="sm" />}>
                <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_profile_settings")}</MenuItem>
                <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_account_settings")}</MenuItem>
                <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_privacy_settings")}</MenuItem>
            </SubMenu>
            <MenuItem icon={<Icon name="CloseIcon" size="sm" />}>
                {t("story.menu_logout")}
            </MenuItem>
        </Menu>
    );
};
With Disabled Items story ok 
const WithDisabledItems = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Menu>
            <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_active_item")}</MenuItem>
            <MenuItem disabled>{t("story.menu_disabled_item")}</MenuItem>
            <MenuItem>{t("story.menu_another_active_item") || "Another Active Item"}</MenuItem>
        </Menu>
    );
};

## <T k="doc.usage" />

```tsx
import { Menu, MenuItem, SubMenu, MenuItemGroup, MenuDivider } from "wimui";

<Menu>
  <MenuItem icon={<Icon name="CheckIcon" />}>Home</MenuItem>
  <MenuItem>About</MenuItem>
  <SubMenu itemKey="services" title="Services">
    <MenuItem>Service 1</MenuItem>
    <MenuItem>Service 2</MenuItem>
  </SubMenu>
</Menu>;
```

<Primary />

MultiSelect

components-selection-controls-multiselect · ./stories/MultiSelect/MultiSelect.stories.tsx
ユーザーが定義済みの選択肢から複数を選択するためのドロップダウンメニュー。
Prop types (react-docgen) 16 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/MultiSelect/MultiSelect.tsx::MultiSelect
Props:
/**
 * Whether to show a clear button to remove all selections
 */
allowClear?: boolean = false

aria-describedby?: string

aria-label?: string

aria-labelledby?: string

className?: string

defaultValue?: string[] = []

disabled?: boolean = false

error?: string

/**
 * Unique ID for the component
 */
id?: string

label?: string

layout?: "vertical" | "horizontal"

onChange?: (value: string[]) => void

options?: MultiSelectOption[] = []

placeholder?: string = "Select options..."

required?: boolean

value?: string[]
Imports 
import { MultiSelect } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const options = [
      { label: t("story.multiselect_apple"), value: "apple" },
      { label: t("story.multiselect_banana"), value: "banana" },
      { label: t("story.multiselect_orange"), value: "orange" },
      { label: t("story.multiselect_grape"), value: "grape" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt4"), value: "disabled", disabled: true },
    ];

    return (
        <MultiSelect
            disabled={false}
            options={options}
            placeholder={t("story.multiselect_fruits")} />
    );
};
With Label story ok 
const WithLabel = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const options = [
      { label: t("story.multiselect_apple"), value: "apple" },
      { label: t("story.multiselect_banana"), value: "banana" },
      { label: t("story.multiselect_orange"), value: "orange" },
      { label: t("story.multiselect_grape"), value: "grape" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt4"), value: "disabled", disabled: true },
    ];

    return (
        <MultiSelect
            disabled={false}
            label={t("story.multiselect_favorites")}
            options={options}
            placeholder={t("story.selectbox_placeholder")} />
    );
};
Multiple Selected story ok 
const MultipleSelected = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const options = [
      { label: t("story.multiselect_apple"), value: "apple" },
      { label: t("story.multiselect_banana"), value: "banana" },
      { label: t("story.multiselect_orange"), value: "orange" },
      { label: t("story.multiselect_grape"), value: "grape" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt4"), value: "disabled", disabled: true },
    ];
    return <MultiSelect disabled={false} options={options} defaultValue={["apple", "orange"]} />;
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const options = [
      { label: t("story.multiselect_apple"), value: "apple" },
      { label: t("story.multiselect_banana"), value: "banana" },
      { label: t("story.multiselect_orange"), value: "orange" },
      { label: t("story.multiselect_grape"), value: "grape" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt4"), value: "disabled", disabled: true },
    ];
    return <MultiSelect options={options} disabled={true} defaultValue={["banana"]} />;
};
With Clear Button story ok 
const WithClearButton = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const options = [
      { label: t("story.multiselect_apple"), value: "apple" },
      { label: t("story.multiselect_banana"), value: "banana" },
      { label: t("story.multiselect_orange"), value: "orange" },
      { label: t("story.multiselect_grape"), value: "grape" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt4"), value: "disabled", disabled: true },
    ];

    return (
        <MultiSelect
            disabled={false}
            options={options}
            allowClear={true}
            defaultValue={["apple", "banana"]}
            placeholder={t("story.multiselect_fruits")} />
    );
};

Navbar

components-application-shell-navbar · ./stories/Navbar/Navbar.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 8 prop types 
Component: src/components/layout/Navbar/Navbar.tsx::Navbar
Props:
/**
 * Border at the bottom
 */
bordered?: boolean

/**
 * Initial state for mobile menu
 */
defaultMenuOpen?: boolean = false

/**
 * Fixed position at the top
 */
fixed?: boolean

/**
 * Glassmorphism effect
 */
glass?: boolean

/**
 * Controlled state for mobile menu
 */
isMenuOpen?: boolean

/**
 * Callback when menu state changes
 */
onMenuOpenChange?: (isOpen: boolean) => void

/**
 * Sticky position at the top
 */
sticky?: boolean

/**
 * Transparent background
 */
transparent?: boolean
Imports 
import { Button, Navbar } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Navbar bordered>
            <Navbar.Brand>
                <span>{t("story.navbar_logo")}</span>
            </Navbar.Brand>
            <Navbar.Content justify="end" hiddenOnMobile>
                <Navbar.Link href="#" active>
                    {t("story.navbar_home")}
                </Navbar.Link>
                <Navbar.Link href="#">{t("story.navbar_features")}</Navbar.Link>
                <Navbar.Link href="#">{t("story.navbar_pricing")}</Navbar.Link>
                <Navbar.Link href="#">{t("story.navbar_about")}</Navbar.Link>
            </Navbar.Content>
            <Navbar.Content justify="end" hiddenOnMobile>
                <Button variant="outlined" size="sm">
                    {t("story.navbar_login")}
                </Button>
            </Navbar.Content>
            <Navbar.Toggle />
            <Navbar.Menu>
                <Navbar.MenuItem active>{t("story.navbar_home")}</Navbar.MenuItem>
                <Navbar.MenuItem>{t("story.navbar_features")}</Navbar.MenuItem>
                <Navbar.MenuItem>{t("story.navbar_pricing")}</Navbar.MenuItem>
                <Navbar.MenuItem>{t("story.navbar_about")}</Navbar.MenuItem>
                <Navbar.MenuItem>{t("story.navbar_login")}</Navbar.MenuItem>
            </Navbar.Menu>
        </Navbar>
    );
};
Glass Effect story ok 
const GlassEffect = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div
            style={{
              height: "400px",
              background:
                "linear-gradient(45deg, #FF9A9E 0%, #FECFEF 99%, #FECFEF 100%)",
              position: "relative",
            }}>
            <Navbar glass fixed style={{ position: "absolute" }}>
                <Navbar.Brand>
                    <span>{t("story.navbar_glass_ui")}</span>
                </Navbar.Brand>
                <Navbar.Content justify="end" hiddenOnMobile>
                    <Navbar.Link href="#">{t("story.navbar_design")}</Navbar.Link>
                    <Navbar.Link href="#">{t("story.navbar_components")}</Navbar.Link>
                    <Navbar.Link href="#">{t("story.navbar_docs")}</Navbar.Link>
                </Navbar.Content>
                <Navbar.Toggle />
                <Navbar.Menu>
                    <Navbar.MenuItem>{t("story.navbar_design")}</Navbar.MenuItem>
                    <Navbar.MenuItem>{t("story.navbar_components")}</Navbar.MenuItem>
                    <Navbar.MenuItem>{t("story.navbar_docs")}</Navbar.MenuItem>
                </Navbar.Menu>
            </Navbar>
            <div style={{ paddingTop: "80px", paddingLeft: "24px", color: "white" }}>
                <h1>{t("story.navbar_glass_title")}</h1>
                <p>{t("story.navbar_glass_desc")}</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
With Mobile Menu story ok 
const WithMobileMenu = () => {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <Navbar bordered>
      <Navbar.Brand>
        <span>{t("story.navbar_mobile_app")}</span>
      </Navbar.Brand>
      <Navbar.Content justify="end" hiddenOnMobile>
        <Navbar.Link href="#">{t("story.navbar_overview")}</Navbar.Link>
        <Navbar.Link href="#">{t("story.navbar_activity")}</Navbar.Link>
      </Navbar.Content>
      <Navbar.Toggle />
      <Navbar.Menu>
        <Navbar.MenuItem>{t("story.navbar_overview")}</Navbar.MenuItem>
        <Navbar.MenuItem>{t("story.navbar_activity")}</Navbar.MenuItem>
      </Navbar.Menu>
    </Navbar>
  );
};
Centered Links story ok 
const CenteredLinks = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Navbar bordered>
            <Navbar.Brand>
                <span>{t("story.navbar_center")}</span>
            </Navbar.Brand>
            <Navbar.Content justify="center" hiddenOnMobile>
                <Navbar.Link href="#" active>
                    {t("story.navbar_product")}
                </Navbar.Link>
                <Navbar.Link href="#">{t("story.navbar_solutions")}</Navbar.Link>
                <Navbar.Link href="#">{t("story.navbar_resources")}</Navbar.Link>
            </Navbar.Content>
            <Navbar.Content justify="end" hiddenOnMobile>
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">
                    {t("story.navbar_signin")}
                </Button>
                <Button variant="filled" size="sm">
                    {t("story.navbar_signup")}
                </Button>
            </Navbar.Content>
            <Navbar.Toggle />
            <Navbar.Menu>
                <Navbar.MenuItem active>{t("story.navbar_product")}</Navbar.MenuItem>
                <Navbar.MenuItem>{t("story.navbar_solutions")}</Navbar.MenuItem>
                <Navbar.MenuItem>{t("story.navbar_resources")}</Navbar.MenuItem>
                <Navbar.MenuItem>{t("story.navbar_signin")}</Navbar.MenuItem>
                <Navbar.MenuItem>{t("story.navbar_signup")}</Navbar.MenuItem>
            </Navbar.Menu>
        </Navbar>
    );
};
Built In Responsive story ok 
const BuiltInResponsive = () => {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div
      style={{
        height: "400px",
        position: "relative",
        overflow: "hidden",
        border: "1px solid #ccc",
      }}
    >
      <Navbar
        bordered
        style={{ position: "absolute", top: 0, left: 0, right: 0 }}
      >
        <Navbar.Brand>
          <span>{t("story.navbar_responsive")}</span>
        </Navbar.Brand>
        <Navbar.Content justify="end" hiddenOnMobile>
          <Navbar.Link href="#">{t("story.navbar_dashboard")}</Navbar.Link>
          <Navbar.Link href="#">{t("story.navbar_settings")}</Navbar.Link>
          <Navbar.Link href="#">{t("story.navbar_profile")}</Navbar.Link>
        </Navbar.Content>
        <Navbar.Toggle />
        <Navbar.Menu>
          <Navbar.MenuItem>{t("story.navbar_dashboard")}</Navbar.MenuItem>
          <Navbar.MenuItem>{t("story.navbar_settings")}</Navbar.MenuItem>
          <Navbar.MenuItem>{t("story.navbar_profile")}</Navbar.MenuItem>
        </Navbar.Menu>
      </Navbar>
      <div style={{ padding: "80px 20px" }}>
        <p>{t("story.navbar_responsive_info")}</p>
        <p>{t("story.navbar_responsive_desc")}</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

Notification

components-alerts-notifications-notification · ./stories/Notification/Notification.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 8 prop types 
Component: src/components/feedback/Notification/Notification.tsx::Notification
Props:
/**
 * Additional class name
 */
className?: string

/**
 * Whether to show close button
 */
closable?: boolean = true

/**
 * The description of notification
 */
description?: ReactNode

/**
 * The icon of notification
 */
icon?: ReactNode

/**
 * The unique identifier of notification
 */
id?: string

/**
 * Callback when notification is closed
 */
onClose?: (id?: string) => void

/**
 * The status of notification
 */
status?: "info" | "success" | "warning" | "error"

/**
 * The title of notification
 */
title: ReactNode
Imports 
import { Notification } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Notification
            title={args.title || t("story.notification_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.notification_desc")} />
    );
};
Success story ok 
const Success = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Notification
            status="success"
            title={args.title || t("story.notification_success_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.notification_success_desc")} />
    );
};
Warning story ok 
const Warning = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Notification
            status="warning"
            title={args.title || t("story.notification_warning_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.notification_warning_desc")} />
    );
};
Error Status story ok 
const ErrorStatus = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Notification
            status="error"
            title={args.title || t("story.notification_error_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.notification_error_desc")} />
    );
};
Info story ok 
const Info = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Notification
            status="info"
            title={args.title || t("story.notification_info_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.notification_info_desc")} />
    );
};
Trigger story ok 
const Trigger = function Render() {
  const [visible, setVisible] = useState(false);
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div style={{ padding: "24px" }}>
      <button
        className="wim-button wim-button--primary"
        onClick={() => setVisible(true)}
      >
        {t("story.notification_show")}
      </button>
      {visible && (
        <div style={{ marginTop: "24px" }}>
          <Notification
            status="success"
            title={t("story.notification_success_title")}
            description={t("story.notification_triggered_desc")}
            onClose={() => setVisible(false)}
          />
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};
Docs doc ok

NumberInput

components-basic-inputs-numberinput · ./stories/NumberInput/NumberInput.stories.tsx
数値入力に特化したコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 4 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/NumberInput/NumberInput.tsx::NumberInput
Props:
/**
 * 小数点を許可するか (mode="number" の場合のみ有効)
 */
allowDecimal?: boolean = false

/**
 * 負の数を許可するか (mode="number" の場合のみ有効)
 */
allowNegative?: boolean = false

/**
 * スピンボタンを非表示にするか
 */
hideSpinButton?: boolean = true

/**
 * 'number': ネイティブの type="number" を使用（数量の増減など）
 * 'text': type="text" + inputmode を使用（クレカ番号、IDなど、ゼロを保持したい場合）
 */
mode?: "number" | "text" = "number"
Imports 
import { NumberInput } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <NumberInput placeholder={t("story.numberinput_placeholder")} />;
};
Numeric Mode story ok
数量の入力など、数値の増減が必要な場合（デフォルト）
const NumericMode = () => <NumberInput mode="number" hideSpinButton />;
Text Mode story ok
クレジットカード番号やIDなど、「記号としての数字」を入力する場合
const TextMode = () => <NumberInput mode="text" placeholder="XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX" />;
Show Spin Button story ok
ブラウザ標準のスピンボタンを表示したい場合
const ShowSpinButton = () => <NumberInput mode="number" hideSpinButton={false} />;
Decimal And Negative story ok
小数点や負の数を許可する場合
const DecimalAndNegative = () => <NumberInput mode="number" allowDecimal allowNegative placeholder="-123.45" />;
Docs doc ok

OtpInput

components-basic-inputs-otpinput · ./stories/OtpInput/OtpInput.stories.tsx
OTP（ワンタイムパスワード）入力用コンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 9 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/OtpInput/OtpInput.tsx::OtpInput
Props:
className?: string

disabled?: boolean = false

error?: string

label?: string

layout?: "vertical" | "horizontal"

length?: number = 6

onChange?: (value: string) => void

required?: boolean

value?: string = ""
Imports 
import { OtpInput } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <OtpInput disabled={false} length={4} />;
Length 6 story ok 
const Length6 = () => <OtpInput disabled={false} length={6} />;
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => <OtpInput disabled length={4} value="1234" />;
Error Status story ok 
const ErrorStatus = () => <OtpInput disabled={false} length={6} error="Invalid code" value="123456" />;
Controlled story ok 
const Controlled = () => {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  const [value, setValue] = useState("");
  return (
    <div>
      <OtpInput value={value} onChange={setValue} length={6} />
      <p style={{ marginTop: "1rem" }}>
        {t("story.otp_current_value")}: {value}
      </p>
      <button onClick={() => setValue("")} style={{ marginTop: "0.5rem" }}>
        {t("story.otp_clear")}
      </button>
    </div>
  );
};
Docs doc ok

OverlayBase

components-internal-overlaybase · ./stories/Internal/OverlayBase/OverlayBase.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 11 prop types 
Component: src/components/_internal/OverlayBase.tsx::OverlayBase
Props:
ariaModal?: boolean = true

children: ReactNode

closeOnEscape?: boolean = true

closeOnOverlayClick?: boolean = true

contentClassName?: string

onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void

open: boolean

overlayClassName?: string

overlayTransitionProps?: Partial<React.ComponentProps<typeof Transition>>

role?: string = "dialog"

transitionProps?: Partial<React.ComponentProps<typeof Transition>>
Imports 
import { Button, Card, OverlayBase, Stack } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = function Render() {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div style={{ padding: "40px", height: "100vh" }}>
      <Button onClick={() => setOpen(true)} variant="filled">
        {t("doc.ob_open")}
      </Button>
      <OverlayBase 
          open={open} 
          onOpenChange={setOpen}
          contentClassName="wim-overlay-content-centered"
      >
        <Card style={{ width: "400px" }}>
          <Card.Header>
            <strong>{t("doc.ob_title")}</strong>
          </Card.Header>
          <Card.Body>
            <Stack gap="md">
              <p>{t("doc.ob_desc")}</p>
              <Button onClick={() => setOpen(false)} variant="filled">{t("button.close") || "Close"}</Button>
            </Stack>
          </Card.Body>
        </Card>
      </OverlayBase>
    </div>
  );
};
Custom Transition story ok 
const CustomTransition = function Render() {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div style={{ padding: "40px", height: "100vh" }}>
      <Button onClick={() => setOpen(true)} variant="filled">
        {t("doc.ob_slide_open")}
      </Button>
      <OverlayBase 
          open={open} 
          onOpenChange={setOpen}
          contentClassName="wim-overlay-content-top"
          transitionProps={{
              enter: "slide-down-enter",
              enterFrom: "slide-down-enter-from",
              enterTo: "slide-down-enter-to",
              leave: "slide-down-leave",
              leaveFrom: "slide-down-leave-from",
              leaveTo: "slide-down-leave-to",
          }}
      >
        <Card style={{ width: "100%", borderRadius: "0 0 16px 16px" }}>
          <Card.Body>
            <Stack direction="row" justify="space-between" align="center">
              <p>{t("doc.ob_slide_desc")}</p>
              <Button onClick={() => setOpen(false)} variant="outlined" label={t("button.dismiss") || "Dismiss"} />
            </Stack>
          </Card.Body>
        </Card>
      </OverlayBase>
    </div>
  );
};
Docs doc ok

Pagination

components-navigation-elements-pagination · ./stories/Pagination/Pagination.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 13 prop types 
Component: src/components/navigation/Pagination/Pagination.tsx::Pagination
Props:
/**
 * Additional class names
 */
className?: string

/**
 * Current page number (1-indexed)
 */
current?: number = 1

/**
 * Whether to hide the pagination if there is only one page
 */
hideOnSinglePage?: boolean = false

/**
 * Callback function when page changes
 */
onChange?: (page: number, pageSize: number) => void

/**
 * Callback function when page size changes
 */
onPageSizeChange?: (pageSize: number) => void

/**
 * Number of items per page
 */
pageSize?: number = 10

/**
 * Page size options for the page size changer
 */
pageSizeOptions?: number[] = [10, 20, 50, 100]

/**
 * Whether to show quick jumper
 */
showQuickJumper?: boolean = false

/**
 * Whether to show the page size changer
 */
showSizeChanger?: boolean = false

/**
 * Function to display the total count
 */
showTotal?: (total: number, range: [number, number]) => React.ReactNode

/**
 * Number of sibling pages to show around the current page
 */
siblingCount?: number = 1

/**
 * Whether to show a simplified version
 */
simple?: boolean = false

/**
 * Total number of items
 */
total: number
Imports 
import { Pagination } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    return <Pagination total={50} current={1} pageSize={10} />;
};
Many Pages story ok 
const ManyPages = () => {
    return <Pagination total={1000} current={5} pageSize={10} />;
};
Large Sibling Count story ok 
const LargeSiblingCount = () => {
    return <Pagination total={1000} current={10} pageSize={10} siblingCount={2} />;
};
Interactive story ok 
const Interactive = () => {
    const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);

    return (
        <Pagination
            total={100}
            pageSize={10}
            current={currentPage}
            onChange={(page) => setCurrentPage(page)} />
    );
};
Docs doc ok

        <p><T k="doc.pagination_cons_4_desc" /></p>
      </td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

<h2><T k="doc.variants" /></h2>

<h3><T k="doc.basic" /></h3>
<p><T k="doc.pagination_var_basic_desc" /></p>

<Canvas of={PaginationStories.Default} />

<h3><T k="doc.pagination_var_many_pages" /></h3>
<p><T k="doc.pagination_var_many_pages_desc" /></p>

<Canvas of={PaginationStories.ManyPages} />

<h3><T k="doc.pagination_var_sibling" /></h3>
`siblingCount`
<p><T k="doc.pagination_var_sibling_desc" /></p>

<Canvas of={PaginationStories.LargeSiblingCount} />

<h3><T k="doc.interactive" /></h3>
<p><T k="doc.pagination_var_interactive_desc" /></p>

<Canvas of={PaginationStories.Interactive} />

<h2><T k="doc.pagination_feat_advanced" /></h2>

<h3><T k="doc.pagination_feat_simple" /></h3>
`simple`
<p><T k="doc.pagination_feat_simple_desc" /></p>

```jsx
<Pagination
  total={100}
  pageSize={10}
  current={1}
  simple
  onChange={(page, pageSize) => console.log(page, pageSize)}
/>
```

<h3><T k="doc.pagination_feat_size_changer" /></h3>
`showSizeChanger`
<p><T k="doc.pagination_feat_size_changer_desc" /></p>

```jsx
<Pagination
  total={500}
  pageSize={10}
  current={1}
  showSizeChanger
  pageSizeOptions={[10, 20, 50, 100]}
  onChange={(page, pageSize) => console.log(page, pageSize)}
  onPageSizeChange={(newSize) => console.log("Page size changed to:", newSize)}
/>
```

<p><T k="doc.pagination_props_line" /></p>

<ul>
  <li><T k="doc.pagination_feat_size_changer_props_1" /></li>
  <li><T k="doc.pagination_feat_size_changer_props_2" /></li>
  <li><T k="doc.pagination_feat_size_changer_props_3" /></li>
</ul>

<h3><T k="doc.pagination_feat_total_display" /></h3>
`showTotal`
<p><T k="doc.pagination_feat_total_display_desc" /></p>

```jsx
<Pagination
  total={500}
  pageSize={20}
  current={1}
  showTotal={(total, range) => `${range[0]}-${range[1]} of ${total} items`}
  onChange={(page, pageSize) => console.log(page, pageSize)}
/>
```

<h3><T k="doc.pagination_feat_quick_jumper" /></h3>
`showQuickJumper`
<p><T k="doc.pagination_feat_quick_jumper_desc" /></p>

```jsx
<Pagination
  total={1000}
  pageSize={10}
  current={1}
  showQuickJumper
  onChange={(page, pageSize) => console.log(page, pageSize)}
/>
```

<h3><T k="doc.pagination_feat_all_in_one" /></h3>
<p><T k="doc.pagination_feat_all_in_one_desc" /></p>

```jsx
<Pagination
  total={1000}
  pageSize={20}
  current={1}
  showSizeChanger
  showQuickJumper
  showTotal={(total, range) => `${range[0]}-${range[1]} / ${total}`}
  pageSizeOptions={[10, 20, 50, 100]}
  onChange={(page, pageSize) => {
    console.log("Page:", page, "Size:", pageSize);
  }}
  onPageSizeChange={(newSize) => {
    console.log("New page size:", newSize);
  }}
/>
```

<h2><T k="doc.pagination_onchange_change" /></h2>

<p><T k="doc.pagination_onchange_change_desc" /></p>

```typescript
type OnChange = (page: number, pageSize: number) => void;
```

<p><T k="doc.pagination_onchange_change_desc_2" /></p>

<p><T k="doc.pagination_keyboard_desc" /></p>

<p><T k="doc.pagination_i18n_desc" /></p>

| "tight-jpan"

Imports 
import { Paragraph } from "wimui";
Ex Large Paragraph story ok 
const ExLargeParagraph = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Paragraph
            onClick={fn()}
            size="xl"
            weight={`normal`}
            lineHeight={`normal-latn`}
            fontStyle={`normal`}
            content={t('story.paragraph_exlarge')} />
    );
};

};

};

PhoneInput

components-basic-inputs-phoneinput · ./stories/PhoneInput/PhoneInput.stories.tsx
国番号セレクターと電話番号入力を組み合わせたコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 11 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/PhoneInput/PhoneInput.tsx::PhoneInput
Props:
/**
 * 追加CSSクラス。
 */
className?: string

/**
 * 選択中の国コード（例: "JP", "US"）。
 */
countryCode?: string = "US"

/**
 * 無効状態。
 */
disabled?: boolean = false

/**
 * エラーメッセージ。
 */
error?: string

/**
 * フィールドラベル。
 */
label?: string

/**
 * レイアウト方向。
 */
layout?: "vertical" | "horizontal"

/**
 * 電話番号が変更されたときに呼び出されるコールバック。
 */
onChange?: (value: string) => void

/**
 * 国コードが変更されたときに呼び出されるコールバック。
 */
onCountryChange?: (countryCode: string) => void

/**
 * 電話番号入力欄のプレースホルダー。
 */
placeholder?: string

/**
 * 必須フラグ。
 */
required?: boolean

/**
 * 電話番号の値（国番号を除く番号部分）。
 */
value?: string = ""
Imports 
import { PhoneInput } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [value, setValue] = useState("");
    const [countryCode, setCountryCode] = useState("US");

    return (
        <PhoneInput
            disabled={false}
            label={t("story.phoneinput_label")}
            placeholder={t("story.phoneinput_placeholder")}
            value={value}
            onChange={setValue}
            countryCode={countryCode}
            onCountryChange={setCountryCode} />
    );
};
With Error story ok 
const WithError = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [value, setValue] = useState("abc");
    const [countryCode, setCountryCode] = useState("US");

    return (
        <PhoneInput
            disabled={false}
            label={t("story.phoneinput_label")}
            placeholder={t("story.phoneinput_placeholder")}
            value={value}
            onChange={setValue}
            countryCode={countryCode}
            onCountryChange={setCountryCode}
            error={t("story.phoneinput_error")} />
    );
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <PhoneInput
            label={t("story.phoneinput_label")}
            placeholder={t("story.phoneinput_placeholder")}
            value="090-1234-5678"
            countryCode="JP"
            disabled />
    );
};
Docs doc ok

Component: src/components/overlay/Popconfirm/Popconfirm.tsx::Popconfirm
Props:
/**
 * Text of the cancel button
 */
cancelText?: string = "Cancel"

/**
 * The target element which the Popconfirm will be attached to
 */
children: ReactNode

/**
 * The description of the confirmation box
 */
description?: ReactNode

/**
 * Whether to show the popconfirm
 */
disabled?: boolean = false

/**
 * Customize the icon
 */
icon?: ReactNode

/**
 * Text of the confirm button
 */
okText?: string = "OK"

/**
 * Color role of the confirm button
 */
okType?: "default" | "destructive" | "positive" = "default"

/**
 * Callback when the user clicks the cancel button
 */
onCancel?: () => void

/**
 * Callback when the user clicks the confirm button
 */
onConfirm?: () => void

/**
 * The title of the confirmation box
 */
title: ReactNode
Imports 
import { Button, Popconfirm } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Popconfirm
            title={t("story.popconfirm_delete_title")}
            okText={t("story.popconfirm_yes")}
            cancelText={t("story.popconfirm_no")}
            okType="destructive">
            <Button variant="filled" label={t("story.popconfirm_delete_btn")} />
        </Popconfirm>
    );
};
With Description story ok 
const WithDescription = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Popconfirm
            // Using "Delete the task" title logic in simpler way or re-t
            title={t("story.popconfirm_delete_btn")}
            description={t("story.popconfirm_delete_desc")}
            okText={t("story.popconfirm_yes")}
            cancelText={t("story.popconfirm_no")}>
            <Button label={t("story.popconfirm_delete_btn")} />
        </Popconfirm>
    );
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Popconfirm title={t("story.popconfirm_yes")} disabled>
            <Button label={t("story.popconfirm_disabled_btn")} />
        </Popconfirm>
    );
};

Component: src/components/overlay/Popover/Popover.tsx::Popover
Props:
children: ReactNode

className?: string

/**
 * If true, the popover component will manage its own open state.
 */
defaultOpen?: boolean = false

/**
 * Callback when open state changes.
 */
onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void

/**
 * If provided, controls the open state.
 */
open?: boolean

/**
 * Preferred placement of the popover.
 */
placement?: Placement = "bottom-start"
Imports 
import { Button, Input, Label, Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Popover>
            <PopoverTrigger asChild>
                <Button variant="outlined" label={t("story.popover_open")} />
            </PopoverTrigger>
            <PopoverContent>
                <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "10px" }}>
                    <h4 style={{ margin: 0 }}>{t("story.popover_dimensions")}</h4>
                    <p
                        style={{
                          margin: 0,
                          color: "var(--wim-color-text-secondary)",
                          fontSize: "0.9rem",
                        }}>
                        {t("story.popover_set_dim")}
                    </p>
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "20px" }}>
                        <div>
                            <Label
                                label={t("story.popover_width")}
                                htmlFor="width"
                                style={{ marginBottom: "5px" }} />
                            <Input id="width" defaultValue="100%" />
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <Label
                                label={t("story.popover_height")}
                                htmlFor="height"
                                style={{ marginBottom: "5px" }} />
                            <Input id="height" defaultValue="25px" />
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </PopoverContent>
        </Popover>
    );
};
Interactive story ok 
const Interactive = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [width, setWidth] = useState("300px");
    const [height, setHeight] = useState("auto");

    return (
        <Popover>
            <PopoverTrigger asChild>
                <Button variant="outlined" label={t("story.popover_interactive")} />
            </PopoverTrigger>
            <PopoverContent className="custom-width-popover" style={{ width, height }}>
                <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "10px" }}>
                    <h4 style={{ margin: 0 }}>{t("story.popover_interactive_dim")}</h4>
                    <p
                        style={{
                          margin: 0,
                          color: "var(--wim-color-text-secondary)",
                          fontSize: "0.9rem",
                        }}>
                        {t("story.popover_change_val")}
                    </p>
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "20px" }}>
                        <div>
                            <Label
                                label={t("story.popover_width")}
                                htmlFor="interactive-width"
                                style={{ marginBottom: "5px" }} />
                            <Input
                                id="interactive-width"
                                value={width}
                                onChange={(e) => setWidth(e.target.value)} />
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <Label
                                label={t("story.popover_height")}
                                htmlFor="interactive-height"
                                style={{ marginBottom: "5px" }} />
                            <Input
                                id="interactive-height"
                                value={height}
                                onChange={(e) => setHeight(e.target.value)} />
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </PopoverContent>
        </Popover>
    );
};
Alignment story ok 
const Alignment = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div
      style={{
        display: "flex",
        flexWrap: "wrap",
        gap: "40px",
        justifyContent: "center",
        padding: "40px 20px",
      }}
    >
      <Popover placement="bottom-start">
        <PopoverTrigger asChild>
          <Button label={t("story.popover_left_align")} />
        </PopoverTrigger>
        <PopoverContent>
          <div style={{ padding: "10px" }}>{t("story.popover_left_cont")}</div>
        </PopoverContent>
      </Popover>
      <Popover placement="bottom">
        <PopoverTrigger asChild>
          <Button label={t("story.popover_center_align")} />
        </PopoverTrigger>
        <PopoverContent>
          <div style={{ padding: "10px" }}>{t("story.popover_center_cont")}</div>
        </PopoverContent>
      </Popover>
      <Popover placement="bottom-end">
        <PopoverTrigger asChild>
          <Button label={t("story.popover_right_align")} />
        </PopoverTrigger>
        <PopoverContent>
          <div style={{ padding: "10px" }}>{t("story.popover_right_cont")}</div>
        </PopoverContent>
      </Popover>
    </div>
  );
};
Placement story ok 
const Placement = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div
      style={{
        display: "flex",
        flexDirection: "column",
        gap: "50px",
        padding: "50px",
      }}
    >
      <Popover placement="top">
        <PopoverTrigger asChild>
          <Button label={t("story.popover_top_place")} />
        </PopoverTrigger>
        <PopoverContent>
          <div style={{ padding: "10px" }}>{t("story.popover_appears_above")}</div>
        </PopoverContent>
      </Popover>
      <Popover placement="bottom">
        <PopoverTrigger asChild>
          <Button label={t("story.popover_bottom_place")} />
        </PopoverTrigger>
        <PopoverContent>
          <div style={{ padding: "10px" }}>{t("story.popover_appears_below")}</div>
        </PopoverContent>
      </Popover>
    </div>
  );
};
