Props:
children?: React.ReactNode

maxHeight?: string

scrollAxis?: "x" | "y" | "both" = "y"

text?: string
Imports 
import { ScrollArea } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <ScrollArea text="sampletextforscrollarea" scrollAxis="y" maxHeight="10rem" />;
Horizontal Scroll story ok 
const HorizontalScroll = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <ScrollArea scrollAxis="x" style={{ width: "100%", maxWidth: "80vw" }}>
            <div
                style={{
                  width: "150rem",
                  background: "#3b82f6",
                  padding: "1rem",
                  color: "white",
                }}>
                {t("story.scrollarea_wide_content")} {t("story.selectbox_opt4")} {t("story.scrollarea_wide_content")}{" "}
                {t("story.selectbox_opt4")} {t("story.scrollarea_wide_content")} {t("story.selectbox_opt4")}
            </div>
        </ScrollArea>
    );
};
With Children story ok 
const WithChildren = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <ScrollArea scrollAxis="y" maxHeight="12rem">
            <div style={{ padding: "1rem" }}>
                <h4 style={{ margin: "0 0 1rem 0" }}>{t("story.scrollarea_custom_title")}</h4>
                <p>{t("story.scrollarea_custom_desc")}</p>
                <ul>
                    <li>{t("story.scrollarea_item", { count: 1 })}</li>
                    <li>{t("story.scrollarea_item", { count: 2 })}</li>
                    <li>{t("story.scrollarea_item", { count: 3 })}</li>
                    <li>{t("story.scrollarea_item", { count: 4 })}</li>
                    <li>{t("story.scrollarea_item", { count: 5 })}</li>
                </ul>
                <p>{t("story.scrollarea_scrolling_works")}</p>
            </div>
        </ScrollArea>
    );
};
Both story ok 
const Both = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <ScrollArea
            scrollAxis="both"
            maxHeight="20rem"
            style={{ width: "100%", maxWidth: "80vw" }}>
            <div
                style={{
                  width: "40rem",
                  height: "40rem",
                  background:
                    "linear-gradient(135deg, #FF9A9E 0%, #FECFEF 99%, #FECFEF 100%)",
                  padding: "1rem",
                }}>
                <h4 style={{ color: "#333" }}>{t("story.scrollarea_both_title")}</h4>
                <p style={{ color: "#555" }}>
                    {t("story.scrollarea_both_desc")}
                </p>
                <div
                    style={{
                      marginTop: "2rem",
                      display: "grid",
                      gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(5, 1fr)",
                      gap: "1rem",
                    }}>
                    {[...Array(20)].map((_, i) => (
                      <div
                        key={i}
                        style={{
                          background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.5)",
                          padding: "1rem",
                          borderRadius: "4px",
                        }}
                      >
                        {t("story.scrollarea_box", { count: i + 1 })}
                      </div>
                    ))}
                </div>
            </div>
        </ScrollArea>
    );
};

ScrollProgress

components-utilities-scrollprogress · ./stories/ScrollProgress/ScrollProgress.stories.tsx
読み込みの進捗やスクロール位置を視覚的に表示するためのコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 2 prop types 
Component: src/components/feedback/ScrollProgress/ScrollProgress.tsx::ScrollProgress
Props:
/**
 * 進捗バーの色。
 */
color?: "primary" | "secondary" | "success" | "warning" | "error" = "primary"

/**
 * スクロールを検知するターゲット要素。デフォルトは `window`。
 */
target?: React.RefObject<HTMLElement | null>
Imports 
import { ScrollProgress } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ height: "200vh", padding: "20px" }}>
            <ScrollProgress />
            <h1>{t("story.scrollprogress_h1")}</h1>
            <div style={{ marginTop: "100vh" }}>
                <p>{t("story.scrollprogress_middle")}</p>
            </div>
            <div style={{ marginTop: "100vh" }}>
                <p>{t("story.scrollprogress_end")}</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
Custom Container story ok 
const CustomContainer = () => {
    const containerRef = React.useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ padding: "20px" }}>
            <div
                ref={containerRef}
                tabIndex={0}
                style={{
                  height: "300px",
                  overflowY: "auto",
                  border: "1px solid var(--wim-color-border)",
                  position: "relative",
                }}>
                <ScrollProgress target={containerRef} style={{ position: "sticky", top: 0 }} />
                <div style={{ height: "1000px", padding: "10px" }}>
                    <p>{t("story.scrollprogress_inside")}</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

SearchInput

components-basic-inputs-searchinput · ./stories/SearchInput/SearchInput.stories.tsx
検索に特化した入力コンポーネント。 検索アイコンを標準装備し、入力がある場合はクリアボタンを表示します。
Imports 
import { Label, SearchInput } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("doc.search")}>
            <SearchInput disabled={false} placeholder={t("story.searchinput_placeholder")} />
        </Label>
    );
};
Smart Search With AI Example story ok 
const SmartSearchWithAI_Example = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [query, setQuery] = React.useState("");
    const [suggestions, setSuggestions] = React.useState<string[]>([]);
    const [isSearching, setIsSearching] = React.useState(false);

    // Simulated AI semantic search
    const handleSearch = async (val: string) => {
      setQuery(val);
      if (!val.trim()) {
        setSuggestions([]);
        return;
      }
      setIsSearching(true);
      // Simulate API call to Google Generative AI or embeddings search
      await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 800));
      setSuggestions([
        t("components:smart.search_result_1", { val }),
        t("components:smart.search_result_2", { val }),
        t("components:smart.search_match", { val }),
      ]);
      setIsSearching(false);
    };

    return (
        <div style={{ width: 400 }}>
            <Label label={t("components:smart.search_ai_title")}>
                <div style={{ position: "relative" }}>
                    <SearchInput
                        disabled={false}
                        width={400}
                        value={query}
                        onChange={(e) => handleSearch(e.target.value)}
                        placeholder={t("components:smart.search_placeholder")} />
                    {isSearching && (
                      <div style={{ position: "absolute", right: 40, top: "50%", transform: "translateY(-50%)", fontSize: 12, color: "var(--wim-color-text-secondary)" }}>
                        {t("components:smart.search_thinking")}
                      </div>
                    )}
                </div>
            </Label>
            {suggestions.length > 0 && (
              <div style={{ marginTop: 8, padding: 12, border: "1px solid var(--wim-color-border)", borderRadius: 8, background: "var(--wim-color-surface-variant)" }}>
                <div style={{ fontSize: 12, fontWeight: "bold", marginBottom: 8, color: "var(--wim-color-primary)" }}>
                  {t("components:smart.search_suggestions")}
                </div>
                <ul style={{ margin: 0, paddingLeft: 20, fontSize: 14 }}>
                  {suggestions.map((s, i) => (
                    <li key={i} style={{ padding: "4px 0" }}>{s}</li>
                  ))}
                </ul>
              </div>
            )}
        </div>
    );
};

SegmentedControl

components-selection-controls-segmentedcontrol · ./stories/SegmentedControl/SegmentedControl.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 11 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/SegmentedControl/SegmentedControl.tsx::SegmentedControl
Props:
className?: string

/**
 * 無効状態にするかどうか
 */
disabled?: boolean = false

/**
 * エラーメッセージ
 */
error?: string

fullWidth?: boolean = false

/**
 * アクセシビリティ用のラベル
 */
label?: string

/**
 * レイアウト方向
 */
layout?: "vertical" | "horizontal" = "vertical"

onChange: (value: string) => void

options: Option[]

/**
 * 必須表示にするかどうか
 */
required?: boolean

size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg" = "md"

value: string
Imports 
import { SegmentedControl } from "wimui";
Small story ok 
const Small = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [value, setValue] = useState("day");
    const options = useMemo(
      () => [
        { label: t("story.segmented_day"), value: "day" },
        { label: t("story.segmented_week"), value: "week" },
        { label: t("story.segmented_month"), value: "month" },
      ],
      [t],
    );
    return <SegmentedControl size="sm" fullWidth options={options} value={value} onChange={setValue} />;
};
Medium story ok 
const Medium = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [value, setValue] = useState("day");
    const options = useMemo(
      () => [
        { label: t("story.segmented_day"), value: "day" },
        { label: t("story.segmented_week"), value: "week" },
        { label: t("story.segmented_month"), value: "month" },
      ],
      [t],
    );
    return <SegmentedControl size="md" fullWidth options={options} value={value} onChange={setValue} />;
};
Large story ok 
const Large = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [value, setValue] = useState("day");
    const options = useMemo(
      () => [
        { label: t("story.segmented_day"), value: "day" },
        { label: t("story.segmented_week"), value: "week" },
        { label: t("story.segmented_month"), value: "month" },
      ],
      [t],
    );
    return <SegmentedControl size="lg" fullWidth options={options} value={value} onChange={setValue} />;
};
Two Options story ok 
const TwoOptions = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [value, setValue] = useState("on");
    const options = useMemo(
      () => [
        { label: t("story.segmented_on"), value: "on" },
        { label: t("story.segmented_off"), value: "off" },
      ],
      [t],
    );
    return <SegmentedControl size="md" fullWidth options={options} value={value} onChange={setValue} />;
};
With Icons story ok 
const WithIcons = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [value, setValue] = useState("circle");
    const options = useMemo(
      () =>
        [
          {
            label: t("story.segmented_circle"),
            value: "circle",
            iconName: "CircleIcon",
          },
          {
            label: t("story.segmented_square"),
            value: "square",
            iconName: "SquareIcon",
          },
          {
            label: t("story.segmented_external"),
            value: "external",
            iconName: "ExternalLinkIcon",
          },
        ] as const,
      [t],
    );

    return (
        <SegmentedControl
            size="md"
            fullWidth={false}
            options={[...options] as Parameters<typeof SegmentedControl>[0]["options"]}
            value={value}
            onChange={setValue} />
    );
};
Icon Only story ok 
const IconOnly = () => {
    const [value, setValue] = useState("circle");
    const iconOnlyOptions = [
      { value: "circle", iconName: "CircleIcon" },
      { value: "square", iconName: "SquareIcon" },
      { value: "external", iconName: "ExternalLinkIcon" },
    ] as const;

    return (
        <SegmentedControl
            size="md"
            fullWidth={false}
            options={[...iconOnlyOptions] as Parameters<typeof SegmentedControl>[0]["options"]}
            value={value}
            onChange={setValue} />
    );
};
Long Label story ok 
const LongLabel = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [value, setValue] = useState("long1");
    const options = useMemo(
      () => [
        {
          label: t("story.segmented_long_label"),
          value: "long1",
        },
        {
          label: t("story.segmented_another_long"),
          value: "long2",
        },
        { label: t("story.segmented_short"), value: "short" },
      ],
      [t],
    );
    return <SegmentedControl size="md" fullWidth options={options} value={value} onChange={setValue} />;
};

Selectbox

components-selection-controls-selectbox · ./stories/Selectbox/Selectbox.stories.tsx
ユーザーが定義済みの選択肢から1つを選択するためのプルダウンメニュー。
Prop types (react-docgen) 21 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/Selectbox/Selectbox.tsx::Selectbox
Props:
/**
 * Whether to show a clear button when a value is selected
 */
allowClear?: boolean = false

aria-describedby?: string

aria-label?: string

aria-labelledby?: string

className?: string

defaultValue?: string

disabled?: boolean = false

error?: string

/**
 * Custom filter function
 */
filterOption?: (option: SelectboxOption, searchValue: string) => boolean

/**
 * Whether to take full width of parent
 */
fullWidth?: boolean = false

/**
 * Whether options are grouped
 */
grouped?: boolean = false

/**
 * Unique ID for the component
 */
id?: string

label?: string

layout?: "vertical" | "horizontal"

onChange?: (value: string) => void

options?: SelectboxOption[] | SelectboxOptionGroup[] = []

placeholder?: string = "select.option"

required?: boolean

/**
 * Enable search/filtering functionality
 */
searchable?: boolean = false

/**
 * Placeholder text for search input
 */
searchPlaceholder?: string = "search.placeholder"

value?: string
Imports 
import { Selectbox } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const options = [
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt1"), value: "opt1" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt2"), value: "opt2" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt3"), value: "opt3" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt4"), value: "opt4", disabled: true },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt5"), value: "opt5" },
    ];

    return (
        <Selectbox
            disabled={false}
            options={options}
            placeholder={t("story.selectbox_placeholder")} />
    );
};
With Label story ok 
const WithLabel = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const options = [
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt1"), value: "opt1" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt2"), value: "opt2" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt3"), value: "opt3" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt4"), value: "opt4", disabled: true },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt5"), value: "opt5" },
    ];

    return (
        <Selectbox
            disabled={false}
            label={t("story.selectbox_label")}
            options={options}
            placeholder={t("story.selectbox_placeholder")} />
    );
};
Preselected story ok 
const Preselected = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const options = [
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt1"), value: "opt1" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt2"), value: "opt2" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt3"), value: "opt3" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt4"), value: "opt4", disabled: true },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt5"), value: "opt5" },
    ];
    return <Selectbox disabled={false} options={options} defaultValue="opt2" />;
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const options = [
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt1"), value: "opt1" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt2"), value: "opt2" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt3"), value: "opt3" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt4"), value: "opt4", disabled: true },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt5"), value: "opt5" },
    ];
    return <Selectbox options={options} disabled={true} defaultValue="opt1" />;
};
With Separator story ok 
const WithSeparator = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const optionsWithSeparators: SelectboxOption[] = [
      { label: t("story.selectbox_settings"), value: "settings" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_profile"), value: "profile" },
      { type: "separator" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_help"), value: "help" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_about"), value: "about" },
      { type: "separator" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_logout"), value: "logout" },
    ];

    return (
        <Selectbox
            disabled={false}
            options={optionsWithSeparators}
            placeholder={t("story.selectbox_placeholder")} />
    );
};
With Clear Button story ok 
const WithClearButton = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const options = [
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt1"), value: "opt1" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt2"), value: "opt2" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt3"), value: "opt3" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt4"), value: "opt4", disabled: true },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt5"), value: "opt5" },
    ];

    return (
        <Selectbox
            disabled={false}
            options={options}
            allowClear={true}
            defaultValue="opt1"
            placeholder={t("story.selectbox_placeholder")} />
    );
};
Searchable story ok 
const Searchable = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const options = [
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt_apple"), value: "apple" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt_banana"), value: "banana" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt_cherry"), value: "cherry" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt_grape"), value: "grape" },
      { label: t("story.selectbox_opt_orange"), value: "orange" },
    ];

    return (
        <Selectbox
            disabled={false}
            options={options}
            searchable={true}
            placeholder={t("story.selectbox_placeholder")} />
    );
};
Grouped story ok 
const Grouped = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const groupedOptions = [
      {
        label: t("story.selectbox_group_fruits"),
        options: [
          { label: t("story.selectbox_opt_apple"), value: "apple" },
          { label: t("story.selectbox_opt_banana"), value: "banana" },
        ],
      },
      {
        label: t("story.selectbox_group_veggies"),
        options: [
          { label: t("story.selectbox_opt_carrot"), value: "carrot" },
          { label: t("story.selectbox_opt_potato"), value: "potato" },
        ],
      },
    ];

    return (
        <Selectbox
            disabled={false}
            options={groupedOptions}
            grouped={true}
            placeholder={t("story.selectbox_placeholder")} />
    );
};
Advanced Search story ok 
const AdvancedSearch = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const groupedOptions = [
      {
        label: t("story.selectbox_group_fruits"),
        options: [
          { label: t("story.selectbox_opt_apple"), value: "apple" },
          { label: t("story.selectbox_opt_banana"), value: "banana" },
        ],
      },
      {
        label: t("story.selectbox_group_veggies"),
        options: [
          { label: t("story.selectbox_opt_carrot"), value: "carrot" },
          { label: t("story.selectbox_opt_potato"), value: "potato" },
        ],
      },
    ];

    return (
        <Selectbox
            disabled={false}
            options={groupedOptions}
            grouped={true}
            searchable={true}
            allowClear={true}
            placeholder={t("story.selectbox_placeholder")} />
    );
};

Imports 
import { Icon, Sidebar } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = React.useState(false);

    return (
        <div
            style={{
              position: "fixed",
              inset: 0,
              display: "flex",
              background: "var(--wim-color-surface-variant)",
              overflow: "hidden",
            }}>
            <style>{`
                            .wim-sidebar-mobile-trigger-demo {
                                position: absolute;
                                top: 10px;
                                left: 10px;
                                z-index: 101;
                                padding: 5px 10px;
                                background: var(--wim-color-surface);
                                border: 1px solid var(--wim-color-border);
                                border-radius: 4px;
                                cursor: pointer;
                            }
                            @media (min-width: 769px) { /* md breakpoint override */
                                .wim-sidebar-mobile-trigger-demo {
                                    display: none;
                                }
                            }
                        `}</style>
            <button
                className="wim-sidebar-mobile-trigger-demo"
                onClick={() => setMobileOpen(true)}>
                {t("story.sidebar_menu")}
            </button>
            <Sidebar
                bordered
                mobileOpen={mobileOpen}
                onOverlayClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}>
                <SidebarContent />
            </Sidebar>
            <main
                style={{
                  flexGrow: 1,
                  padding: "20px",
                  marginLeft: "20px",
                  marginTop: "40px",
                }}>
                <h1>{t("story.sidebar_content_area")}</h1>
                <p>{t("story.sidebar_select_item")}</p>
            </main>
        </div>
    );
};
Docs doc ok

SignaturePad

components-advanced-inputs-signaturepad · ./stories/SignaturePad/SignaturePad.stories.tsx
マウスやタッチ操作で手書きの署名を入力するためのコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 13 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/SignaturePad/SignaturePad.tsx::SignaturePad
Props:
/**
 * CSS class name
 */
className?: string

/**
 * Custom label for the clear button
 */
clearLabel?: string

/**
 * Whether the component is disabled
 */
disabled?: boolean = false

error?: string

/**
 * Height of the canvas
 */
height?: number = 200

label?: string

layout?: "vertical" | "horizontal" = "vertical"

/**
 * Callback when signature changes or is cleared
 */
onChange?: (dataUrl: string | null) => void

/**
 * Color of the pen
 */
penColor?: string = "#000000"

/**
 * Width of the pen stroke
 */
penWidth?: number = 2

required?: boolean

/**
 * Inline styles
 */
style?: React.CSSProperties

/**
 * Width of the canvas
 */
width?: number = 400
Imports 
import { Label, SignaturePad } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.signaturepad_default")}>
            <SignaturePad width={400} height={200} />
        </Label>
    );
};
Custom Colors story ok 
const CustomColors = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.signaturepad_colors")}>
            <SignaturePad penColor="#ff4d4f" penWidth={4} width={400} height={200} />
        </Label>
    );
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.signaturepad_disabled")}>
            <SignaturePad width={400} height={200} disabled={true} />
        </Label>
    );
};
Large story ok 
const Large = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.signaturepad_large")}>
            <SignaturePad width={600} height={300} />
        </Label>
    );
};

import { SimpleGrid } from "wimui";
Fixed Columns story ok 
const FixedColumns = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <SimpleGrid cols={3} spacing="md">
            <Box>{t("story.grid_item", "1")}</Box>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_item", "2")}</Box>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_item", "3")}</Box>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_item", "4")}</Box>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_item", "5")}</Box>
        </SimpleGrid>
    );
};
Responsive Auto story ok 
const ResponsiveAuto = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <SimpleGrid minChildWidth={200} spacing={16}>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_min_width")}</Box>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_min_width")}</Box>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_min_width")}</Box>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_min_width")}</Box>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_min_width")}</Box>
        </SimpleGrid>
    );
};
Responsive Breakpoints story ok 
const ResponsiveBreakpoints = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <SimpleGrid cols={{ base: 1, sm: 2, md: 3, lg: 4 }} spacing={16}>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_item", "1")}</Box>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_item", "2")}</Box>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_item", "3")}</Box>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_item", "4")}</Box>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_item", "5")}</Box>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_item", "6")}</Box>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_item", "7")}</Box>
            <Box>{t("story.grid_item", "8")}</Box>
        </SimpleGrid>
    );
};

Skeleton

components-loading-states-skeleton · ./stories/Skeleton/Skeleton.stories.tsx
コンテンツの読み込み中に表示するプレースホルダー。
Prop types (react-docgen) 4 prop types 
Component: src/components/feedback/Skeleton/Skeleton.tsx::Skeleton
Props:
/**
 * アニメーションの種類。
 * - `pulse`: ゆっくりとした明滅。
 * - `wave`: 左から右への波のような動き。
 * - `none`: アニメーションなし。
 */
animation?: "pulse" | "wave" | "none" = "pulse"

/**
 * 高さ。CSSの単位（px, %, remなど）を含めて指定します。
 */
height?: string | number

/**
 * スケルトンの形状。
 * - `text`: テキスト行のような形状。
 * - `rect`: 矩形。
 * - `circle`: 円形。
 */
variant?: "text" | "rect" | "circle" = "text"

/**
 * 幅。CSSの単位（px, %, remなど）を含めて指定します。
 */
width?: string | number
Imports 
import { Skeleton } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <Skeleton width="100%" />;
Text story ok 
const Text = () => <div style={{ maxWidth: "300px", width: "100%" }}>
    <Skeleton variant="text" width="100%" />
    <Skeleton variant="text" width="80%" />
    <Skeleton variant="text" width="60%" />
</div>;
Circle story ok 
const Circle = () => <Skeleton variant="circle" width={40} height={40} />;
Rect story ok 
const Rect = () => <Skeleton variant="rect" width={200} height={100} />;
Wave Animation story ok 
const WaveAnimation = () => <Skeleton animation="wave" width="100%" />;
Card Example story ok 
const CardExample = () => <div
    style={{
      display: "flex",
      flexDirection: "column",
      gap: "16px",
      maxWidth: "300px",
      width: "100%",
      padding: "16px",
      border: "1px solid var(--wim-color-border)",
      borderRadius: "8px",
    }}>
    <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "12px" }}>
        <Skeleton variant="circle" width={40} height={40} />
        <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
            <Skeleton variant="text" width="60%" />
            <Skeleton variant="text" width="40%" />
        </div>
    </div>
    <Skeleton variant="rect" width="100%" height={150} />
    <div>
        <Skeleton variant="text" width="100%" />
        <Skeleton variant="text" width="90%" />
        <Skeleton variant="text" width="70%" />
    </div>
</div>;
Loading Toggle story ok 
const LoadingToggle = function Render(args) {
  const [loading, setLoading] = React.useState(true);
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "20px" }}>
      <button
        onClick={() => setLoading(!loading)}
        style={{
          padding: "8px 16px",
          borderRadius: "4px",
          border: "1px solid var(--wim-color-border)",
          cursor: "pointer",
          width: "fit-content",
        }}
      >
        {loading ? t("story.skeleton_show_content") : t("story.skeleton_show_skeleton")}
      </button>

      <div
        style={{
          padding: "20px",
          border: "1px solid var(--wim-color-border)",
          borderRadius: "12px",
          maxWidth: "350px",
          width: "100%",
          boxSizing: "border-box",
        }}
      >
        {loading ? (
          <div
            style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "12px" }}
          >
            <div
              style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "12px" }}
            >
              <Skeleton {...args} variant="circle" width={48} height={48} />
              <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                <Skeleton {...args} variant="text" width="50%" />
                <Skeleton {...args} variant="text" width="30%" />
              </div>
            </div>
            <Skeleton {...args} variant="rect" width="100%" height={120} />
            <div
              style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "8px" }}
            >
              <Skeleton {...args} variant="text" />
              <Skeleton {...args} variant="text" />
              <Skeleton {...args} variant="text" width="60%" />
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div
            style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "12px" }}
          >
            <div
              style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "12px" }}
            >
              <div
                style={{
                  width: 48,
                  height: 48,
                  borderRadius: "50%",
                  backgroundColor: "var(--wim-color-primary)",
                  display: "flex",
                  alignItems: "center",
                  justifyContent: "center",
                  color: "var(--wim-color-text-on-primary)",
                  fontWeight: "bold",
                }}
              >
                JD
              </div>
              <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                <div style={{ fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: "1.1rem" }}>
                  John Doe
                </div>
                <div style={{ color: "var(--wim-color-text-secondary)", fontSize: "0.9rem" }}>
                  Software Engineer
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <img
              src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1498050108023-c5249f4df085?auto=format&fit=crop&w=350&q=80"
              alt="Content"
              style={{
                width: "100%",
                height: "120px",
                objectFit: "cover",
                borderRadius: "4px",
              }}
            />
            <div style={{ lineHeight: "1.6", color: "var(--wim-color-text-secondary)" }}>
              {t("story.skeleton_demo_desc")}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

Slider

components-pickers-sliders-slider · ./stories/Slider/Slider.stories.tsx
ユーザーが値の範囲から1つの値を選択するためのスライダーコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 17 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/Slider/Slider.tsx::Slider
Props:
aria-label?: string

aria-labelledby?: string

/**
 * 追加のクラス名
 */
className?: string

/**
 * デフォルトの値（非制御時）
 */
defaultValue?: number = 0

/**
 * 無効化フラグ
 */
disabled?: boolean = false

/**
 * エラーメッセージ
 */
error?: string

/**
 * カスタムID
 */
id?: string

/**
 * アクセシビリティ用のラベル
 */
label?: string

/**
 * レイアウト方向
 */
layout?: "vertical" | "horizontal" = "vertical"

/**
 * 最大値
 */
max?: number = 100

/**
 * 最小値
 */
min?: number = 0

/**
 * 名前の属性
 */
name?: string

/**
 * ドラッグ終了時のコールバック
 */
onAfterChange?: (value: number) => void

/**
 * 値変更時のコールバック
 */
onChange?: (value: number) => void

/**
 * 必須表示にするかどうか
 */
required?: boolean

/**
 * ステップ値
 */
step?: number = 1

/**
 * 現在の値
 */
value?: number
Imports 
import { Label, Slider } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.slider_default")}>
            <Slider defaultValue={50} />
        </Label>
    );
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.slider_disabled")}>
            <Slider defaultValue={30} disabled />
        </Label>
    );
};
Min Max story ok 
const MinMax = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.slider_minmax")}>
            <Slider min={-50} max={50} defaultValue={0} />
        </Label>
    );
};
Step story ok 
const Step = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.slider_step")}>
            <Slider min={0} max={100} step={10} defaultValue={20} />
        </Label>
    );
};
Controlled story ok 
const Controlled = () => {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  const [val, setVal] = useState(25);
  return (
    <Label label={`${t("story.slider_default")} (${t("story.dialog_curr_state")}: ${val})`}>
      <Slider value={val} onChange={setVal} />
    </Label>
  );
};

Snackbar

components-alerts-notifications-snackbar · ./stories/Snackbar/Snackbar.stories.tsx
ユーザーに短いメッセージを通知するためのスナックバーコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 10 prop types 
Component: src/components/feedback/Snackbar/Snackbar.tsx::Snackbar
Props:
/**
 * アクションボタンのラベル
 */
actionLabel?: string

/**
 * 自動で閉じるまでの時間（ミリ秒）。0を指定すると自動で閉じません。
 */
autoHideDuration?: number = 5000

/**
 * カスタムクラス名
 */
className?: string

/**
 * スナックバーに表示するメッセージ
 */
message: string

/**
 * アクションボタンがクリックされた時のコールバック
 */
onAction?: () => void

/**
 * スナックバーが閉じられる時のコールバック
 */
onClose?: () => void

/**
 * 表示状態
 */
open?: boolean = false

/**
 * 表示位置
 */
position?: | "top-left"
| "top-center"
| "top-right"
| "bottom-left"
| "bottom-center"
| "bottom-right" = "bottom-center"

/**
 * 閉じるボタンを表示するかどうか
 */
showCloseButton?: boolean = false

/**
 * 表示するタイプ
 */
status?: FeedbackStatus | "default" = "default"
Imports 
import { Button, Snackbar } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Snackbar
            open
            status="default"
            position="bottom-center"
            message={args.message || t("story.snackbar_message")} />
    );
};
With Action story ok 
const WithAction = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Snackbar
            open
            message={args.message || t("story.snackbar_deleted")}
            actionLabel={args.actionLabel || t("story.snackbar_undo")}
            onAction={() => alert(t("story.snackbar_undo_clicked"))} />
    );
};
With Close Button story ok 
const WithCloseButton = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Snackbar
            open
            showCloseButton
            autoHideDuration={0}
            message={args.message || t("story.snackbar_persistent")} />
    );
};
Success story ok 
const Success = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Snackbar open status="success" message={args.message || t("story.snackbar_saved")} />;
};
Error Status story ok 
const ErrorStatus = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Snackbar open status="error" message={args.message || t("story.snackbar_failed")} />;
};
Warning story ok 
const Warning = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Snackbar
            open
            status="warning"
            message={args.message || t("story.snackbar_storage_full")} />
    );
};
Info story ok 
const Info = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Snackbar
            open
            status="info"
            message={args.message || t("story.snackbar_update_available")} />
    );
};
Interactive Demo story ok 
const InteractiveDemo = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <div style={{ padding: "40px" }}>
      <Button
        onClick={() => setOpen(true)}
        label={t("story.snackbar_show")}
        variant="filled"
      />
      <Snackbar
        message={t("story.snackbar_interactive")}
        open={open}
        onClose={() => setOpen(false)}
        actionLabel={t("story.snackbar_retry")}
        showCloseButton
      />
    </div>
  );
};

```tsx
import { SnackbarProvider, useSnackbar } from "./Snackbar";

const MyComponent = () => {
  const { showMessage } = useSnackbar();

  return (
    <button
      onClick={() =>
        showMessage({
          message: "Data saved",
          status: "success",
          actionLabel: "Undo",
        })
      }
    >
      Show Snackbar
    </button>
  );
};
```

```bash
npm run test -- Snackbar
```

};

components-loading-states-spinner · ./stories/Spinner/Spinner.stories.tsx
読み込み中であることを示すための回転するインジケーター。
Prop types (react-docgen) 4 prop types 
Component: src/components/feedback/Spinner/Spinner.tsx::Spinner
Props:
color?: | "primary"
| "secondary"
| "success"
| "warning"
| "error"
| "neutral"
| "currentColor"
| WimColor = "primary"

label?: string

labelPosition?: "right" | "bottom" = "right"

size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg" = "md"
Imports 
import { Spinner } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <Spinner label="Loading..." />;
Colors story ok 
const Colors = () => <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "24px", alignItems: "center" }}>
    <Spinner color="primary" />
    <Spinner color="secondary" />
    <Spinner color="success" />
    <Spinner color="warning" />
    <Spinner color="error" />
    <Spinner color="neutral" />
</div>;
Sizes story ok 
const Sizes = () => <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "24px", alignItems: "center" }}>
    <Spinner size="sm" />
    <Spinner size="md" />
    <Spinner size="lg" />
</div>;
With Label story ok 
const WithLabel = () => <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "32px" }}>
    <Spinner label="Loading right..." labelPosition="right" />
    <Spinner label="Loading bottom..." labelPosition="bottom" />
</div>;

Splitter

components-layout-splitter · ./stories/Splitter/Splitter.stories.tsx
Splitter component that allows resizing of multiple panels. Supports both mouse and touch events.
Prop types (react-docgen) 2 prop types 
Component: src/components/layout/Splitter/Splitter.tsx
Props:
/**
 * The components to render within the splitter. Usually a combination of `Splitter.Panel` and `Splitter.Handle`.
 */
children: React.ReactNode

/**
 * The orientation of the splitter.
 */
orientation?: "horizontal" | "vertical" = "horizontal"
Imports 
import { Splitter } from "wimui";
Horizontal story ok 
const Horizontal = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div
      style={{
        height: "400px",
        border: "1px solid", borderColor: "var(--wim-color-border-subtle)",
      }}
    >
      <Splitter orientation="horizontal">
        <Splitter.Panel defaultSize={30}>
          <PanelContent color="#3b82f6">{t("story.splitter_left", "Left Panel")}</PanelContent>
        </Splitter.Panel>
        <Splitter.Handle />
        <Splitter.Panel defaultSize={70}>
          <PanelContent color="#10b981">{t("story.splitter_right", "Right Panel")}</PanelContent>
        </Splitter.Panel>
      </Splitter>
    </div>
  );
};
Vertical story ok 
const Vertical = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div
      style={{
        height: "400px",
        border: "1px solid", borderColor: "var(--wim-color-border-subtle)",
      }}
    >
      <Splitter orientation="vertical">
        <Splitter.Panel defaultSize={40}>
          <PanelContent color="#ef4444">{t("story.splitter_top", "Top Panel")}</PanelContent>
        </Splitter.Panel>
        <Splitter.Handle />
        <Splitter.Panel defaultSize={60}>
          <PanelContent color="#f59e0b">{t("story.splitter_bottom", "Bottom Panel")}</PanelContent>
        </Splitter.Panel>
      </Splitter>
    </div>
  );
};
Multiple Panels story ok 
const MultiplePanels = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div
      style={{
        height: "400px",
        border: "1px solid", borderColor: "var(--wim-color-border-subtle)",
      }}
    >
      <Splitter orientation="horizontal">
        <Splitter.Panel defaultSize={20}>
          <PanelContent color="#6366f1">{t("story.splitter_panel_1", "Panel 1")}</PanelContent>
        </Splitter.Panel>
        <Splitter.Handle />
        <Splitter.Panel defaultSize={60}>
          <PanelContent color="#8b5cf6">{t("story.splitter_panel_2", "Panel 2")}</PanelContent>
        </Splitter.Panel>
        <Splitter.Handle />
        <Splitter.Panel defaultSize={20}>
          <PanelContent color="#ec4899">{t("story.splitter_panel_3", "Panel 3")}</PanelContent>
        </Splitter.Panel>
      </Splitter>
    </div>
  );
};
Nested story ok 
const Nested = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div
      style={{
        height: "600px",
        border: "1px solid", borderColor: "var(--wim-color-border-subtle)",
      }}
    >
      <Splitter orientation="horizontal">
        <Splitter.Panel defaultSize={25}>
          <PanelContent color="#374151" textColor="#fff">{t("story.splitter_sidebar", "Sidebar")}</PanelContent>
        </Splitter.Panel>
        <Splitter.Handle />
        <Splitter.Panel defaultSize={75}>
          <Splitter orientation="vertical">
            <Splitter.Panel defaultSize={70}>
              <PanelContent color="#1f2937" textColor="#fff">{t("story.splitter_main", "Main Content")}</PanelContent>
            </Splitter.Panel>
            <Splitter.Handle />
            <Splitter.Panel defaultSize={30}>
              <PanelContent color="#4b5563" textColor="#fff">{t("story.splitter_logs", "Console / Logs")}</PanelContent>
            </Splitter.Panel>
          </Splitter>
        </Splitter.Panel>
      </Splitter>
    </div>
  );
};
Constraints story ok 
const Constraints = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <div
      style={{
        height: "400px",
        border: "1px solid", borderColor: "var(--wim-color-border-subtle)",
      }}
    >
      <Splitter orientation="horizontal">
        <Splitter.Panel minSize={20} maxSize={50} defaultSize={30}>
          <PanelContent color="#14b8a6">{t("story.splitter_minmax", "Min: 20%, Max: 50%")}</PanelContent>
        </Splitter.Panel>
        <Splitter.Handle />
        <Splitter.Panel>
          <PanelContent color="#06b6d4">{t("story.splitter_flexible", "Flexible Panel")}</PanelContent>
        </Splitter.Panel>
      </Splitter>
    </div>
  );
};

## <T k="doc.usage" />

```tsx
import { Splitter } from "wimui";

<Splitter orientation="horizontal">
  <Splitter.Panel defaultSize={30}>Left Content</Splitter.Panel>
  <Splitter.Handle />
  <Splitter.Panel defaultSize={70}>Right Content</Splitter.Panel>
</Splitter>;
```

Stack

components-layout-stack · ./stories/Stack/Stack.stories.tsx
Stack component is used to distribute space between elements in a vertical or horizontal layout.
Prop types (react-docgen) 26 prop types 
Component: src/components/layout/Stack/Stack.tsx::Stack
Props:
/**
 * Align-items
 */
align?: | "start"
| "center"
| "end"
| "stretch"
| "baseline"
| React.CSSProperties["alignItems"]

/**
 * The component used for the root node. Either a string to use a HTML element or a component.
 */
as?: C

/**
 * Background color
 */
bg?: T | (string & {})

/**
 * Stack direction
 */
direction?: | T
| {
    base?: T;
    sm?: T;
    md?: T;
    lg?: T;
    xl?: T;
  } = "column"

/**
 * Display
 */
display?: React.CSSProperties["display"]

/**
 * Gap between children. Can be a number (px) or a spacing token (e.g., 'sm', 'md', 'lg').
 */
gap?: number | string = "md"

/**
 * Height
 */
h?: | T
| {
    base?: T;
    sm?: T;
    md?: T;
    lg?: T;
    xl?: T;
  }

/**
 * Justify-content
 */
justify?: | "start"
| "center"
| "end"
| "between"
| "around"
| "evenly"
| "stretch"
| React.CSSProperties["justifyContent"]

/**
 * Margin
 */
m?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin bottom
 */
mb?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin left
 */
ml?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin right
 */
mr?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin top
 */
mt?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin horizontal
 */
mx?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Margin vertical
 */
my?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding
 */
p?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding bottom
 */
pb?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding left
 */
pl?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Position
 */
position?: React.CSSProperties["position"]

/**
 * Padding right
 */
pr?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding top
 */
pt?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding horizontal
 */
px?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Padding vertical
 */
py?: number | WimSpacing

/**
 * Border radius
 */
radius?: number | WimRadius

/**
 * Box shadow
 */
shadow?: T | (string & {})

/**
 * Width
 */
w?: | T
| {
    base?: T;
    sm?: T;
    md?: T;
    lg?: T;
    xl?: T;
  }
Imports 
import { Box, Stack } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Stack direction="column" gap="md">
            <Box
                key="1"
                bg="#eff6ff"
                p={20}
                radius={8}
                style={{ border: "1px solid #3b82f6" }}>
                {t("story.stack_item_1", "Item 1")}
            </Box>
            <Box
                key="2"
                bg="#f0fdf4"
                p={20}
                radius={8}
                style={{ border: "1px solid #22c55e" }}>
                {t("story.stack_item_2", "Item 2")}
            </Box>
            <Box
                key="3"
                bg="#fff7ed"
                p={20}
                radius={8}
                style={{ border: "1px solid #f97316" }}>
                {t("story.stack_item_3", "Item 3")}
            </Box>
        </Stack>
    );
};
Row story ok 
const Row = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Stack direction="row" gap="lg">
            <Box
                key="1"
                bg="#eff6ff"
                p={20}
                radius={8}
                style={{ border: "1px solid #3b82f6" }}>
                {t("story.stack_item_1", "Item 1")}
            </Box>
            <Box
                key="2"
                bg="#f0fdf4"
                p={20}
                radius={8}
                style={{ border: "1px solid #22c55e" }}>
                {t("story.stack_item_2", "Item 2")}
            </Box>
            <Box
                key="3"
                bg="#fff7ed"
                p={20}
                radius={8}
                style={{ border: "1px solid #f97316" }}>
                {t("story.stack_item_3", "Item 3")}
            </Box>
        </Stack>
    );
};
Spacing Tokens story ok 
const SpacingTokens = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <Stack gap="xl">
      <Box bg="#f8fafc" p={10}>
        {t("story.stack_gap", "Gap: ")}xl
      </Box>
      <Stack direction="row" gap="xs">
        <Box bg="#eff6ff" p={10}>
          {t("story.stack_gap", "Gap: ")}xs
        </Box>
        <Box bg="#eff6ff" p={10}>
          {t("story.stack_gap", "Gap: ")}xs
        </Box>
        <Box bg="#eff6ff" p={10}>
          {t("story.stack_gap", "Gap: ")}xs
        </Box>
      </Stack>
      <Stack direction="row" gap="lg">
        <Box bg="#f0fdf4" p={10}>
          {t("story.stack_gap", "Gap: ")}lg
        </Box>
        <Box bg="#f0fdf4" p={10}>
          {t("story.stack_gap", "Gap: ")}lg
        </Box>
        <Box bg="#f0fdf4" p={10}>
          {t("story.stack_gap", "Gap: ")}lg
        </Box>
      </Stack>
    </Stack>
  );
};

## <T k="doc.usage" />

```tsx
import { Stack } from "@/components/layout/Stack/Stack";
import { Box } from "../Box/Box";

const Demo = () => (
  <Stack gap="md">
    <Box>Item 1</Box>
    <Box>Item 2</Box>
    <Box>Item 3</Box>
  </Stack>
);
```

Stats

components-data-structures-stats · ./stories/Stats/Stats.stories.tsx
`Stats` は統計情報やメトリクスを表示するためのコンポーネントです。
Prop types (react-docgen) 1 prop type 
Component: src/components/data-display/Stats/Stats.tsx::Stats
Props:
variant?: any = "elevated"
Imports 
import { Stats } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Stats>
            <Stats.Label>{t('story.stats_total_users')}</Stats.Label>
            <Stats.Value>1,234</Stats.Value>
            <Stats.Description>{t('story.stats_desc_users')}</Stats.Description>
        </Stats>
    );
};
With Trend story ok 
const WithTrend = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Stats>
            <Stats.Label>{t('story.stats_revenue')}</Stats.Label>
            <Stats.Value>$45,231.89</Stats.Value>
            <Stats.Trend direction="up">+20.1%</Stats.Trend>
        </Stats>
    );
};
Negative Trend story ok 
const NegativeTrend = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Stats>
            <Stats.Label>{t('story.stats_active_alerts')}</Stats.Label>
            <Stats.Value>12</Stats.Value>
            <Stats.Trend direction="down">-5%</Stats.Trend>
        </Stats>
    );
};
Outline story ok 
const Outline = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Stats variant="outline">
            <Stats.Label>{t('story.stats_page_views')}</Stats.Label>
            <Stats.Value>12,456</Stats.Value>
            <Stats.Trend direction="neutral">0%</Stats.Trend>
        </Stats>
    );
};
Flat story ok 
const Flat = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Stats variant="flat">
            <Stats.Label>{t('story.stats_avg_session')}</Stats.Label>
            <Stats.Value>2m 34s</Stats.Value>
            <Stats.Description>{t('story.stats_desc_session')}</Stats.Description>
        </Stats>
    );
};

components-internal-statuscontent · ./stories/Internal/StatusContent/StatusContent.stories.tsx
Internal component to unify layout for Result and EmptyState
Prop types (react-docgen) 8 prop types 
Component: src/components/_internal/StatusContent.tsx::StatusContent
Props:
/**
 * Action buttons or links
 */
actions?: ReactNode

/**
 * Additional content children
 */
children?: ReactNode

/**
 * Custom class name for wrapping div
 */
className?: string

/**
 * Supporting description or subtitle
 */
description?: ReactNode

/**
 * Status-based icon or custom icon
 */
icon?: ReactNode

/**
 * Prefix for BEM classes
 */
prefixCls?: string = "wim-status-content"

/**
 * Size variation
 */
size?: "default" | "small" = "default"

/**
 * Main title
 */
title?: ReactNode
Imports 
import { Button, Icon, StatusContent } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <StatusContent
            icon={<Icon name="CheckCircleIcon" color="primary" />}
            title={t("doc.status_success_title")}
            description={t("doc.status_success_desc")}
            actions={
                <>
                    <Button label={t("button.label")} variant="filled" />
                    <Button label={t("doc.RefTable_desc")} variant="outlined" />
                </>
            } />
    );
};
Small story ok 
const Small = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <StatusContent
            size="small"
            title={t("doc.status_success_title")}
            description={t("doc.status_success_desc")} />
    );
};
No Action story ok 
const NoAction = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <StatusContent
            title={t("doc.status_success_title")}
            description={t("doc.status_success_desc")} />
    );
};

Stepper

components-navigation-elements-stepper · ./stories/Stepper/Stepper.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 7 prop types 
Component: src/components/navigation/Stepper/Stepper.tsx::Stepper
Props:
/**
 * Additional class names
 */
className?: string

/**
 * Index of the current active step (0-indexed)
 */
current?: number = 0

/**
 * Direction of the stepper
 */
direction?: "horizontal" | "vertical" = "horizontal"

/**
 * Placement of the labels
 */
labelPlacement?: "horizontal" | "vertical" = "horizontal"

/**
 * Callback function when a step is clicked (if applicable)
 */
onChange?: (current: number) => void

/**
 * Status of the current step
 */
status?: "wait" | "process" | "finish" | "error" = "process"

/**
 * Array of step configurations
 */
steps?: Step[] = []
Imports 
import { Icon, Stepper } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const steps = useDefaultSteps();
    return <Stepper steps={steps} current={1} />;
};
Vertical story ok 
const Vertical = () => {
    const steps = useDefaultSteps();
    return <Stepper direction="vertical" steps={steps} current={1} />;
};
Label Vertical story ok 
const LabelVertical = () => {
    const steps = useDefaultSteps();
    return <Stepper labelPlacement="vertical" steps={steps} current={1} />;
};
Error Status story ok 
const ErrorStatus = () => {
    const steps = useDefaultSteps();
    return <Stepper status="error" steps={steps} current={1} />;
};
Custom Icons story ok 
const CustomIcons = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Stepper
            steps={[
              {
                title: t("story.stepper_login"),
                icon: <Icon name="EyeIcon" size="sm" />,
              },
              {
                title: t("story.stepper_verification"),
                icon: <Icon name="LoadingIcon" size="sm" />,
              },
              {
                title: t("story.stepper_pay"),
                icon: <Icon name="StarIcon" size="sm" />,
              },
              {
                title: t("story.stepper_done"),
                icon: <Icon name="CheckIcon" size="sm" />,
              },
            ]}
            current={1} />
    );
};
Interactive story ok 
const Interactive = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [current, setCurrent] = useState(0);
    const steps = Array.from({ length: 4 }, (_, i) => ({
      title: `${t("story.stepper_step")} ${i + 1}`,
      description: `${t("story.stepper_step_desc")} ${i + 1}`,
    }));
    return <Stepper steps={steps} current={current} onChange={(index) => setCurrent(index)} />;
};
Docs doc ok

label?: string

Imports 
import { Switch } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Switch label={t("story.switch_notif")} />;
};
Checked story ok 
const Checked = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Switch defaultChecked label={t("story.switch_wifi")} />;
};
Small story ok 
const Small = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Switch size="sm" label={t("story.switch_airplane")} />;
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Switch disabled label={t("story.switch_bluetooth")} />;
};
Disabled Checked story ok 
const DisabledChecked = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Switch disabled defaultChecked label={t("story.switch_bluetooth")} />;
};
No Label story ok 
const NoLabel = () => {
    return <Switch aria-label="Toggle" />;
};

Imports 
import { SwitchGroup } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const options = useOptions();
    return <SwitchGroup options={options} defaultValue={["wifi"]} />;
};
Horizontal story ok 
const Horizontal = () => {
    const options = useOptions();
    return <SwitchGroup options={options} direction="horizontal" defaultValue={["wifi"]} />;
};
With Disabled Option story ok 
const WithDisabledOption = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const options = useOptions();

    return (
        <SwitchGroup
            options={[
              ...options,
              {
                label: `${t("story.mobile_data")} ${t("story.option_disabled")}`,
                value: "mobile_data",
                disabled: true,
              },
            ]}
            defaultValue={["wifi"]} />
    );
};

import { Icon, TabBar } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = React.useState("home");

    return (
        <div
            style={{ height: "100vh", background: "var(--wim-color-surface-variant)", position: "relative" }}>
            <div style={{ padding: "20px" }}>
                {t("story.tabbar_content_prefix")} {activeTab} {t("story.tabbar_tab")}
            </div>
            <TabBar style={{}}>
                <TabBar.Item
                    active={activeTab === "home"}
                    onClick={() => setActiveTab("home")}
                    icon={<Icon name="CircleIcon" />}
                    label={t("story.common_home")} />
                <TabBar.Item
                    active={activeTab === "search"}
                    onClick={() => setActiveTab("search")}
                    icon={<Icon name="SearchIcon" />}
                    label={t("story.common_search")} />
                <TabBar.Item
                    active={activeTab === "notifications"}
                    onClick={() => setActiveTab("notifications")}
                    icon={<Icon name="StarIcon" />}
                    label={t("story.common_alerts")}
                    badge="3" />
                <TabBar.Item
                    active={activeTab === "profile"}
                    onClick={() => setActiveTab("profile")}
                    icon={<Icon name="SquareIcon" />}
                    label={t("story.common_profile")} />
            </TabBar>
        </div>
    );
};
Without Labels story ok 
const WithoutLabels = () => {
    const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = React.useState("home");

    return (
        <div
            style={{ height: "100vh", background: "var(--wim-color-surface-variant)", position: "relative" }}>
            <TabBar style={{}}>
                <TabBar.Item
                    active={activeTab === "home"}
                    onClick={() => setActiveTab("home")}
                    icon={<Icon name="CircleIcon" />}
                    aria-label="Home" />
                <TabBar.Item
                    active={activeTab === "grid"}
                    onClick={() => setActiveTab("grid")}
                    icon={<Icon name="MaximizeIcon" />}
                    aria-label="Grid" />
                <TabBar.Item
                    active={activeTab === "search"}
                    onClick={() => setActiveTab("search")}
                    icon={<Icon name="SearchIcon" />}
                    aria-label="Search" />
            </TabBar>
        </div>
    );
};
Fixed story ok 
const Fixed = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = React.useState("home");

    return (
        <div
            style={{ background: "var(--wim-color-surface-variant)", minHeight: "100vh" }}>
            <div style={{ padding: "20px", paddingBottom: "100px" }}>
                <h2>{t("story.tabbar_fixed_title")}</h2>
                <p>{t("story.tabbar_fixed_desc")}</p>
                {Array.from({ length: 20 }).map((_, i) => (
                  <p key={i}>
                    {t("story.tabbar_line")} {i + 1} {t("story.tabbar_long_content")}
                  </p>
                ))}
            </div>
            <TabBar fixed>
                <TabBar.Item
                    active={activeTab === "home"}
                    onClick={() => setActiveTab("home")}
                    icon={<Icon name="HomeIcon" />}
                    label={t("story.common_home")} />
                <TabBar.Item
                    active={activeTab === "search"}
                    onClick={() => setActiveTab("search")}
                    icon={<Icon name="SearchIcon" />}
                    label={t("story.common_search")} />
                <TabBar.Item
                    active={activeTab === "profile"}
                    onClick={() => setActiveTab("profile")}
                    icon={<Icon name="UserIcon" />}
                    label={t("story.common_profile")} />
            </TabBar>
        </div>
    );
};

```jsx
const [active, setActive] = useState("home");

<TabBar>
  <TabBar.Item
    label="Home"
    icon={<HomeIcon />}
    active={active === "home"}
    onClick={() => setActive("home")}
  />
  <TabBar.Item
    label="Search"
    icon={<SearchIcon />}
    active={active === "search"}
    onClick={() => setActive("search")}
  />
  <TabBar.Item
    label="Profile"
    icon={<UserIcon />}
    active={active === "profile"}
    onClick={() => setActive("profile")}
  />
</TabBar>;
```

import { Badge, Checkbox, IconButton, Table } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const sampleData = useSampleData();

    return (
        <Table>
            <Table.Header>
                <Table.Row>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_name")}</Table.Head>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_email")}</Table.Head>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_role")}</Table.Head>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_status")}</Table.Head>
                </Table.Row>
            </Table.Header>
            <Table.Body>
                {sampleData.map((row) => (
                  <Table.Row key={row.id}>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_name")}>{row.name}</Table.Cell>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_email")}>
                      {row.email}
                    </Table.Cell>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_role")}>{row.role}</Table.Cell>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_status")}>
                      <Badge
                        content={row.status}
                        size="sm"
                        color={
                          row.status === t("story.table_active")
                            ? "primary"
                            : "neutral"
                        }
                      />
                    </Table.Cell>
                  </Table.Row>
                ))}
            </Table.Body>
        </Table>
    );
};
Striped story ok 
const Striped = () => <Table striped />;
Bordered story ok 
const Bordered = () => <Table bordered />;
Hoverable story ok 
const Hoverable = () => <Table hoverable />;
Full Width story ok 
const FullWidth = () => <Table fullWidth />;
With Actions story ok 
const WithActions = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const sampleData = useSampleData();

    return (
        <Table fullWidth={true}>
            <Table.Header>
                <Table.Row>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_name")}</Table.Head>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_email")}</Table.Head>
                    <Table.Head style={{ width: "1%", whiteSpace: "nowrap" }}>
                        {t("story.table_actions")}
                    </Table.Head>
                </Table.Row>
            </Table.Header>
            <Table.Body>
                {sampleData.slice(0, 2).map((row) => (
                  <Table.Row key={row.id}>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_name")}>{row.name}</Table.Cell>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_email")}>
                      {row.email}
                    </Table.Cell>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_actions")}>
                      <div
                        style={{
                          display: "flex",
                          gap: "4px",
                          justifyContent: "flex-start",
                        }}
                      >
                        <IconButton
                          iconName="EditIcon"
                          aria-label={t("story.dropdown_edit")}
                          size="sm"
                          variant="ghost"
                        />
                        <IconButton
                          iconName="TrashIcon"
                          aria-label={t("story.dropdown_delete")}
                          size="sm"
                          variant="ghost"
                          intent="destructive"
                        />
                      </div>
                    </Table.Cell>
                  </Table.Row>
                ))}
            </Table.Body>
        </Table>
    );
};
Sortable story ok 
const Sortable = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const manyRows = useManyRows();
    const [sortConfig, setSortConfig] = React.useState<{
      key: string;
      direction: "asc" | "desc" | "none";
    }>({ key: "id", direction: "asc" });

    const [data, setData] = React.useState(manyRows);

    const handleSort = (key: string) => {
      let direction: "asc" | "desc" | "none" = "asc";
      if (sortConfig.key === key) {
        if (sortConfig.direction === "asc") direction = "desc";
        else if (sortConfig.direction === "desc") direction = "none";
      }

      setSortConfig({ key, direction });

      if (direction === "none") {
        setData(manyRows);
      } else {
        const sortedData = [...manyRows].sort((a, b) => {
          const aValue = (a as unknown as Record<string, unknown>)[key];
          const bValue = (b as unknown as Record<string, unknown>)[key];
          if (String(aValue) < String(bValue)) return direction === "asc" ? -1 : 1;
          if (String(aValue) > String(bValue)) return direction === "asc" ? 1 : -1;
          return 0;
        });
        setData(sortedData);
      }
    };

    return (
        <Table fullWidth>
            <Table.Header>
                <Table.Row>
                    <Table.Head
                        sortable
                        sortDirection={
                          sortConfig.key === "id" ? sortConfig.direction : "none"
                        }
                        onSort={() => handleSort("id")}>
                        {t("story.table_id")}
                    </Table.Head>
                    <Table.Head
                        sortable
                        sortDirection={
                          sortConfig.key === "name" ? sortConfig.direction : "none"
                        }
                        onSort={() => handleSort("name")}>
                        {t("story.table_name")}
                    </Table.Head>
                    <Table.Head
                        sortable
                        sortDirection={
                          sortConfig.key === "email" ? sortConfig.direction : "none"
                        }
                        onSort={() => handleSort("email")}>
                        {t("story.table_email")}
                    </Table.Head>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_role")}</Table.Head>
                </Table.Row>
            </Table.Header>
            <Table.Body>
                {data.slice(0, 10).map((row) => (
                  <Table.Row key={row.id}>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_id")}>{row.id}</Table.Cell>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_name")}>{row.name}</Table.Cell>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_email")}>
                      {row.email}
                    </Table.Cell>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_role")}>{row.role}</Table.Cell>
                  </Table.Row>
                ))}
            </Table.Body>
        </Table>
    );
};
Row Selection story ok 
const RowSelection = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const manyRows = useManyRows();
    const [selectedIds, setSelectedIds] = React.useState<number[]>([]);

    const allSelected = selectedIds.length === 5;
    const indeterminate = selectedIds.length > 0 && selectedIds.length < 5;

    const toggleAll = () => {
      if (allSelected) {
        setSelectedIds([]);
      } else {
        setSelectedIds([1, 2, 3, 4, 5]);
      }
    };

    const toggleRow = (id: number) => {
      if (selectedIds.includes(id)) {
        setSelectedIds(selectedIds.filter((sid) => sid !== id));
      } else {
        setSelectedIds([...selectedIds, id]);
      }
    };

    return (
        <Table fullWidth>
            <Table.Header>
                <Table.Row>
                    <Table.Head selection>
                        <Checkbox checked={allSelected} indeterminate={indeterminate} onChange={toggleAll} />
                    </Table.Head>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_id")}</Table.Head>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_name")}</Table.Head>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_email")}</Table.Head>
                </Table.Row>
            </Table.Header>
            <Table.Body>
                {manyRows.slice(0, 5).map((row) => (
                  <Table.Row key={row.id} selected={selectedIds.includes(row.id)}>
                    <Table.Cell selection>
                      <Checkbox
                        checked={selectedIds.includes(row.id)}
                        onChange={() => toggleRow(row.id)}
                      />
                    </Table.Cell>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_id")}>{row.id}</Table.Cell>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_name")}>{row.name}</Table.Cell>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_email")}>
                      {row.email}
                    </Table.Cell>
                  </Table.Row>
                ))}
            </Table.Body>
        </Table>
    );
};
Sticky Header story ok 
const StickyHeader = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const manyRows = useManyRows();

    return (
        <Table stickyHeader={true} fullWidth={true} maxHeight="300px">
            <Table.Header>
                <Table.Row>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_id")}</Table.Head>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_name")}</Table.Head>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_email")}</Table.Head>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_role")}</Table.Head>
                </Table.Row>
            </Table.Header>
            <Table.Body>
                {manyRows.map((row) => (
                  <Table.Row key={row.id}>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_id")}>{row.id}</Table.Cell>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_name")}>{row.name}</Table.Cell>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_email")}>
                      {row.email}
                    </Table.Cell>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_role")}>{row.role}</Table.Cell>
                  </Table.Row>
                ))}
            </Table.Body>
        </Table>
    );
};
Subtle Scrollbar story ok 
const SubtleScrollbar = () => <Table scrollbar="subtle" />;
Hidden Scrollbar story ok 
const HiddenScrollbar = () => <Table scrollbar="hidden" />;
Mobile Card story ok 
const MobileCard = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const sampleData = useSampleData();

    return (
        <Table mobileCard={true} fullWidth={true}>
            <Table.Header>
                <Table.Row>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_id")}</Table.Head>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_name")}</Table.Head>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_email")}</Table.Head>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_role")}</Table.Head>
                    <Table.Head>{t("story.table_status")}</Table.Head>
                </Table.Row>
            </Table.Header>
            <Table.Body>
                {sampleData.map((row) => (
                  <Table.Row key={row.id}>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_id")}>{row.id}</Table.Cell>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_name")}>{row.name}</Table.Cell>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_email")}>
                      {row.email}
                    </Table.Cell>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_role")}>{row.role}</Table.Cell>
                    <Table.Cell label={t("story.table_status")}>
                      <Badge
                        content={row.status}
                        size="sm"
                        color={
                          row.status === t("story.table_active")
                            ? "primary"
                            : "neutral"
                        }
                      />
                    </Table.Cell>
                  </Table.Row>
                ))}
            </Table.Body>
        </Table>
    );
};

### <T k="doc.table_sortable" />

<p><T k="doc.table_sortable_desc" /></p>

#### <T k="doc.table_usetablesort" />

<p><T k="doc.table_usetablesort_desc" /></p>

```jsx
import { Table, useTableSort } from "./Table";

function MyTable() {
  const data = [
    { id: 1, name: "Alice", age: 25, email: "alice@example.com" },
    { id: 2, name: "Bob", age: 30, email: "bob@example.com" },
    { id: 3, name: "Charlie", age: 22, email: "charlie@example.com" },
  ];

  const { sortedData, handleSort, getSortDirection } = useTableSort(data);

  return (
    <Table fullWidth>
      <Table.Header>
        <Table.Row>
          <Table.Head
            sortable
            sortDirection={getSortDirection("id")}
            onSort={() => handleSort("id")}
          >
            ID
          </Table.Head>
          <Table.Head
            sortable
            sortDirection={getSortDirection("name")}
            onSort={() => handleSort("name")}
          >
            Name
          </Table.Head>
          <Table.Head
            sortable
            sortDirection={getSortDirection("age")}
            onSort={() => handleSort("age")}
          >
            Age
          </Table.Head>
        </Table.Row>
      </Table.Header>
      <Table.Body>
        {sortedData.map((row) => (
          <Table.Row key={row.id}>
            <Table.Cell>{row.id}</Table.Cell>
            <Table.Cell>{row.name}</Table.Cell>
            <Table.Cell>{row.age}</Table.Cell>
          </Table.Row>
        ))}
      </Table.Body>
    </Table>
  );
}
```

#### <T k="doc.table_usetablesort_features" />

<ul>
  <li><T k="doc.table_usetablesort_feature_logic" /></li>
  <li><T k="doc.table_usetablesort_feature_tri" /></li>
  <li><T k="doc.table_usetablesort_feature_ts" /></li>
  <li><T k="doc.table_usetablesort_feature_custom" /></li>
</ul>

```typescript
const {
  sortedData, // Sorted data
  sortConfig, // Current sort configuration
  handleSort, // Function to execute sort
  getSortDirection, // Get sort direction for a specific key
} = useTableSort(data, {
  initialSort: { key: "name", direction: "asc" },
  onSortChange: (config) => console.log("Sort changed:", config),
});
```

## <T k="doc.table_ts_support" />

<p><T k="doc.table_ts_support_desc" /></p>

```typescript
import { Table, useTableSort, SortDirection, SortConfig } from "./Table";
import { T } from "../T";

interface User {
  id: number;
  name: string;
  email: string;
}

const { sortedData } = useTableSort<User>(users);
```
