/**
 * Alignment of the tabs
 */
align?: "start" | "center" | "end" | "justify" = "start"

/**
 * Size of the tabs
 */
size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg" = "md"

/**
 * Visual style of the tabs
 */
variant?: "underline" | "pill" | "contained" = "underline"
Imports 
import { Icon, TabNavigation } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [active, setActive] = React.useState("overview");

    return (
        <TabNavigation>
            <TabNavigation.Item
                active={active === "overview"}
                onClick={() => setActive("overview")}
                href="#">
                {t("story.tabnav_overview")}
            </TabNavigation.Item>
            <TabNavigation.Item
                active={active === "integrations"}
                onClick={() => setActive("integrations")}
                href="#">
                {t("story.tabnav_integrations")}
            </TabNavigation.Item>
            <TabNavigation.Item
                active={active === "activity"}
                onClick={() => setActive("activity")}
                href="#">
                {t("story.tabnav_activity")}
            </TabNavigation.Item>
            <TabNavigation.Item
                active={active === "settings"}
                onClick={() => setActive("settings")}
                href="#">
                {t("story.tabnav_settings")}
            </TabNavigation.Item>
        </TabNavigation>
    );
};
Pills story ok 
const Pills = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [active, setActive] = React.useState("all");

    return (
        <TabNavigation variant="pill">
            <TabNavigation.Item active={active === "all"} onClick={() => setActive("all")}>
                {t("story.tabnav_all")}
            </TabNavigation.Item>
            <TabNavigation.Item active={active === "unread"} onClick={() => setActive("unread")}>
                {t("story.tabnav_unread")}
            </TabNavigation.Item>
            <TabNavigation.Item active={active === "archived"} onClick={() => setActive("archived")}>
                {t("story.tabnav_archived")}
            </TabNavigation.Item>
        </TabNavigation>
    );
};
Contained story ok 
const Contained = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [active, setActive] = React.useState("daily");

    return (
        <TabNavigation variant="contained">
            <TabNavigation.Item active={active === "daily"} onClick={() => setActive("daily")}>
                {t("story.tabnav_daily")}
            </TabNavigation.Item>
            <TabNavigation.Item active={active === "weekly"} onClick={() => setActive("weekly")}>
                {t("story.tabnav_weekly")}
            </TabNavigation.Item>
            <TabNavigation.Item active={active === "monthly"} onClick={() => setActive("monthly")}>
                {t("story.tabnav_monthly")}
            </TabNavigation.Item>
        </TabNavigation>
    );
};
With Icons story ok 
const WithIcons = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [active, setActive] = React.useState("code");

    return (
        <TabNavigation>
            <TabNavigation.Item
                active={active === "code"}
                onClick={() => setActive("code")}
                icon={<Icon name="ChevronRightIcon" />}>
                {t("story.tabnav_code")}
            </TabNavigation.Item>
            <TabNavigation.Item
                active={active === "issues"}
                onClick={() => setActive("issues")}
                icon={<Icon name="CircleIcon" />}>
                {t("story.tabnav_issues")}
            </TabNavigation.Item>
            <TabNavigation.Item
                active={active === "pulls"}
                onClick={() => setActive("pulls")}
                icon={<Icon name="CopyIcon" />}>
                {t("story.tabnav_pull_requests")}
            </TabNavigation.Item>
        </TabNavigation>
    );
};

import { Tabs } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <Tabs defaultValue="1">
      <Tabs.List>
        <Tabs.Trigger value="1">{t("story.tabs_gen_settings")}</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger value="2">{t("story.tabs_user_profile")}</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger value="3">{t("story.tabs_notif_center")}</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger value="4">{t("story.tabs_sec_privacy")}</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger value="5">{t("story.tabs_app_integ")}</Tabs.Trigger>
      </Tabs.List>
      <Tabs.Content value="1">{t("story.tabs_gen_desc")}</Tabs.Content>
      <Tabs.Content value="2">{t("story.tabs_user_desc")}</Tabs.Content>
      <Tabs.Content value="3">{t("story.tabs_notif_desc")}</Tabs.Content>
      <Tabs.Content value="4">{t("story.tabs_sec_desc")}</Tabs.Content>
      <Tabs.Content value="5">{t("story.tabs_app_desc")}</Tabs.Content>
    </Tabs>
  );
};
Vertical story ok 
const Vertical = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <Tabs
      defaultValue="1"
      orientation="vertical"
      style={{ minHeight: "200px" }}
    >
      <Tabs.List>
        <Tabs.Trigger value="1">{t("story.tabs_dash_v")}</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger value="2">{t("story.tabs_ana_v")}</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger value="3">{t("story.tabs_sys_logs")}</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger value="4">{t("story.tabs_help_doc")}</Tabs.Trigger>
      </Tabs.List>
      <Tabs.Content value="1">
        <h3 style={{ marginTop: 0 }}>{t("story.tabs_dash_title")}</h3>
        <p>{t("story.tabs_dash_desc")}</p>
      </Tabs.Content>
      <Tabs.Content value="2">{t("story.tabs_ana_desc")}</Tabs.Content>
      <Tabs.Content value="3">{t("story.tabs_sys_desc")}</Tabs.Content>
      <Tabs.Content value="4">{t("story.tabs_help_desc")}</Tabs.Content>
    </Tabs>
  );
};
Scrolling story ok 
const Scrolling = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <Tabs defaultValue="1" style={{ width: "800px" }}>
      <Tabs.List>
        <Tabs.Trigger value="1">{t("story.tabs_long_tab")} 1</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger value="2">{t("story.tabs_long_tab")} 2</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger value="3">{t("story.tabs_long_tab")} 3</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger value="4">{t("story.tabs_long_tab")} 4</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger value="5">{t("story.tabs_long_tab")} 5</Tabs.Trigger>
      </Tabs.List>
      <Tabs.Content value="1">Content 1</Tabs.Content>
      <Tabs.Content value="2">Content 2</Tabs.Content>
      <Tabs.Content value="3">Content 3</Tabs.Content>
      <Tabs.Content value="4">Content 4</Tabs.Content>
      <Tabs.Content value="5">Content 5</Tabs.Content>
    </Tabs>
  );
};

components-data-indicators-tag · ./stories/Tag/Tag.stories.tsx
Data Display/Tag Component
Prop types (react-docgen) 5 prop types 
Component: src/components/data-display/Tag/Tag.tsx::Tag
Props:
/**
 * 表示するコンテンツ
 */
children?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * アイコン
 */
icon?: React.ReactNode

/**
 * サイズ
 */
size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg"

/**
 * ステータス
 */
status?: | "primary"
| "secondary"
| "success"
| "warning"
| "error"
| "info"
| "neutral"

/**
 * バリアント
 */
variant?: "solid" | "outline" | "subtle"
Imports 
import { Icon, Tag } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    return <Tag status="primary" variant="solid" size="md">{t("story.tag_content")}</Tag>;
};
Variants story ok 
const Variants = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "10px" }}>
            <Tag variant="solid">
                {t("story.tag_solid")}
            </Tag>
            <Tag variant="outline">
                {t("story.tag_outline")}
            </Tag>
            <Tag variant="subtle">
                {t("story.tag_subtle")}
            </Tag>
        </div>
    );
};
Colors story ok 
const Colors = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: "10px" }}>
            <Tag status="primary">
                {t("story.tag_primary")}
            </Tag>
            <Tag status="secondary">
                {t("story.tag_secondary")}
            </Tag>
            <Tag status="success">
                {t("story.tag_success")}
            </Tag>
            <Tag status="warning">
                {t("story.tag_warning")}
            </Tag>
            <Tag status="error">
                {t("story.tag_error")}
            </Tag>
            <Tag status="neutral">
                {t("story.tag_neutral")}
            </Tag>
            <Tag status="info">
                {t("story.tag_info")}
            </Tag>
        </div>
    );
};
Sizes story ok 
const Sizes = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "10px" }}>
            <Tag size="sm">
                {t("story.tag_small")}
            </Tag>
            <Tag size="md">
                {t("story.tag_medium")}
            </Tag>
        </div>
    );
};
With Icon story ok 
const WithIcon = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Tag icon={<Icon name="CircleIcon" size="sm" />}>
            {t("story.tag_with_icon")}
        </Tag>
    );
};

Textarea

components-basic-inputs-textarea · ./stories/Textarea/Textarea.stories.tsx
複数行のテキスト入力を受け付けるコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 8 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/Textarea/Textarea.tsx::Textarea
Props:
error?: string

fieldSizing?: "fixed" | "content" = "fixed"

fullWidth?: boolean = false

label?: string

layout?: "vertical" | "horizontal"

required?: boolean

status?: "default" | "error" | "warning" | "success" = "default"

variant?: "outline" | "ghost" = "outline"
Imports 
import { FieldError, Label, Textarea } from "wimui";
Basic story ok 
const Basic = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.textarea_label_inquiry")}>
            <Textarea disabled={false} placeholder={t("story.textarea_placeholder_forgot")} />
        </Label>
    );
};
Ghost story ok 
const Ghost = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.textarea_label_feedback")}>
            <Textarea
                disabled={false}
                variant="ghost"
                placeholder={t("story.textarea_placeholder_slow")} />
        </Label>
    );
};
Error Status story ok 
const ErrorStatus = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "8px" }}>
            <Label label={t("story.textarea_label_details")}>
                <Textarea
                    disabled={false}
                    status="error"
                    placeholder={t("story.textarea_placeholder_error")} />
            </Label>
            <FieldError content={t("story.textarea_error_10chars")} />
        </div>
    );
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.textarea_label_remarks")}>
            <Textarea disabled placeholder={t("story.textarea_placeholder_asap")} />
        </Label>
    );
};
Full Width story ok 
const FullWidth = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.textarea_label_message")}>
            <Textarea
                disabled={false}
                fullWidth
                placeholder={t("story.textarea_placeholder_thanks")} />
        </Label>
    );
};
Field Sizing Content story ok 
const FieldSizingContent = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Label label={t("story.textarea_label_remarks")}>
            <Textarea
                disabled={false}
                fieldSizing="content"
                placeholder={t("story.textarea_placeholder_urgent")} />
        </Label>
    );
};
Form Pattern story ok 
const FormPattern = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div
            style={{
              display: "flex",
              flexDirection: "column",
              gap: "24px",
              maxWidth: "500px",
            }}>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "8px" }}>
                <Label htmlFor="description" required label={t("story.textarea_label_intro")} />
                <Textarea
                    id="description"
                    disabled={false}
                    placeholder={t("story.textarea_placeholder_engineer")}
                    rows={3}
                    fullWidth />
            </div>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "8px" }}>
                <Label htmlFor="notes" label={t("story.textarea_label_remarks")} showOptional />
                <Textarea
                    id="notes"
                    disabled={false}
                    placeholder={t("story.textarea_placeholder_phone")}
                    rows={2}
                    fullWidth />
            </div>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "8px" }}>
                <Label
                    htmlFor="motivation"
                    required
                    label={t("story.textarea_label_motivation")}>
                    <Textarea
                        id="motivation"
                        disabled={false}
                        status="error"
                        defaultValue={t("story.textarea_value_none")}
                        rows={3}
                        fullWidth />
                </Label>
                <FieldError content={t("story.textarea_error_long")} />
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

components-data-structures-timeline · ./stories/Timeline/Timeline.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 3 prop types 
Component: src/components/data-display/Timeline/Timeline.tsx::Timeline
Props:
align?: "left" | "right" | "alternate" = "left"

children: React.ReactNode

className?: string
Imports 
import {
    Icon,
    Timeline,
    TimelineConnector,
    TimelineContent,
    TimelineItem,
    TimelineOppositeContent,
    TimelinePoint,
    TimelineSeparator,
} from "wimui";
Left Aligned story ok 
const LeftAligned = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Timeline align="left">
            <TimelineItem>
                <TimelineSeparator>
                    <TimelinePoint variant="primary" />
                    <TimelineConnector />
                </TimelineSeparator>
                <TimelineContent>{t("story.timeline_eat")}</TimelineContent>
            </TimelineItem>
            <TimelineItem>
                <TimelineSeparator>
                    <TimelinePoint variant="secondary" />
                    <TimelineConnector />
                </TimelineSeparator>
                <TimelineContent>{t("story.timeline_code")}</TimelineContent>
            </TimelineItem>
            <TimelineItem>
                <TimelineSeparator>
                    <TimelinePoint variant="success" />
                    <TimelineConnector />
                </TimelineSeparator>
                <TimelineContent>{t("story.timeline_sleep")}</TimelineContent>
            </TimelineItem>
            <TimelineItem>
                <TimelineSeparator>
                    <TimelinePoint />
                </TimelineSeparator>
                <TimelineContent>{t("story.timeline_repeat")}</TimelineContent>
            </TimelineItem>
        </Timeline>
    );
};
Alternate story ok 
const Alternate = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Timeline align="alternate">
            <TimelineItem>
                <TimelineOppositeContent>09:00 AM</TimelineOppositeContent>
                <TimelineSeparator>
                    <TimelinePoint variant="primary" />
                    <TimelineConnector />
                </TimelineSeparator>
                <TimelineContent>{t("story.timeline_eat")}</TimelineContent>
            </TimelineItem>
            <TimelineItem>
                <TimelineOppositeContent>10:00 AM</TimelineOppositeContent>
                <TimelineSeparator>
                    <TimelinePoint variant="secondary" />
                    <TimelineConnector />
                </TimelineSeparator>
                <TimelineContent>{t("story.timeline_code")}</TimelineContent>
            </TimelineItem>
            <TimelineItem>
                <TimelineOppositeContent>12:00 PM</TimelineOppositeContent>
                <TimelineSeparator>
                    <TimelinePoint variant="success" />
                    <TimelineConnector />
                </TimelineSeparator>
                <TimelineContent>{t("story.timeline_sleep")}</TimelineContent>
            </TimelineItem>
        </Timeline>
    );
};
With Icons story ok 
const WithIcons = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Timeline>
            <TimelineItem>
                <TimelineSeparator>
                    <TimelinePoint variant="primary">
                        <Icon name="CheckIcon" size="sm" />
                    </TimelinePoint>
                    <TimelineConnector />
                </TimelineSeparator>
                <TimelineContent>{t("story.timeline_step1_comp")}</TimelineContent>
            </TimelineItem>
            <TimelineItem>
                <TimelineSeparator>
                    <TimelinePoint variant="secondary">
                        <Icon name="CircleIcon" size="sm" />
                    </TimelinePoint>
                    <TimelineConnector />
                </TimelineSeparator>
                <TimelineContent>{t("story.timeline_step2_proc")}</TimelineContent>
            </TimelineItem>
            <TimelineItem>
                <TimelineSeparator>
                    <TimelinePoint variant="error">
                        <Icon name="CloseIcon" size="sm" />
                    </TimelinePoint>
                </TimelineSeparator>
                <TimelineContent>{t("story.timeline_step3_err")}</TimelineContent>
            </TimelineItem>
        </Timeline>
    );
};
Docs doc ok

className?: string

description?: string

duration?: number = 3000

id?: string

isVisible?: boolean = true

import { Button, Toast, ToastProvider } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Toast
            status="success"
            title={args.title || t("story.toast_saved_title")}
            description={args.description || t("story.toast_saved_desc")} />
    );
};

    );
};

const Warning = () => {

    );
};
Interactive story ok 
const Interactive = () => (
  <ToastProvider position="bottom-right">
    <ToastTrigger />
  </ToastProvider>
);

## <T k="doc.toast_system_usage" />

<p><T k="doc.toast_system_usage_desc" /></p>

```tsx
import { ToastProvider, useToast } from "./Toast";

const MyComponent = () => {
  const { show } = useToast();

  return (
    <button
      onClick={() =>
        show({
          title: "Success",
          description: "Data has been successfully saved.",
          status: "success",
        })
      }
    >
      Show Toast
    </button>
  );
};
```

<Stories />

ToggleGroup

components-selection-controls-togglegroup · ./stories/ToggleGroup/ToggleGroup.stories.tsx
ToggleGroup component allows users to select one or multiple options from a set of buttons.
Prop types (react-docgen) 11 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/ToggleGroup/ToggleGroup.tsx::ToggleGroup
Props:
/**
 * アクセシビリティ用のラベル（role="radiogroup" / "toolbar" の accessible name）
 */
aria-label?: string

/**
 * アクセシビリティ用のラベルID（aria-label の代替）
 */
aria-labelledby?: string

className?: string

defaultValue?: string | string[]

/**
 * 無効状態にするかどうか
 */
disabled?: boolean = false

fullWidth?: boolean = false

onChange?: (value: string | string[]) => void

options: Option[]

selectionMode?: "single" | "multiple" = "single"

size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg" = "md"

value?: string | string[]
Imports 
import { ToggleGroup } from "wimui";
Single Selection story ok 
const SingleSelection = () => {
    const options = useDefaultOptions();
    return <ToggleGroup options={options} selectionMode="single" defaultValue="left" />;
};
Multiple Selection story ok 
const MultipleSelection = () => {
    const options = useDefaultOptions();

    return (
        <ToggleGroup
            options={options}
            selectionMode="multiple"
            defaultValue={["left", "right"]} />
    );
};
Icon Only story ok 
const IconOnly = () => <ToggleGroup
    options={[
      { value: "bold", iconName: "CircleIcon" },
      { value: "italic", iconName: "SquareIcon" },
      { value: "underline", iconName: "LoadingIcon" },
    ] satisfies Option[]}
    selectionMode="multiple"
    defaultValue={["bold"]} />;
Sizes story ok 
const Sizes = () => {
    const options = useDefaultOptions();

    return (
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "1rem" }}>
            <ToggleGroup selectionMode="single" defaultValue="center" options={options} size="sm" />
            <ToggleGroup selectionMode="single" defaultValue="center" options={options} size="md" />
            <ToggleGroup selectionMode="single" defaultValue="center" options={options} size="lg" />
        </div>
    );
};
Full Width story ok 
const FullWidth = () => {
    const options = useDefaultOptions();

    return (
        <ToggleGroup
            options={options}
            selectionMode="single"
            defaultValue="center"
            fullWidth={true} />
    );
};
Disabled Options story ok 
const DisabledOptions = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <ToggleGroup
            options={[
              { label: t("story.toggle_available"), value: "avail" },
              { label: t("story.toggle_disabled"), value: "disabled", disabled: true },
              {
                label: t("story.toggle_selected_disabled"),
                value: "sel-disabled",
                disabled: true,
              },
            ]}
            selectionMode="multiple"
            defaultValue={["sel-disabled"]} />
    );
};
Docs doc ok

Tooltip

components-overlays-tooltip · ./stories/Tooltip/Tooltip.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 6 prop types 
Component: src/components/overlay/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx::Tooltip
Props:
children: ReactNode

className?: string

/**
 * Delay before showing the tooltip in ms.
 */
delay?: number = 200

/**
 * If provided, controls the open state.
 */
isOpen?: boolean

/**
 * Callback when open state changes.
 */
onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void

/**
 * Preferred placement of the tooltip.
 */
placement?: Placement = "top"
Imports 
import { Button, Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipTrigger } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Tooltip>
            <TooltipTrigger asChild>
                <Button label={t("story.tooltip_hover")} />
            </TooltipTrigger>
            <TooltipContent>{t("story.tooltip_text")}</TooltipContent>
        </Tooltip>
    );
};
Top story ok 
const Top = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ padding: "50px" }}>
            <Tooltip placement="top">
                <TooltipTrigger asChild>
                    <Button label={t("top")} />
                </TooltipTrigger>
                <TooltipContent>{t("story.tooltip_top_text")}</TooltipContent>
            </Tooltip>
        </div>
    );
};

const Bottom = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <div style={{ padding: "50px" }}>
            <Tooltip placement="bottom">

                    <Button label={t("bottom")} />
                </TooltipTrigger>
                <TooltipContent>{t("story.tooltip_bottom_text")}</TooltipContent>
            </Tooltip>
        </div>
    );
};

With Delay story ok 
const WithDelay = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Tooltip delay={args.delay ?? 1000}>
            <TooltipTrigger asChild>
                <Button label={t("story.tooltip_hover_1s")} />
            </TooltipTrigger>
            <TooltipContent>{t("story.tooltip_delayed")}</TooltipContent>
        </Tooltip>
    );
};

Tour

components-overlays-tour · ./stories/Tour/Tour.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 4 prop types 
Component: src/components/feedback/Tour/Tour.tsx::Tour
Props:
onClose: () => void

onFinish?: () => void

open: boolean

steps: TourStep[]
Imports 
import { Button, Tour } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
    const steps = [
      {
        target: "#tour-step-1",
        title: t("story.tour_welcome_title"),
        description: t("story.tour_welcome_desc"),
        placement: "bottom" as const,
      },
      {
        target: "#tour-step-2",
        title: t("story.tour_feature_title"),
        description: t("story.tour_feature_desc"),
        placement: "right" as const,
      },
      {
        target: "#tour-step-3",
        title: t("story.tour_help_title"),
        description: t("story.tour_help_desc"),
        placement: "top" as const,
      },
    ];

    return (
        <div style={{ padding: "40px", height: "1000px" }}>
            <Button label={t("story.tour_start")} onClick={() => setOpen(true)} />
            <div
                style={{
                  marginTop: "100px",
                  display: "flex",
                  gap: "20px",
                  flexWrap: "wrap",
                }}>
                <div
                    id="tour-step-1"
                    style={{
                      padding: "20px",
                      background: "var(--wim-color-surface-variant)",
                      border: "1px solid var(--wim-color-border)",
                      minWidth: "120px",
                    }}>
                    {t("story.tour_step_target", { n: 1 })}
                </div>
                <div
                    id="tour-step-2"
                    style={{
                      padding: "20px",
                      background: "var(--wim-color-surface-variant)",
                      border: "1px solid var(--wim-color-border)",
                      minWidth: "120px",
                    }}>
                    {t("story.tour_step_target", { n: 2 })}
                </div>
            </div>
            <div
                id="tour-step-3"
                style={{
                  marginTop: "400px",
                  padding: "20px",
                  background: "var(--wim-color-surface-variant)",
                  border: "1px solid var(--wim-color-border)",
                  width: "150px",
                }}>
                {t("story.tour_step_target", { n: 3 })}
            </div>
            <Tour open={open} steps={steps} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} />
        </div>
    );
};

Transition

components-internal-transition · ./stories/Transition/Transition.stories.tsx
A component that handles simple CSS transitions for its children. It manages applying classes at the right moments (enter, enterFrom, enterTo, etc.).
Prop types (react-docgen) 11 prop types 
Component: src/components/misc/Transition/Transition.tsx::Transition
Props:
/**
 * Whether to animate on initial mount
 */
appear?: boolean = false

/**
 * The content to be transitioned
 */
children: React.ReactNode

/**
 * Additional class names for the wrapper
 */
className?: string

/**
 * Transition classes applied when entering
 */
enter?: string = ""

/**
 * Startup classes for the entry transition
 */
enterFrom?: string = ""

/**
 * Ending classes for the entry transition
 */
enterTo?: string = ""

/**
 * Transition classes applied when leaving
 */
leave?: string = ""

/**
 * Startup classes for the leave transition
 */
leaveFrom?: string = ""

/**
 * Ending classes for the leave transition
 */
leaveTo?: string = ""

/**
 * Whether the component should be shown or hidden
 */
show: boolean

/**
 * Whether to unmount the children when hidden
 */
unmount?: boolean = true
Imports 
import { Button, Card, Container, Stack, Transition } from "wimui";
Fade story ok 
const Fade = () => {
  const [show, setShow] = useState(false);
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <Container size="sm">
      <Stack align="center" gap="xl" py="xl">
        <Button
          animateWidth
          variant="filled"
          onClick={() => setShow(!show)}
          label={show ? t("story.transition_hide_content") : t("story.transition_show_content")}
        />
        <Stack h={100} align="center" justify="center">
          <Transition
            show={show}
            enter="fade-enter"
            enterFrom="fade-enter-from"
            enterTo="fade-enter-to"
            leave="fade-leave"
            leaveFrom="fade-leave-from"
            leaveTo="fade-leave-to"
          >
            <Card
              variant="elevated"
              padding="lg"
              style={{
                backgroundColor: "var(--wim-color-surface, #ffffff)",
                border: "2px solid", borderColor: "var(--wim-color-primary, #3b82f6)",
                color: "var(--wim-color-text-primary, #1e293b)",
                fontWeight: "bold",
                minWidth: "150px",
                textAlign: "center",
              }}
            >
              {t("story.transition_fade_content")}
            </Card>
          </Transition>
        </Stack>
      </Stack>
    </Container>
  );
};
Slide story ok 
const Slide = () => {
  const [show, setShow] = useState(false);
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <Container size="sm">
      <Stack align="center" gap="xl" py="xl">
        <style>{`
                  .slide-enter { transition: all 300ms ease-out; }
                  .slide-enter-from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-20px); }
                  .slide-enter-to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
                  .slide-leave { transition: all 200ms ease-in; }
                  .slide-leave-from { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
                  .slide-leave-to { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
              `}</style>
        <Button
          animateWidth
          variant="filled"
          onClick={() => setShow(!show)}
          label={show ? t("story.transition_hide_slide") : t("story.transition_show_slide")}
        />
        <Stack h={100} align="center" justify="center">
          <Transition
            show={show}
            enter="slide-enter"
            enterFrom="slide-enter-from"
            enterTo="slide-enter-to"
            leave="slide-leave"
            leaveFrom="slide-leave-from"
            leaveTo="slide-leave-to"
          >
            <Card variant="outline" padding="md">
              {t("story.transition_slide_content")}
            </Card>
          </Transition>
        </Stack>
      </Stack>
    </Container>
  );
};
Docs doc ok

## <T k="doc.usage" />

```tsx
<Transition
  show={isOpen}
  enter="transition-opacity duration-300"
  enterFrom="opacity-0"
  enterTo="opacity-100"
  leave="transition-opacity duration-200"
  leaveFrom="opacity-100"
  leaveTo="opacity-0"
>
  <div><T k="doc.transition_usage_content" /></div>
</Transition>
```

TreeSelect

components-advanced-inputs-treeselect · ./stories/TreeSelect/TreeSelect.stories.tsx
ツリー形式の選択肢から1つまたは複数を選択するためのコンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 19 prop types 
Component: src/components/form/TreeSelect/TreeSelect.tsx::TreeSelect
Props:
/**
 * Whether to show a clear button when a value is selected
 */
allowClear?: boolean = false

aria-describedby?: string

aria-label?: string

aria-labelledby?: string

/**
 * チェック選択の動作モード（multiple 時に有効）。
 * - cascade: 親チェック→子全選択、子の一部→親は indeterminate（デフォルト）
 * - exclusive: 親子排他（親選択→子解除、子選択→親解除）
 */
checkStrategy?: "cascade" | "exclusive" = "cascade"

className?: string

defaultExpandedKeys?: string[] = []

disabled?: boolean = false

error?: string

id?: string

label?: string

layout?: "vertical" | "horizontal"

multiple?: boolean = false

onChange?: (value: string | string[]) => void

placeholder?: string = "Select"

required?: boolean

searchable?: boolean = false

treeData?: TreeSelectNode[] = []

value?: string | string[]
Imports 
import { Icon, TreeSelect } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation("docs");
    const treeData = translateTreeData(defaultTreeData, t);
    return <TreeSelect treeData={treeData} placeholder={t("story.treeselect_placeholder")} />;
};
Cascade Multiple story ok
cascade（デフォルト）: 親チェックで子全選択、子の一部で親が indeterminate。 「Design」を選ぶと Colors・Typography・Primary・Secondary が全て選択される。
const CascadeMultiple = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation("docs");
    const treeData = translateTreeData(defaultTreeData, t);

    return (
        <TreeSelect
            treeData={treeData}
            multiple
            checkStrategy="cascade"
            defaultExpandedKeys={["design"]}
            placeholder={t("story.treeselect_placeholder")} />
    );
};
Exclusive Multiple story ok
exclusive: 親子排他。親を選ぶと子が解除され、子を選ぶと親が解除される。 集計粒度の選択（「年」と「月」の同時選択を防ぐ）などに適する。
const ExclusiveMultiple = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation("docs");
    const treeData = translateTreeData(defaultTreeData, t);

    return (
        <TreeSelect
            treeData={treeData}
            multiple
            checkStrategy="exclusive"
            defaultExpandedKeys={["design"]}
            placeholder={t("story.treeselect_placeholder")} />
    );
};
Searchable story ok 
const Searchable = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation("docs");
    const treeData = translateTreeData(defaultTreeData, t);

    return (
        <TreeSelect
            treeData={treeData}
            searchable
            placeholder={t("story.treeselect_placeholder")} />
    );
};
Default Expanded story ok 
const DefaultExpanded = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation("docs");
    const treeData = translateTreeData(defaultTreeData, t);

    return (
        <TreeSelect
            treeData={treeData}
            defaultExpandedKeys={["design", "colors"]}
            placeholder={t("story.treeselect_placeholder")} />
    );
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation("docs");
    const treeData = translateTreeData(defaultTreeData, t);

    return (
        <TreeSelect
            treeData={treeData}
            disabled
            placeholder={t("story.treeselect_placeholder")} />
    );
};
Docs doc ok

TreeView

components-data-structures-treeview · ./stories/TreeView/TreeView.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 14 prop types 
Component: src/components/data-display/TreeView/TreeView.tsx
Props:
checkable?: boolean = false

/**
 * チェック選択の動作モード（checkable かつ data-driven モード時に有効）。
 * - cascade: 親チェック→子全選択、子の一部→親は indeterminate（デフォルト）
 * - exclusive: 親子排他（親選択→子解除、子選択→親解除）
 */
checkStrategy?: "cascade" | "exclusive" = "cascade"

/**
 * JSX ベースのアイテム（children API）。nodes を使わない場合に指定します。
 */
children?: React.ReactNode

className?: string

defaultCheckedValues?: string[] = []

defaultExpandedValues?: string[] = []

defaultSelectedValues?: string[] = []

multiSelect?: boolean = false

/**
 * データ駆動モードのノード配列。
 * 指定した場合は children より優先され、大量データで自動的に仮想化されます。
 */
nodes?: TreeViewNode[]

onCheckedChange?: (checked: string[]) => void

onSelectedChange?: (selected: string[]) => void

searchable?: boolean = false

/**
 * データ駆動モードで仮想化を開始するノード数のしきい値。
 * デフォルトは 100。
 */
virtualThreshold?: number = 100

width?: string | number
Imports 
import { Icon, TreeView } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <TreeView width="100%" defaultExpandedValues={["1", "2"]}>
            <TreeView.Item
                value="1"
                label={t("story.tree_documents")}
                icon={<Icon name="CircleIcon" size="sm" />}>
                <TreeView.Item
                    value="1-1"
                    label={t("story.tree_work")}
                    icon={<Icon name="SquareIcon" size="sm" />}>
                    <TreeView.Item
                        value="1-1-1"
                        label={t("story.tree_project_a")}
                        icon={<Icon name="CopyIcon" size="sm" />} />
                    <TreeView.Item
                        value="1-1-2"
                        label={t("story.tree_project_b")}
                        icon={<Icon name="CopyIcon" size="sm" />} />
                </TreeView.Item>
                <TreeView.Item
                    value="1-2"
                    label={t("story.tree_personal")}
                    icon={<Icon name="SquareIcon" size="sm" />}>
                    <TreeView.Item
                        value="1-2-1"
                        label={t("story.tree_photos")}
                        icon={<Icon name="CircleIcon" size="sm" />} />
                </TreeView.Item>
            </TreeView.Item>
            <TreeView.Item
                value="2"
                label={t("story.tree_music")}
                icon={<Icon name="CircleIcon" size="sm" />}>
                <TreeView.Item
                    value="2-1"
                    label={t("story.tree_rock")}
                    icon={<Icon name="SquareIcon" size="sm" />} />
                <TreeView.Item
                    value="2-2"
                    label={t("story.tree_jazz")}
                    icon={<Icon name="SquareIcon" size="sm" />} />
            </TreeView.Item>
            <TreeView.Item
                value="3"
                label={t("story.tree_videos")}
                icon={<Icon name="CircleIcon" size="sm" />} />
        </TreeView>
    );
};
Multi Select story ok 
const MultiSelect = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <TreeView multiSelect defaultExpandedValues={["1"]}>
      <TreeView.Item value="1" label={t("story.tree_system")}>
        <TreeView.Item value="1-1" label={t("story.tree_logs")} />
        <TreeView.Item value="1-2" label={t("story.tree_config")} />
      </TreeView.Item>
      <TreeView.Item value="2" label={t("story.tree_users")}>
        <TreeView.Item value="2-1" label={t("story.tree_admin")} />
        <TreeView.Item value="2-2" label={t("story.tree_guest")} />
      </TreeView.Item>
    </TreeView>
  );
};
Disabled Items story ok 
const DisabledItems = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <TreeView defaultExpandedValues={["1"]}>
      <TreeView.Item value="1" label={t("story.tree_root_enabled")}>
        <TreeView.Item
          value="1-1"
          label={t("story.tree_disabled_item")}
          disabled
        />
        <TreeView.Item value="1-2" label={t("story.tree_enabled_item")} />
      </TreeView.Item>
    </TreeView>
  );
};
Overflow story ok 
const Overflow = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <TreeView width={250} defaultExpandedValues={["1"]}>
      <TreeView.Item
        value="1"
        label={t("story.tree_long_folder")}
        icon={<Icon name="CircleIcon" size="sm" />}
      >
        <TreeView.Item
          value="1-1"
          label={t("story.tree_long_subitem")}
          icon={<Icon name="SquareIcon" size="sm" />}
        >
          <TreeView.Item
            value="1-1-1"
            label={t("story.tree_deep_nesting")}
            icon={<Icon name="CopyIcon" size="sm" />}
          />
        </TreeView.Item>
      </TreeView.Item>
      <TreeView.Item
        value="2"
        label={t("story.tree_regular_item")}
        icon={<Icon name="CircleIcon" size="sm" />}
      />
    </TreeView>
  );
};
Cascade Checkable story ok
cascade（デフォルト）: 親チェックで子全選択、子の一部で親が indeterminate。 バックアップ対象フォルダや地域フィルタのような「親 = 子を全て包含」用途。
const CascadeCheckable = function Render() {
  const [checked, setChecked] = React.useState<string[]>([]);
  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "12px" }}>
      <TreeView
        nodes={regionNodes}
        checkable
        checkStrategy="cascade"
        multiSelect
        defaultExpandedValues={["asia", "east-asia", "europe"]}
        onCheckedChange={setChecked}
        width="100%"
      />
      <div style={{ fontSize: "12px", color: "var(--wim-color-text-secondary)" }}>
        Checked: {checked.length > 0 ? checked.join(", ") : "(none)"}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
Exclusive Checkable story ok
exclusive: 親選択→子が自動解除、子選択→親が解除。 レポートの集計粒度やカテゴリ分類など「重複なしで最小セットを選ぶ」用途。
const ExclusiveCheckable = function Render() {
  const [checked, setChecked] = React.useState<string[]>([]);
  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "12px" }}>
      <TreeView
        nodes={regionNodes}
        checkable
        checkStrategy="exclusive"
        multiSelect
        defaultExpandedValues={["asia", "east-asia", "europe"]}
        onCheckedChange={setChecked}
        width="100%"
      />
      <div style={{ fontSize: "12px", color: "var(--wim-color-text-secondary)" }}>
        Checked: {checked.length > 0 ? checked.join(", ") : "(none)"}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
Docs doc ok

## <T k="doc.real_world_scenarios_title" />
<ul>
  <li>
    <strong><T k="doc.scenario_files_title" />:</strong> <T k="doc.treeview_scenario_1" />

    <strong><T k="doc.scenario_admin_title" />:</strong> <T k="doc.treeview_scenario_2" />

## <T k="doc.best_practices_title" />
<ul>
  <li><T k="doc.treeview_best_practice_1" /></li>
  <li><T k="doc.treeview_best_practice_2" /></li>
</ul>

```tsx
import { TreeView } from "@/components/data-display/TreeView/TreeView";
import { Icon } from "@/components/media/Icon/Icon";

const MyTree = () => (
  <TreeView defaultExpandedValues={["root"]}>
    <TreeView.Item
      value="root"
      label="Documents"
      icon={<Icon name="CircleIcon" />}
    >
      <TreeView.Item value="child1" label="Work" />
      <TreeView.Item value="child2" label="Personal" />
    </TreeView.Item>
  </TreeView>
);
```

## <T k="doc.usage_examples" />

<Canvas of={TreeViewStories.Default} />

## <T k="doc.advanced_features" />

### <T k="doc.treeview_checkbox_mode" />

<p><T k="doc.treeview_checkbox_mode_desc" /></p>

```tsx
const [checked, setChecked] = useState([]);

<TreeView checkable defaultCheckedValues={checked} onCheckedChange={setChecked}>
  <TreeView.Item value="1" label="Item 1">
    <TreeView.Item value="1-1" label="Item 1-1" />
    <TreeView.Item value="1-2" label="Item 1-2" />
  </TreeView.Item>
  <TreeView.Item value="2" label="Item 2" />
</TreeView>;
```

<p><T k="doc.treeview_use_cases" /></p>

<ul>
  <li><T k="doc.treeview_use_cases_item_1" /></li>
  <li><T k="doc.treeview_use_cases_item_2" /></li>
  <li><T k="doc.treeview_use_cases_item_3" /></li>
</ul>

### <T k="doc.treeview_search_filter" />

<p><T k="doc.treeview_search_filter_desc" /></p>

```tsx
<TreeView searchable>
  <TreeView.Item value="documents" label="Documents">
    <TreeView.Item value="work" label="Work">
      <TreeView.Item value="projects" label="Projects" />
      <TreeView.Item value="reports" label="Reports" />
    </TreeView.Item>
    <TreeView.Item value="personal" label="Personal" />
  </TreeView.Item>
</TreeView>
```

<p><T k="doc.treeview_search_filter_note" /></p>

### <T k="doc.treeview_multi_select" />

<p><T k="doc.treeview_multi_select_desc" /></p>

```tsx
<TreeView multiSelect defaultSelectedValues={["item1", "item2"]}>
  {/* Tree items */}
</TreeView>
```

### <T k="doc.treeview_custom_icons" />

<p><T k="doc.treeview_custom_icons_desc" /></p>

```tsx
<TreeView>
  <TreeView.Item
    value="folder1"
    label="Documents"
    icon={<Icon name="CircleIcon" />}
  >
    <TreeView.Item
      value="file1"
      label="Report.pdf"
      icon={<Icon name="SquareIcon" />}
    />
  </TreeView.Item>
</TreeView>
```

### <T k="doc.treeview_combined_features" />

```tsx
const [checked, setChecked] = useState([]);

<TreeView
  multiSelect
  checkable
  searchable
  defaultExpandedValues={["root"]}
  defaultCheckedValues={checked}
  onCheckedChange={setChecked}
  width={400}
>
  <TreeView.Item value="root" label="Root">
    <TreeView.Item value="child1" label="Child 1" />
    <TreeView.Item value="child2" label="Child 2">
      <TreeView.Item value="grandchild1" label="Grandchild 1" />
    </TreeView.Item>
  </TreeView.Item>
</TreeView>;
```

import { TreeView } from "./TreeView";

  multiSelect

Video

components-media-video · ./stories/Video/Video.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 24 prop types 
Component: src/components/media/Video/Video.tsx::Video
Props:
advancedControls?: boolean = false

autoPlay?: boolean = false

autoPlayNext?: boolean = false

border?: boolean = false

caption?: string

controls?: boolean = true

customControls?: boolean = false

/**
 * デモ用：読み込み完了を意図的に遅らせるミリ秒
 */
demoDelay?: number

/**
 * 読み込み完了時にフェードインさせるか
 */
fadeIn?: boolean = false

fit?: "contain" | "cover" | "fill" | "none" | "scale-down" = "cover"

height?: string | number

/**
 * 読み込み設定。"lazy" の場合に Intersection Observer が有効化されます
 */
loading?: "eager" | "lazy" = "lazy"

loop?: boolean = false

muted?: boolean = false

playlist?: { src: string; title?: string; poster?: string }[]

poster?: string

preload?: "auto" | "metadata" | "none"

qualities?: { label: string; src: string }[]

radius?: "none" | "small" | "medium" | "large" | "full" = "none"

resumePlayback?: boolean = false

shadow?: boolean = false

src?: string

videoId?: string

width?: string | number
Imports 
import { Button, Video } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <Video src={sampleVideo} poster={videoPoster} width={600} />;
Auto Play story ok 
const AutoPlay = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Video
            src={sampleVideo}
            poster={videoPoster}
            width={600}
            autoPlay={true}
            muted={true}
            loop={true}
            controls={false}
            caption={t("story.video_autoplay_caption")} />
    );
};
Rounded story ok 
const Rounded = () => <Video src={sampleVideo} poster={videoPoster} width={400} radius="large" shadow />;
Custom Controls story ok 
const CustomControls = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Video
            src={sampleVideo}
            poster={videoPoster}
            width={600}
            customControls={true}
            radius="medium"
            shadow={true}
            caption={t("story.video_custom_caption")} />
    );
};
Full Featured story ok 
const FullFeatured = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Video
            width={800}
            videoId="sample-demo-vid"
            resumePlayback={true}
            autoPlayNext={true}
            controls={false}
            radius="large"
            shadow={true}
            border={true}
            fit="cover"
            preload="auto"
            caption={t("story.video_full_caption")}
            customControls={true}
            advancedControls={true}
            qualities={[
              { label: "1080p", src: sampleVideo },
              { label: "720p", src: sampleVideo },
              { label: "Auto", src: sampleVideo },
            ]}
            playlist={[
              {
                src: sampleVideo,
                title: t("story.video_ep1"),
                poster: videoPoster,
              },
              { src: sampleVideo, title: t("story.video_ep2"), poster: videoPoster },
              { src: sampleVideo, title: t("story.video_ep3"), poster: videoPoster },
            ]} />
    );
};
Premium Features story ok 
const PremiumFeatures = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const [videoKey, setVideoKey] = React.useState(0);

    return (
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "2rem" }}>
            <div>
                <p style={{ marginBottom: "1rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}>{t("story.video_premium_features_lazy_load")}</p>
                <div style={{ marginBottom: "1rem" }}>
                    <Button
                        variant="filled"
                        onClick={() => setVideoKey((prev) => prev + 1)}
                        label={t("story.video_premium_features_reload")}
                        icon="RefreshIcon" />
                </div>
                <Video
                    key={videoKey}
                    src={`${sampleVideo}?k=${videoKey}`}
                    poster={videoPoster}
                    width={600}
                    fadeIn
                    demoDelay={2000}
                    radius="medium"
                    shadow
                    caption={t("story.video_premium_features_caption")} />
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
Docs doc ok

## <T k="doc.usage" />

```tsx
import { Video } from "@/components/media/Video/Video";

<Video
  src="path/to/video.mp4"
  width={600}
  autoPlay
  muted
  loop
  radius="medium"
  caption='<T k="doc.video_usage_caption" />'
/>;
```

VirtualList

components-data-structures-virtuallist · ./stories/VirtualList/VirtualList.stories.tsx
大量のデータを効率よく表示するための仮想化リストコンポーネント。 表示領域内のアイテムのみをレンダリングすることで、パフォーマンスを最適化します。
Prop types (react-docgen) 7 prop types 
Component: src/components/data-display/VirtualList/VirtualList.tsx::VirtualList
Props:
/**
 * スクロールコンテナの DOM ref。外部からプログラム的にスクロール位置を制御する場合に使用します。
 */
containerRef?: React.RefObject<HTMLDivElement | null>

/**
 * リストコンテナの表示高さ（px）。
 */
height: number

/**
 * 各アイテムの高さ（px）。
 */
itemHeight: number

/**
 * 各アイテムラッパーの role 属性。デフォルトは "listitem"。
 * listbox など別の親ロールと組み合わせる場合は "none" を指定してください。
 */
itemRole?: string = "listitem"

/**
 * レンダリング対象のアイテム配列。
 */
items: T[]

/**
 * 表示領域の外側に追加レンダリングするアイテム数。デフォルトは 3。
 */
overscan?: number = 3

/**
 * 各アイテムをレンダリングする関数。
 */
renderItem: (item: T, index: number) => React.ReactNode
Imports 
import { VirtualList } from "wimui";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const items = generateItems(1000);

    return (
        <VirtualList
            items={items}
            itemHeight={48}
            height={300}
            renderItem={(item) => (
              <div style={{ padding: "0 16px", width: "100%" }}>
                {t("story.virtuallist_item_label", { id: item.id })}
              </div>
            )} />
    );
};
Large Dataset story ok 
const LargeDataset = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const items = generateItems(10000);

    return (
        <VirtualList
            items={items}
            itemHeight={40}
            height={400}
            renderItem={(item) => (
              <div style={{ padding: "0 16px", width: "100%" }}>
                {t("story.virtuallist_item_label", { id: item.id })}
              </div>
            )} />
    );
};
With Custom Item Height story ok 
const WithCustomItemHeight = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const items = generateItems(500);

    return (
        <VirtualList
            items={items}
            itemHeight={64}
            height={320}
            renderItem={(item) => (
              <div
                style={{
                  padding: "8px 16px",
                  width: "100%",
                  borderBottom: "1px solid var(--wim-color-border, #e5e7eb)",
                }}
              >
                <div style={{ fontWeight: "bold" }}>
                  {t("story.virtuallist_item_label", { id: item.id })}
                </div>
                <div style={{ fontSize: "var(--wim-font-size-sm)", color: "var(--wim-color-text-muted, #6b7280)" }}>
                  {t("story.virtuallist_item_sublabel")}
                </div>
              </div>
            )} />
    );
};
With Overscan story ok 
const WithOverscan = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
    const items = generateItems(1000);

    return (
        <VirtualList
            items={items}
            itemHeight={48}
            height={300}
            overscan={10}
            renderItem={(item) => (
              <div style={{ padding: "0 16px", width: "100%" }}>
                {t("story.virtuallist_item_label", { id: item.id })}
              </div>
            )} />
    );
};

VisuallyHidden

components-internal-visuallyhidden · ./stories/VisuallyHidden/VisuallyHidden.stories.tsx
視覚的には非表示にしつつ、スクリーンリーダーなどのアシスティブテクノロジーにはコンテンツを維持するためのアクセシビリティ用コンポーネント。
Prop types (react-docgen) 1 prop type 
Component: src/components/misc/VisuallyHidden/VisuallyHidden.tsx::VisuallyHidden
Props:
/**
 * 表示されないが、スクリーンリーダーには読み上げられるコンテンツ。
 */
children: React.ReactNode
Imports 
import { VisuallyHidden } from "wimui";
Primary story ok 
const Primary = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <VisuallyHidden>
            {t("story.visuallyhidden_accessible")}
        </VisuallyHidden>
    );
};
Within Button story ok 
const WithinButton = function Render() {
  const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);
  return (
    <button aria-label={t("story.visuallyhidden_close")}>
      <span aria-hidden="true">×</span>
      <VisuallyHidden>{t("story.visuallyhidden_close")}</VisuallyHidden>
    </button>
  );
};

Imports 
import { Watermark } from "wimui";
Text story ok 
const Text = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Watermark content={t("story.watermark_text")}>
            <div
                style={{ height: "400px", background: "var(--wim-color-surface)", padding: "20px" }}>
                <div
                    style={{
                      height: "200px",
                      background: "var(--wim-color-surface-variant)",
                      display: "flex",
                      alignItems: "center",
                      justifyContent: "center",
                      marginTop: "24px",
                    }}>
                    {t("story.watermark_confidential_mark")}
                </div>
            </div>
        </Watermark>
    );
};
Multi Line story ok 
const MultiLine = () => {
    const { t } = useTranslation(ALL_NAMESPACES);

    return (
        <Watermark
            gap={[120, 120]}
            content={[
              t("story.watermark_wimui"),
              t("story.watermark_confidential_mark"),
              t("story.watermark_team"),
            ]}>
            <div style={{ height: "400px" }} />
        </Watermark>
    );
};
Image story ok 
const Image = () => <Watermark image="./wimlogo.svg" width={40} height={40} opacity={0.1}><div style={{ height: "400px" }} /></Watermark>;

./stories/charts/Charts.stories.tsx:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from "@storybook/react-vite";
import React from "react";
import { BarChart } from "@/components/charts/BarChart/BarChart";
import { LineChart } from "@/components/charts/LineChart/LineChart";
import { PieChart } from "@/components/charts/PieChart/PieChart";
import { Stack } from "@/components/layout/Stack/Stack";
import { Heading } from "@/components/typography/Heading/Heading";

const meta: Meta = {
  title: "Components/Visualization/Charts",
};

export default meta;

const data = [
  { name: "Jan", sales: 4000, profit: 2400 },
  { name: "Feb", sales: 3000, profit: 1398 },
  { name: "Mar", sales: 2000, profit: 9800 },
];

export const Dashboard: StoryObj = {
  render: () => (
    <Stack spacing="large">
      <Heading tag="h3" size="lg">Visualization Suite Overview</Heading>
      <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr))', gap: '20px' }}>
        <BarChart title="Sales by Month" data={data} xAxisKey="name" keys={["sales"]} />
        <LineChart title="Profit Trend" data={data} xAxisKey="name" keys={["profit"]} />
        <PieChart title="Market Share" data={data.map(d => ({ name: d.name, value: d.sales }))} />
      </div>
    </Stack>
  )
};

      <LineChart title="Profit Trend" data={data} xAxisKey="name" keys={["profit"]} />

Docs doc ok
./stories/charts/Charts.mdx
import { Meta, Canvas } from "@storybook/addon-docs/blocks";
import * as ChartsStories from "./Charts.stories";
import { T } from "../T";

<Meta title="Components/Visualization/Charts" of={ChartsStories} />

# <T k="cat.visualization" />

<p><T k="doc.charts_desc" /></p>

<Canvas of={ChartsStories.Dashboard} />

## Chart Components

This collection includes various charting components for data visualization:

- **BarChart**: Best for comparing quantities across categories.
- **LineChart**: Ideal for showing trends over time.
- **AreaChart**: Similar to LineChart but emphasizes the magnitude of change.
- **PieChart**: Shows parts of a whole proportionally.
- **ScatterChart**: Visualizes relationships between two numerical variables.
- **RadarChart**: Compares multiple quantitative variables across three or more dimensions.
- **Heatmap**: Represents data density or values through color variations.
- **FunnelChart**: Shows the progression of data through a process.
- **Treemap**: Displays hierarchical data using nested rectangles.
- **Gauge**: Visualizes a single value within a range (e.g., progress toward goal).

Each chart is built using Recharts for high performance and accessibility.

Recipes
